Fellow Conservative,

I’m not writing you today to alarm you, _**but rather to help you understand how precarious our current situation is.**_

During the 2024 campaign, your hard-earned dollars propelled us to victory, capturing not only the House, but the Senate and the White House. And I believe that the last twelve months have been among the most productive in Washington in DECADES.

But if polls are to be believed, then that productivity, our majority, and perhaps even the future of our Republic as we know it today are in danger.

There is no way to put this other than to deliver the bad news outright: **Democrats have extended their lead over Republicans by 14 points on the generic ballot.**

_**If you’ll recall, I only won my seat in Montana by a little more than 7.5%, and in Texas, my friend Sen. Ted Cruz won his race by just over 9%.**_

Hate is a powerful motivator, and Democrats abhor President Trump and all those who stand alongside him.

**_But there is still time._**

**[I’m asking you for a donation of $25, $50, $75, or even $100 right now that we’ll use to help elect Republicans in some of the most fiercely contested races this year. Because without our current majority in Congress, America loses.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a1e920d185747b8bf7ab9eafb1bf7e8&_e=kF9hcICvhe9cRIP9q7NsT15h13EHL2mM7OnR3HhWeLk7G_-nyIoOaQRjlCjfXAWw3mmhMJpmA4YMT5q-BVB3D3N_kF0fttwLdx-xFT0yrxDbKIhsexrzs-ZlOL5Md1_TlLcv0gkbR8v0sWGZDQKdH-KfMxnymej8AwNdiV9Opr7cf9l0lFPvqM6eSSiMERSx3kjsvSJK7EqYh2h6V5IPmOE7DkiVNKxHI39pffW2SaaIRdoCqkhna8SyAXirxCOqUpgwGVByVGa9zmhJGsnszk2lpG3ogmCmZBcOudl495oA2o5oldm_a3A8QCkQKK3AaKyrcx3MSrRK9u_pvVYkXZCDWz4H729XRNcjbX0XEDH0g12Ej67khb-r5HqhjWrPVlc_y6fdi_kjNRAurlVNZqHaSpVVwDSoKbkVWY4QbAg4z6OVrf-6tb-m6bHFq7dgcFu1xa0Go13dYYxZIXxLCU-ZwdeBgmrKN9uwiOr2dsaGP2JVondmeLJBqyF1d4xB6uCkBCQu9QARwO8zkU8BPOcB2Ifu7C8yrePnO9YnTEec1gpYH6-cIGhnwauQV6uoxwiVWAgM-pCFTUrdrvp4-0gh2CE57eELzFahEVDPFZDA3xBpSeZE_Cf09bzYRtg7qdQgLNQ5EQgRw2knyYBJ_UE-PnoJJH1Ey8USvDl9uSkjSQT9PLzXVxoxycBW_2nrImUUYAoZhQWkfydGhjS6Yd9W2jXkdLs-9QsNVlMiEzpS2IZoDrSMpZ4Pt4u7Wqzu) **

No more government shrinkage.
No more tax cuts.
No more border enforcement measures. _

I didn’t fight every single day of 2023 and 2024 to win a Senate seat against the most endangered Senate Democrat, only to watch us lose our precious majority because Democrats motivate their voters through lies and hatred of everything we’re doing to make America a better place for everyone.

clean_body: The work we are doing in the Senate is too important to stop - but our majority is in grave peril. | Fellow Conservative, I’m not writing you today to alarm you, but rather to help you understand how precarious our current situation is. During the 2024 campaign, your hard-earned dollars propelled us to victory, capturing not only the House, but the Senate and the White House. And I believe that the last twelve months have been among the most productive in Washington in DECADES. But if polls are to be believed, then that productivity, our majority, and perhaps even the future of our Republic as we know it today are in danger. There is no way to put this other than to deliver the bad news outright: Democrats have extended their lead over Republicans by 14 points on the generic ballot. If you’ll recall, I only won my seat in Montana by a little more than 7.5%, and in Texas, my friend Sen. Ted Cruz won his race by just over 9%. Hate is a powerful motivator, and Democrats abhor President Trump and all those who stand alongside him. But there is still time. No more government shrinkage. No more tax cuts. No more border enforcement measures. I didn’t fight every single day of 2023 and 2024 to win a Senate seat against the most endangered Senate Democrat, only to watch us lose our precious majority because Democrats motivate their voters through lies and hatred of everything we’re doing to make America a better place for everyone. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy U.S. Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124524828/598884096/556305950?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_ChallengingRS_260201_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI4YzgyMC1jYWZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B0FecVLjnGe_1lyCzwsH23t9JOWzRgcG5dDuHZKpmLw=) I'll be honest with you, Derek.

**This is one of the most challenging moments I’ve seen in my time in public service:**
* A Republican party that cruelly cut health care from millions of Americans to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest few.

* Our secretary of defense made us all less safe by playing fast and loose with classified information.

* And the president — who ran on lowering costs — continues to fire up trade wars that make all of our costs go way, way up.

In 2025, we had to play a lot of defense. I voted against every Trump-Republican budget while fighting to extend the Obamacare tax credits. I also worked to hold this administration accountable for serious national security failures – from SignalGate to the influence of political extremists like Laura Loomer over foreign policy decisions.

**Now that we’re in 2026 and the midterm elections are here, we have a chance to go on offense.**

We’ve got to win big and elect leaders who prioritize accountability and transparency over blind loyalty to a political party or president.

And we don’t have a minute to waste. That’s why I’m asking people like you – who care deeply about our democracy and the future of our country – to join me in this fight today.

name: Alex Mealer for Congress
subject: TX-09 | Gaining Speed – Only 16 Days Until Early Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandra del Moral Mealer for CongressAlexandra MealerP
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://alexandramealer.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bd11eef88d4ef35610a23966&id=a3e1eac8ad&e=2f22037b53)
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alexandramealer/tx-09-gaining-speed-only-16-days-until-early-voting?e=2f22037b53)
---
| | Friends,
We are TEXANS, and that means we lead from the front. For so long, Texans have supported Republicans across the country, and this election cycle, we turn inwards and focus on the next generation to represent our great state in Congress.
At least 25% of the Texas Congressional delegation is departing Congress (6 Rs / 3 Ds) at the end of this term – in addition to several serious primary challenges and newly drawn lean-Republican seats like TX-09.
With such unprecedented turnover, the shape of our Texas delegation will be significantly transformed for years to come. As voters continue to weigh candidates’ records and rhetoric, another question to consider is: Will we rebuild our bench with America First leaders that can restore the power & prestige that Texas (the largest Republican delegation) has long enjoyed? Or will the significant departures continue to weaken the Texas delegation and relegate our role to followers of other state delegations?
I firmly believe I have the right skillset and work ethic to help codify President Trump’s America First Agenda and to strengthen the power and influence of our Texas delegation.
This week, we were busy on the campaign trail and were honored to have a rally hosted by the Pasadena Police Officers Union and the Deer Park Police Association with special guests, our very own Congressman Brian Babin and steadfast conservative Congressman Jim Jordan.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, We are TEXANS, and that means we lead from the front. For so long, Texans have supported Republicans across the country, and this election cycle, we turn inwards and focus on the next generation to represent our great state in Congress. At least 25% of the Texas Congressional delegation is departing Congress (6 Rs / 3 Ds) at the end of this term – in addition to several serious primary challenges and newly drawn lean-Republican seats like TX-09. With such unprecedented turnover, the shape of our Texas delegation will be significantly transformed for years to come. As voters continue to weigh candidates’ records and rhetoric, another question to consider is: Will we rebuild our bench with America First leaders that can restore the power & prestige that Texas (the largest Republican delegation) has long enjoyed? Or will the significant departures continue to weaken the Texas delegation and relegate our role to followers of other state delegations? I firmly believe I have the right skillset and work ethic to help codify President Trump’s America First Agenda and to strengthen the power and influence of our Texas delegation. This week, we were busy on the campaign trail and were honored to have a rally hosted by the Pasadena Police Officers Union and the Deer Park Police Association with special guests, our very own Congressman Brian Babin and steadfast conservative Congressman Jim Jordan. | | | Early voting starts February 17th. name: Chris Pappas
subject: Breaking news out of NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This changes everything.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4910%2E582294%2EgyfXy9)
This changes everything:
**Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent John Sununu, in an incredible shake-up to our race for Senate.**
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260201_2.IRl3Et&refcode=em20260201-2&t=2&akid=4910%2E582294%2EgyfXy9)
**[Rush $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260201_2.IRl3Et&amount=5&refcode=em20260201-2&t=3&akid=4910%2E582294%2EgyfXy9)**
Trump said that Sununu has his **“complete and total endorsement”** -- and that will come with a tidal wave of Republican spending to try to flip this Senate seat.
**[I’m counting on the help of this grassroots team to fight back. If you were waiting for a sign to step up and join our movement, this is it. Please chip in to help us stand up to Trump’s hand-picked candidate today.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260201_2.IRl3Et&refcode=em20260201-2&t=4&akid=4910%2E582294%2EgyfXy9)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260201_2.IRl3Et&amount=5&refcode=em20260201-2&t=23&akid=4910%2E582294%2EgyfXy9)**
It couldn’t be clearer: John Sununu claims to be an independent voice, but his loyalty lies with the MAGA movement. Trump, national Republicans, corporate PACs, and right-wing billionaires are all powering his campaign to flip New Hampshire red.
But we have something even more powerful: **thousands of supporters coming together to prove that New Hampshire’s Senate seat is not for sale.**
**[I have to ask again: Will you rush a donation to stop Sununu and defend New Hampshire’s Senate seat right now?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260201_2.IRl3Et&refcode=em20260201-2&t=24&akid=4910%2E582294%2EgyfXy9)**
Thank you,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260201-2&t=25&refcode2=4910_582294_gyfXy9&akid=4910%2E582294%2EgyfXy9)**

name: Joseph Bentivegna from Dr. Joe Bentivegna's Views
subject: Fairfield’s Snub of Education Secretary Linda McMahon Was Low Class
body:
Our Local Leaders Should Be Teaching Our Children Basic Manners

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..oa4s776N9ULHKIvfnTlzgQjw15t4gf7epAtqybmiYzg?) for more
---
# [Fairfield's Snub of Education Secretary Linda McMahon Was Low Class](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=186563309&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NTYzMzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3Njk5OTU1MTUsImV4cCI6MTc3MjU4NzUxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.77Hu5CVRo8LE_EjAXZw7XIsxLK3P0KN3en5J5Jsiksk)
### Our Local Leaders Should Be Teaching Our Children Basic Manners
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Feb 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=186563309&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NTYzMzA5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2OTk5NTUxNSwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNTg3NTE1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.XXQIWH-b5YPUsR81vXwf-R4s_YCNLCbrbKUOfocqxSU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=186563309&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NTYzMzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3Njk5OTU1MTUsImV4cCI6MTc3MjU4NzUxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.77Hu5CVRo8LE_EjAXZw7XIsxLK3P0KN3en5J5Jsiksk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=186563309&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NTYzMzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3Njk5OTU1MTUsImV4cCI6MTc3MjU4NzUxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.77Hu5CVRo8LE_EjAXZw7XIsxLK3P0KN3en5J5Jsiksk)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvamZiZW50aXZlZ25hL3AvZmFpcmZpZWxkcy1zbnViLW9mLWVkdWNhdGlvbi1zZWNyZXRhcnk_.QBV6PWup7H-e569cBk9164Sa8ZpDa33JzpWXU-qxZY4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/fairfields-snub-of-education-secretary?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

February 1, 2026
Principal Christine Booth of McKinley Elementary School in Fairfield, Connecticut, was so over the moon that Education Secretary Linda McMahon was visiting her school that she sent the [following email](https://substack.com/redirect/0fc94f49-3c3e-488e-992d-b9c56a5ccb9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the students' parents:

"We are thrilled to share some exciting news! This Friday, McKinley Elementary School will welcome a very special guest, U.S. Secretary of Education Linda McMahon, as part of the History Rocks! Tour, a national program connected to the U.S. Department of Education's America 250 initiative celebrating our nation's upcoming 250th birthday."
But what was supposed to be an educational and historic event for the children was cancelled. And now it has became such an embarrassment to Fairfield that even liberal journalist Dan Haar - no fan of Donald Trump or Linda McMahon - [called the incident](https://substack.com/redirect/000444c2-a594-455b-beb1-d251dced35f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "a rude setback to liberal education and values."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e4084701-2d56-4041-8b4d-895a2c264fce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Education Secretary Linda McMahon
And what happened was truly rude, disgusting and low class. Fairfield's Angry White Female Liberals (AWFULs according to the psephologists) - the most pampered demographic in human history - started complaining.
One Democratic member of the Fairfield Representative Town Meeting, [Tracy Rodriguez stated:](https://substack.com/redirect/0fc94f49-3c3e-488e-992d-b9c56a5ccb9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I think it's completely inappropriate to have someone from the Trump administration speaking directly to our children, and in light of what's happening in our country right now, I personally felt that the safety of our students and staff was not being considered."
But how was the safety of the students and staff being threatened? Was Ms. McMahon planning to bring Stone Cold Steve Austin and The Rock from the WWE (World Wrestling Entertainment) and have them throw the students around?
Perhaps she disagreed with Ms. McMahon's policies. But what are they?
As Ms. McMahon points out, the Department of Education is a bloated bureaucracy that doesn't educate a single child. Since its inception during the Carter administration, the scores of students, especially minorities, have plummeted.
Ms. McMahon is a strong proponent of school vouchers so that minority students are not forced to attend substandard schools. Affluent white liberals in towns like Fairfield Connecticut fight this tooth and nail so their school systems remain lily white. That is why Connecticut's schools are among the [most segregated](https://substack.com/redirect/39e6989a-22ae-4bb7-b7a5-f1f4e45d371e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the country and there is a huge disparity in property values between towns like Fairfield and Bridgeport.
Ms. McMahon believes that students should pay back their student loans. But liberal educated women look down their noses at the women who did not attend college, and see no problem with taxing hairdressers, cafeteria workers and nannies to bail out these freeloaders.
But this does not mean that Fairfield's children did not get some good lessons from this incident.

Lesson #1. Spineless obsequiousness is justified when it is a good economic move. And there is no better teacher than Fairfield School Superintendent Michael Testini. All it took was a few complaints to get him to cave like a sack of potatoes and heave Ms. McMahon overboard. And when you're [raking in $291,000 a year](https://substack.com/redirect/23872180-e324-41c4-a9da-3f1500747c5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), why rock the boat, especially when your final pension is calculated on the average of your last three years' salary. In a few years, Mr. Testini could be sipping margaritas on Delray Beach with a fat six-figure pension that increases every year with inflation, not to mention Cadillac health insurance that is also included. And no one will remember or even care about this ugly incident.
So pay attention boys and girls. Mastering this concept is much better than knowing how to figure out the volume of a conic sections.
Lesson #2. Politicians lie. Fairfield Representative Jennifer Leeper while gloating over the dumping of Ms. McMahon [stated](https://substack.com/redirect/98a16d87-7245-416b-bb04-b978cc486de0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
"Moreover, our McKinley community is our most international community and we heard loud and clear given the extremely aggressive ICE tactics, people did not feel safe having their child attend school with a senior member of this administration."

This is utter nonsense. Who did she hear this from? How many illegal immigrants can afford to live in Fairfield?
There is not a scintilla of evidence that Ms. McMahon was going to bring members of ICE into the school and start deporting illegal immigrant students. Besides, the only time Representative Leeper has contact with illegal immigrants is when they are wearing leaf blowers in her tony neighborhood or serving her perfectly chilled chardonnay in one of Fairfield's posh restaurants.
But Ms. McMahon may have the last laugh. Children become teenagers and teenagers like to rebel, especially since they have not learned yet that hypocrisy is the norm.

Ari Fleischer, George W. Bush's Press Secretary, grew up in a liberal New York Democratic family. When his father was asked how Ari became a Republican he responded (and I paraphrase): "Most children rebel by growing their hair long and wearing funny clothes. Ari rebelled by becoming a Republican."
Maybe some of Fairfield's children will outrage their parents by donning MAGA hats in a few years. But hopefully none will adopt their parents' low-class manners.

body:

| Friend,

Barack Obama just made a crucial mistake.
---

---|---|---
This episode examines the growing problem of influence without responsibility in conservative media, using Candace Owens as a case study. After a viral post sparked over 100,000 impressions and intense backlash, Kathy Barnette breaks down how conspiracy thinking, grievance culture, and moral permission slips are radicalizing parts of the Right.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rYXRoeWJhcm5ldHRlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.jQkQUngL9QrMZD6gfA0VXrKkGkSvbaZQgfHL-4CLZvY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186565087)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2fc39dfe-6dc5-429a-afd6-990de7e6e1ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The First Amendment protects Americans from government censorship - not from basic laws, consent, or common sense.

Freedom of the Press does not grant access to private property, does not override freedom of religion, and does not allow reporters to disrupt worship services.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rYXRoeWJhcm5ldHRlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.jQkQUngL9QrMZD6gfA0VXrKkGkSvbaZQgfHL-4CLZvY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186565087)

When constitutional rights are misused as weapons, freedom erodes for everyone. Let's set the record straight.

clean_body: When Influence Turns Into Control | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more When Influence Turns Into Control Feb 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- This episode examines the growing problem of influence without responsibility in conservative media, using Candace Owens as a case study. After a viral post sparked over 100,000 impressions and intense backlash, Kathy Barnette breaks down how conspiracy thinking, grievance culture, and moral permission slips are radicalizing parts of the Right. | | ---|---|--- The First Amendment protects Americans from government censorship - not from basic laws, consent, or common sense. Freedom of the Press does not grant access to private property, does not override freedom of religion, and does not allow reporters to disrupt worship services. When constitutional rights are misused as weapons, freedom erodes for everyone. Let's set the record straight. | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Kathy Barnette Seed & Roots Initiatives, P.O. Box 659 Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006 ? ?

name: Team JanePAC
subject: Tell Congress: Keep "forever chemicals" out of our food.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526764/598928403/1328794144?refcode=ea.e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ODAwN2NkLWRlZmYtZjAxMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P35YvvhACHx4H3g2lhUcpagdaZ6mYY-6tLzAqyt41GY=&emci=81413e6b-b9f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi Team, JanePAC Advocacy Team here. We’re reaching out with a quick update and an important request. The EPA recently approved two new pesticides containing PFAS (aka “forever chemicals”) for use on food crops and turf. PFAS don’t break down in the environment, and exposure has been linked to serious harms including cancer, immune suppression, and reproductive and developmental impacts. **[That’s why we need supporters like you to join our campaign by sending letters to key government officials who have the power to rein in PFAS use before it’s too late. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526765/598928404/-70060175?source=direct_link&&refcode=ea.e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ODAwN2NkLWRlZmYtZjAxMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P35YvvhACHx4H3g2lhUcpagdaZ6mYY-6tLzAqyt41GY=&emci=81413e6b-b9f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=4823105)** We need the EPA, Congress and other key administration officials to know that we expect more from them when it comes to protecting our water, food and health from dangerous pollutants like PFAS. Will you send a letter? | [CLICK HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526766/598928405/-70060175?source=direct_link&&refcode=ea.e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ODAwN2NkLWRlZmYtZjAxMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P35YvvhACHx4H3g2lhUcpagdaZ6mYY-6tLzAqyt41GY=&emci=81413e6b-b9f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=e48007cd-deff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=4823105)

Thanks for taking action,
— Team JanePAC

clean_body: | Hi Team, JanePAC Advocacy Team here. We’re reaching out with a quick update and an important request. The EPA recently approved two new pesticides containing PFAS (aka “forever chemicals”) for use on food crops and turf. PFAS don’t break down in the environment, and exposure has been linked to serious harms including cancer, immune suppression, and reproductive and developmental impacts. We need the EPA, Congress and other key administration officials to know that we expect more from them when it comes to protecting our water, food and health from dangerous pollutants like PFAS. Will you send a letter? | Thanks for taking action, — Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

**Boysko Bulletin: Week Three Report From Richmond**
---
Dear Peter, First of all, I hope that you and your loved ones are safe and managing this extremely cold weather and ice safely. Work in the Senate of Virginia continues. So far, four of my bills have been approved by the Senate and are on their way for consideration in the House. My Senate colleagues and I have been focusing on a suite of bills that address affordability on many levels. My bill, [SB 2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526816/598928600/-1030786773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk2ZGIwNGItZTJmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XGcTlAZQsWaQvYi8y6TaYuTOlzL8xeyLQSUqSbpPUjE=&emci=038d35cc-60fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=796db04b-e2ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=22486556), that would create a Paid Family and Medical Leave insurance program in Virginia is up in committee on Monday. I have been working on this policy for close to a decade. All people should have the ability to take the time needed to care for themselves and their loved ones when welcoming a baby, or care for themselves or loved ones when a devastating illness occurs, without going bankrupt. On the Senate Courts of Justice Committee, we considered many gun safety bills presented by my colleagues this past week. These proposals aimed to strengthen protections across the Commonwealth, including measures requiring safety standards within the firearm industry, protecting domestic abuse victims, and expanding firearm violence intervention and prevention resources. My bill, [SB 348](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526817/598928601/-1451962928?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk2ZGIwNGItZTJmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XGcTlAZQsWaQvYi8y6TaYuTOlzL8xeyLQSUqSbpPUjE=&emci=038d35cc-60fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=796db04b-e2ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=22486556) on safe gun storage that has passed numerous times in the Senate over the past four years and was vetoed twice by former Governor Youngkin would require any person who possesses a firearm in a residence where they know a minor or a person prohibited by law from possessing a firearm is present to store both the firearm and its ammunition in a locked container, compartment, or cabinet that is inaccessible to that individual. Gun violence is the number one cause of death in children, both in Virginia and across the nation. Locking up your guns is a common-sense way to help prevent unintentional deaths, suicide, and intentional shootings. It has passed the Senate Courts Committee and has been reported to the Finance Committee for further consideration. And finally, I am thrilled to share that on February 2nd, around 3:00 PM, the Buddhist monks will be stopping in Richmond to greet the community as they continue their Walk for Peace to Washington, D.C. This inspiring journey promotes compassion, unity, and mindfulness, while also advocating for Buddha’s Birthday to be recognized as a U.S. federal holiday. The Walk for Peace has drawn large crowds and national attention for its powerful message of peace and healing. My husband and I practice Vipassana meditation daily and have found the practice to be quite beneficial. In recognition of this meaningful effort, I am sponsoring [SR 18](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526818/598928602/1489048410?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk2ZGIwNGItZTJmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XGcTlAZQsWaQvYi8y6TaYuTOlzL8xeyLQSUqSbpPUjE=&emci=038d35cc-60fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=796db04b-e2ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=22486556), commending the Walk for Peace for serving as a powerful reminder that peace begins within each individual and radiates outward to families, communities, and nations, including those with whom we disagree. It embodies the timeless values of the Buddhist tradition—wisdom, compassion, and mindfulness—while also honoring deeply held American principles of unity, personal responsibility, and mutual respect. Kindest regards,
---

Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) **Photo Gallery**

**Fight Against The Tysons Casino ** For the third year in a row, a [Tysons Casino bill](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526848/598928632/-1821246626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk2ZGIwNGItZTJmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XGcTlAZQsWaQvYi8y6TaYuTOlzL8xeyLQSUqSbpPUjE=&emci=038d35cc-60fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=796db04b-e2ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=22486556) has been introduced into the Virginia Senate. The bill reported from the Senate General Laws and Technology committee and has been rereferred to the Senate Finance and Appropriations (11‐Y 4‐N). I vehemently oppose SB 756, and will continue to proudly stand up for my constituents in the fight against it. I have heard from thousands of you in our community, listened to your concerns, and agree that a casino has no place in Tysons Corner. As the session continues, I will do everything in my power to kill this bill once and for all. This is not a partisan issue. The voters and residents of Fairfax county have overwhelmingly come out against this plan, and are deeply concerned about the ramifications of what a casino in Tysons Corner would mean. In every other case, casino proposals have been brought to the General Assembly at the specific request of the local government representing that community. In fact, [this past December the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors voted to oppose a casino in Tysons](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526849/598928633/1657244779?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk2ZGIwNGItZTJmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XGcTlAZQsWaQvYi8y6TaYuTOlzL8xeyLQSUqSbpPUjE=&emci=038d35cc-60fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=796db04b-e2ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=22486556). All of us must continue to work together to fight for our values because there is so much at stake. If you would like to get involved further in stopping the casino, you can visit the [No Fairfax Casino](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124526850/598928634/-833915805?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk2ZGIwNGItZTJmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XGcTlAZQsWaQvYi8y6TaYuTOlzL8xeyLQSUqSbpPUjE=&emci=038d35cc-60fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=796db04b-e2ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=22486556) site and find opportunities to stay involved.

This Monday, February 2, the monks from the **Huong Dao Vipassana Bhavana Center** who have been walking since October 26, 2025 from Texas headed for Washington, DC. will be in Richmond. Senator Boysko has a commendation for them honoring their efforts for peace. Their journey will span approximately 2,300 miles, nearly 20–23 miles per day. Each step is taken with mindfulness, carrying a message of harmony, kindness, and resilience.

Along the way, they have been provided shelter and food by many, regardless of background or belief. They have walked through rain and snow and ice. We have found them shelter and food in Richmond. With the compassion of others, The Walk for Peace can unfold with dignity and become a meaningful contribution to all who seek peace.

clean_body: | | | Boysko Bulletin: Week Three Report From Richmond Dear Peter, First of all, I hope that you and your loved ones are safe and managing this extremely cold weather and ice safely. Work in the Senate of Virginia continues. So far, four of my bills have been approved by the Senate and are on their way for consideration in the House. My Senate colleagues and I have been focusing on a suite of bills that address affordability on many levels. My bill, , that would create a Paid Family and Medical Leave insurance program in Virginia is up in committee on Monday. I have been working on this policy for close to a decade. All people should have the ability to take the time needed to care for themselves and their loved ones when welcoming a baby, or care for themselves or loved ones when a devastating illness occurs, without going bankrupt. On the Senate Courts of Justice Committee, we considered many gun safety bills presented by my colleagues this past week. These proposals aimed to strengthen protections across the Commonwealth, including measures requiring safety standards within the firearm industry, protecting domestic abuse victims, and expanding firearm violence intervention and prevention resources. My bill, on safe gun storage that has passed numerous times in the Senate over the past four years and was vetoed twice by former Governor Youngkin would require any person who possesses a firearm in a residence where they know a minor or a person prohibited by law from possessing a firearm is present to store both the firearm and its ammunition in a locked container, compartment, or cabinet that is inaccessible to that individual. Gun violence is the number one cause of death in children, both in Virginia and across the nation. Locking up your guns is a common-sense way to help prevent unintentional deaths, suicide, and intentional shootings. It has passed the Senate Courts Committee and has been reported to the Finance Committee for further consideration. And finally, I am thrilled to share that on February 2nd, around 3:00 PM, the Buddhist monks will be stopping in Richmond to greet the community as they continue their Walk for Peace to Washington, D.C. This inspiring journey promotes compassion, unity, and mindfulness, while also advocating for Buddha’s Birthday to be recognized as a U.S. federal holiday. The Walk for Peace has drawn large crowds and national attention for its powerful message of peace and healing. My husband and I practice Vipassana meditation daily and have found the practice to be quite beneficial. In recognition of this meaningful effort, I am sponsoring , commending the Walk for Peace for serving as a powerful reminder that peace begins within each individual and radiates outward to families, communities, and nations, including those with whom we disagree. It embodies the timeless values of the Buddhist tradition—wisdom, compassion, and mindfulness—while also honoring deeply held American principles of unity, personal responsibility, and mutual respect. Kindest regards, Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) Photo Gallery Senator Boysko met with constituents and advocates in her Richmond office this week Some of Senator Boysko's bills passed in committee and on the floor this week! Each bill is heard in a committee, sometimes a subcommittee first, and then if it passes, on the Senate Floor. If the bill passes the Senate, it moves to the House of Delegates. Legislative Updates You can follow my legislation on \- this is . I’ve added the status of my legislative slate below. Please reach out if you are interested in a particular bill. We take testimony in committees from the public. I look forward to seeing many of you in Richmond. Please reach out to me by email at SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov if you would like to discuss my legislation or ask that I support other legislation. The bill reported from the Senate General Laws and Technology committee and has been rereferred to the Senate Finance and Appropriations (11‐Y 4‐N). I vehemently oppose SB 756, and will continue to proudly stand up for my constituents in the fight against it. I have heard from thousands of you in our community, listened to your concerns, and agree that a casino has no place in Tysons Corner. As the session continues, I will do everything in my power to kill this bill once and for all. This is not a partisan issue. The voters and residents of Fairfax county have overwhelmingly come out against this plan, and are deeply concerned about the ramifications of what a casino in Tysons Corner would mean. In every other case, casino proposals have been brought to the General Assembly at the specific request of the local government representing that community. In fact, . subject: Major update on a must-win race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

We have a major update on a must-win Senate race that we cannot afford for you to ignore.

name: Rose For Congress
subject: TOMORROW: Join Rose for our Volunteer Kickoff!
body:
Meet the team and learn exactly how you can help us win.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |
# TOMORROW: Join Rose for our Volunteer Kickoff!
---
| | Hi Friends,
This is a quick reminder that our [Volunteer Kickoff is happening tomorrow night](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=3aaab9050a&e=8c53948e4c)! As we approach the critical February 4th signature deadline, now is the perfect time to plug in. This kickoff is the best way to get briefed on our strategy for the 2026 cycle and find out how you can help Rose bring the "People, Peace, Planet" message to every corner of CA-02.

* **What:** Volunteer kickoff
* **When:** Monday, February 2nd at 6pm PST
* **Where:** Zoom

---
| [RSVP to Monday’s Kickoff Zoom](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=9ddf3af6c8&e=8c53948e4c)
---
| | If you can’t make it tomorrow—or if you just want more time to chat—don't forget we are launching our weekly "Tuesday Tea" the very next day. This is your chance to talk directly with Rose about the issues that matter most to you.

* **What:** Tuesday Tea “office hours”
* **When:** Every Tuesday, starting this Tuesday, February 3rd at 5pm PST
* **Where:** Zoom

---
| [RSVP to Tuesday Tea](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=ded99fce4d&e=8c53948e4c)
---
| | Our movement is powered by people, not corporate PACs. We can’t do this work without you, and we’re excited to see you on Zoom tomorrow evening!
Onward,The Rose for Congress Team
[Rose for Congress](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=adfcaff04f&e=8c53948e4c)

---
| | | | | [](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=fc1bc9cb42&e=8c53948e4c)

name: Parler Sponsor
subject: How Major Institutions Are Positioning Gold In 2026
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Allegiance Gold | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) | **[You Assume Your Bank Account is Yours - Until It Isn't.
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)**Your bank doesn't need your permission to freeze or seize funds during **"financial stress."** When that happens, access disappears first and explanations come later. [**Learn More**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---|---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) | **[Are You Making the #1 RMD Mistake?
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)**Most retirees take Required Minimum Distributions in cash. That means more taxes for Washington - and **less for you.** But IRS Code 408(m)(3) gives you another option.[**How To Avoid The RMD Trap**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) | **[Silver Is Hitting Record Highs
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)**Silver prices are surging - and most investors still don't understand why. This free e-book, **The Silver Opportunity,** explains what could come next. [**Download**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
* * *
**[You’re Already Ahead of the Crowd...](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)** **The Question Is How Far** You wouldn’t be here if you hadn’t already noticed it. Something doesn’t feel right. Gold isn’t about headlines or hype anymore — It’s about **positioning ahead of systemic shifts** that almost never come with warnings. And right now, something meaningful is happening beneath the surface. While everyday investors argue over short-term price moves, **[institutions are quietly adjusting their exposure.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)** Central banks. Funds. Sovereign entities. They don’t broadcast their moves. They position first — and explain later. Here’s the problem most people don’t realize until it’s too late: Almost everything written for retail investors is **noise.** Recycled talking points. Oversimplified charts. Emotion-driven predictions designed to keep attention — not build understanding. Very little explains how serious capital is actually thinking about gold heading into **2026.** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) Even less explains **why that thinking is changing now.** That’s exactly why this guide exists. It doesn’t speculate. It doesn’t predict prices. It doesn’t sell urgency. Instead, it breaks down:
* How institutional allocation toward gold is shifting
* What central banks are doing differently with reserves
* The macro pressures influencing long-term demand
* What large capital is quietly preparing for — not promoting

This isn’t about trying to time a move. It’s about **[not being the last to understand it.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)** And this guide isn’t meant for everyone. It's for people who:
* Value insight over commentary
* Prefer preparation over reaction
* Want clarity before decisions are forced on them

If you believe gold plays a role in the next phase of the global financial system, you owe it to yourself to understand how institutions are approaching **[2026 — before their positioning becomes obvious in hindsight.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)** Access the free guide and review the information for yourself. At the very least — you deserve **clarity instead of noise.** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Books, not bombs.
body:
This is how we tackle the root causes of poor public education.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00167Yqquf0US-0YjkMh5Y13s73qE6HDGz2hJBhHEjGgKz7PRpt-iTeTNrXaz-qilArtRHDoi599yEbzKDHFEx9k6XxXCxz1h2LTIJ9CzqS4TTba4uVYeYD1PpW5GxE_ShRgJ_N2lxY6Lf-_K3TIczXrtyU4V0qpRR0kMxJhC2trPeLsJ7AjUOkPIn2xqKIkbOwls85rgJ-s-sztLljFtbTuYXr9JlMAHgEDjYcYgsgH7o=&c=7ejHU-O-jAZ9byh2UdTXKadjgkqhf9Yg9DnnIpL3uaFOzOOf94tjOw==&ch=2nChRZa1kulH_bKx44fe4wqzKudb9M6SyI1FV92z_NSDg7tVNGYbBQ==)
---
|
Peter,
Right now, the United States spends $850 billion every year on the military-- while our kids' schools are left scrambling for resources. As Trump slashes education funding and pushes to dismantle the Department of Education, states are being forced to hike property taxes just to fill the gap.
Here in Illinois, we have the highest property taxes in the country -- and still, only 1 in 4 fourth graders are meeting reading standards. In wealthier zip codes, students see far better results, while kids in working-class and low-income communities are left behind. A child's zip code shouldn't determine whether they get a good education. But right now, it does.
That's why when I get to Congress, I'll introduce the Books Not Bombs Act.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00167Yqquf0US-0YjkMh5Y13s73qE6HDGz2hJBhHEjGgKz7PRpt-iTeTNrXaz-qilArtRHDoi599yEbzKDHFEx9k6XxXCxz1h2LTIJ9CzqS4TTba4uVYeYD1PpW5GxE_ShRgJ_N2lxY6Lf-_K3TIczXrtyU4V0qpRR0kMxJhC2trPeLsJ7AjUOkPIn2xqKIkbOwls85rgJ-s-sztLljFtbTuTTBsVedoMTrfysmYe9uteM=&c=7ejHU-O-jAZ9byh2UdTXKadjgkqhf9Yg9DnnIpL3uaFOzOOf94tjOw==&ch=2nChRZa1kulH_bKx44fe4wqzKudb9M6SyI1FV92z_NSDg7tVNGYbBQ==)
---
|
This bill will shift just 1.5% of the Pentagon's budget into public education. That small reallocation would mean a 10% increase in funding for our schools -- enough to ensure every child gets the education they deserve while driving down property taxes and making housing more affordable for homeowners and renters alike.
This is how we tackle the root causes of poor public education while making life more affordable for working people. This is why Congress needs more school board members in the fight -- people like me, who have seen firsthand how broken our system is and who know how to fix it.
[But I can't do it without you. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters -- not billionaires, not defense contractors. If you believe we need to invest in books, not bombs, can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you spare to send someone with public education experience to Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00167Yqquf0US-0YjkMh5Y13s73qE6HDGz2hJBhHEjGgKz7PRpt-iTeTNrXaz-qilArOCof2cwVhsK7T1OWEzM_Pzx3GE3jItmgFthUE5bDND919XGOYEVG7BM-vFUrcDov9Wy85IyPwPUoOMA4joelhOkL137fQAjBOzC8A6XMirLHcZvKJoFOhrCwq6ZIcBa-hubVETID0g987yGnZHo2UoTKjWCFmLqxozuDoppYY9NyK7UTcfZJ-A==&c=7ejHU-O-jAZ9byh2UdTXKadjgkqhf9Yg9DnnIpL3uaFOzOOf94tjOw==&ch=2nChRZa1kulH_bKx44fe4wqzKudb9M6SyI1FV92z_NSDg7tVNGYbBQ==)

name: INGOP
subject: Celebrating School Choice Week and Job Wins
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Dear Hoosier Republicans, No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-e-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-ty/) _**Celebrating School Choice Week and Job Wins**_ Dear Hoosier Republicans,Our party has long fought to ensure parents, not bureaucrats, are in charge of our children's education. With universal school choice now the law of the land, unprecedented literacy scores and graduation rates, increased teacher pay, and accountability restored in our schools, we have a whole lot to celebrate this School Choice Week. At the same time, record participation in Career and Technical Education is enabling more Hoosier students to graduate with valuable skills, credentials, and a clear path forward. Whether our students choose to start college, serve in the armed services, or go straight into the workforce, we are working hard to ensure they are prepared for their future.This same entrepreneurial Republican leadership is what has enabled Indiana to outpace our neighbors in job and wage growth, and we remain laser-focused on incentivizing businesses to come to our state and invest in their employees once they're here. Programs like Power Up Indiana are enabling Hoosiers to step into higher-paying, in-demand careers, while businesses strengthen their workforces and stay competitive. Thanks to our region-led economic model, we are lifting up communities across Indiana, and job creators have taken notice.In 2026, our goal is simple: build on what's working, keep education focused on students and parents, and keep Indiana growing as the Midwest's engine for jobs, wages, and opportunity.As always, thank you for being a part of our team, and please feel free to reach out if there's any way I can be of assistance.Yours in service, Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman _**Governor Braun's Power Up Initiative Strengthens Hoosier Workforce**_ Governor Braun highlighted the impact of Power Up Indiana, pointing to success stories from employers and Hoosier workers across the state. The initiative is helping businesses of all sizes invest in their employees, raise wages, and build a more competitive talent pipeline for the future."Power Up Indiana is proving that workforce development isn't just good for business - it's life-changing for Hoosiers and their families. We're proud to celebrate these success stories and the employers who are shaping a future where every Hoosier has the opportunity to build a rewarding career right here in our state." \- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-r/) _**Gov. Mike Braun Celebrates Impact of Indiana's Career and Technical Education Programs as Pathway to Well-Paying Jobs**_ At a Statehouse proclamation signing declaring February 2026 as Career and Technical Education Month, Governor Braun and Secretary of Education Dr. Katie Jenner celebrated record participation in CTE, highlighting the progress the programs have made in equipping students with in-demand skills and credentials that prepare them for high-wage careers and a strong start after graduation."Career and Technical Education prepares Hoosier students for the most in-demand careers that power our economy. Our North Star is more jobs and higher wages, and career and technical training is a big part of getting there. Indiana's CTE programs are giving students transferable skills and a clear pathway to success after graduation." \- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-y/) _**Gov. Mike Braun Welcomes John Deere Expansion to Northwest Indiana, 150 New Hoosier Jobs**_ Governor Mike Braun announced that John Deere will invest $125 million to build a state-of-the-art 1.2 million-square-foot distribution center in Lake County, creating approximately 150 above-average-wage jobs in northwest Indiana."_Our state's location as the Crossroads of America makes it the ideal destination for companies of all sizes to serve customers across the U.S. and around the world. __John Deere 's expansion to Indiana is a testament to our business-first environment, our robust manufacturing sector, and our strong pipeline of skilled talent._"\- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-j/) **Congress of Counties 2026** [Click Here for More Information](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-t/) [Click Here to Register](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-i/) _**Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Spring Semester**_ **📱 _News You Can Use_ ** **Governor Mike Braun**[commended](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-d/) the coordinated response of first responders and state agencies in response to this week's extreme weather, saying, "I want to thank our first responders, emergency responders, snowplow operators, Indiana National Guardsmen and volunteers who selflessly dedicated these last 72 hours to the public safety of our state."**Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith** [spoke](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-h/) at the Indiana March for Life, calling on Hoosiers across the state to continue standing up for the sanctity of life.**Secretary Diego Morales**[continued](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-k/) his series highlighting election security reforms, saying, "Voter ID protects election integrity, and I will always stand up for our strong voter ID laws--here at home and across the nation."**Treasurer Daniel Elliott**[celebrated](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-u/) school choice week, saying, "Every student learns differently, and allowing them to find the right learning environment can unlock every child's potential."**Attorney General Todd Rokita **[commended](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-o/) his appeals team for ensuring a rapist who kidnapped a woman and kept her caged will stay behind bars, saying, "The details of this case are horrific and heart-breaking. I commend our team's hard work to ensure justice is done in grossly disturbing cases like this one and in every case our team works on behalf of victims and all Hoosiers."**Senator Todd Young **[introduced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-b/) legislation to promote U.S. sports diplomacy, saying, "Our bill will ensure the U.S. maximizes these moments to showcase American excellence, strengthen relationships with allies, and demonstrate that when America hosts the world, we do it better than anyone."**Senator Jim Banks **[celebrated](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-n/) the Senate HELP Committee's unanimous passage of his _Tyler's Law_ , which would direct HHS to issue guidance on requiring fentanyl testing for overdoses at hospitals. **Congressman Rudy Yakym **[voted](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-p/) to pass two commonsense, pro-family bills that support pregnant women and ensure all mothers are empowered to succeed.**Congressman Marlin Stutzman **[introduced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-x/) the _Chemical Abortion Awareness Act_ , which will create new requirements for communicating chemical abortion risks for providers who receive federal funds. This legislation came on the same day as thousands of American patriots flocked to Capitol Hill to stand up for the lives of the unborn.**Congressman Jim Baird **[supported](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-m/) the _Stop Citizenship Abuse and Misrepresentation (SCAM) Act_ , saying, "Becoming a naturalized American citizen is a privilege, not a right. We are uncovering just how many people have come to our country, hurt the American people, or exploited the benefits of citizenship for criminal activity. These people must be held accountable and removed if necessary."**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[testified](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-c/) before the House Rules Committee on their amendments to restore Delphi retirees' pensions and bring long-overdue justice to blue-collar workers who were wronged by the government for political reasons.**Congressman Jefferson Shreve **[introduced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-q/) the _In Good Standing Adoption Act_ to expand resources for mothers considering adoption and to help ensure children are placed safely and responsibly, saying, "Too many mothers are forced to rely on unreliable adoption information. This bill brings needed transparency by providing a clear, trustworthy list of licensed agencies -- protecting mothers and children."**Congressman Mark Messmer **[secured](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-a/) new funding for major projects in Indiana's 8th Congressional District, saying, "Federal funding for new infrastructure in Greene and Vanderburgh Counties, and investments in other priorities throughout southern Indiana, will benefit the needs of families in our IN-08 community for many years to come."**Congresswoman Erin Houchin** secured nearly $7.5 million for Indiana's 9th Congressional District, saying, "(This appropriations package) ensures Indiana's 9th District receives meaningful investments in infrastructure, public safety, and community development. I will continue working to make sure taxpayer dollars are spent wisely and that our district's needs remain a top priority." **_Upcoming Events_****January 29: [Fortville-McCordsville Republican Club Meeting](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-f/)****February 4:[Washington Township Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-z/)****February 7:[Pulaski County Lincoln Day](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-v/)****February 7:[Biscuits & Politics Legislative Breakfast](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-e/)****February 20: _[Congress of Counties 2026](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-s/)_****February 28: [Carroll County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-g/)****March 16: [Hamilton County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-w/)****March 31: ****[Hancock County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-yd/)****April 9: [Wells County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-yh/) ****April 10: [Dearborn County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-yk/)****April 17: [DeKalb County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-yu/)****April 27: [Adams County Republican Party Lincoln Day Gala](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-jl/)****June 19: _[Indiana Republican State Convention 2026](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-jr/)_** [Click Here to Learn more about Governor Braun's Administrative Orders, Policy Proposals, and Leadership Appointments](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-jy/) [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-jj/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-jt/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-ji/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-jd/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-jh/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-jk/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-ajlkdjt-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-tj) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-u-ajlkdjt-hhlljjcji-tt/)

| The Collagen Con | **We all just entered 2026, which _promises to be a year like no other._**
***
Today, we bring you a crucial alert from our great friends at [WealthResearchGroup.com](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D), one of the most important financial publications ever and a MUST-READ for any patriot who appreciates the Constitution and Bill of Rights. They also happened to call the silver BREAKOUT on their newsletter! Their [FLAGSHIP PORTFOLIO ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) is the one I look to for new ideas! Best yet, they've just laid out Trump's GENIUS European plan for you – [HERE!](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) ***
**The GOLDEN DOME is coming – check out the insane technology behind it[HERE!](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)**
***
I would say that experts across the industry _are unanimous_ : 2026 will mark _a pivotal shift_ as tightening supply collides with _tremendous demand growth._
**According to recent forecasts from Sprott Asset Management,_global uranium production is struggling to keep pace_ , with a major supply deficit accelerating into 2026.**
Worldwide production _met only 90% of demand_ in recent years, relying on dwindling stockpiles.
**The Trump administration has taken an _assertively pro-nuclear approach_ , pushing executive actions to _fast-track advanced reactors_ and endorsing large-scale initiatives aimed at _unlocking as much as $80 billion in new nuclear builds._**
***
**MEGA-ALERTS: This is Critical!** Our Research Says SILVER $85/ounce Imminent – [MUST-READ!](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) JD Vance and Donald Trump WAGE WAR on Europe – [MUST-DOWNLOAD!](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) The Golden Dome will make the USA the most powerful country in history – [CHECK OUT!](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) MAMDANI and NYC – The Real Threat is [THIS!](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) ***
Trump listens to the companies that need _ungodly quantities_ of energy for their AI facilities, so his policy support aligns perfectly with _surging electricity needs_ of tech giants like Microsoft, Amazon, and many others, which are _turning to nuclear power for reliable, carbon-free baseload energy_ to fuel hyperscale computing.
**What we saw in 2025 with _Rare Earth Minerals and with silver_ are not one-off events or isolated incidents. Whenever _China or its allies_ can disrupt global trade and _leverage their supply chain advantages to gain power_ , they might do it and the United States _currently produces very negligible amounts of uranium._**
Analysts from Citi and others project uranium prices climbing toward $100/lbs toward end of 2026, while other institutions have outlined higher-price scenarios under more supply-constrained assumptions.
__The U.S. nuclear energy sector relies heavily on imported uranium, with domestic mining providing only a small fraction (around 1-2%) of the ~50 million pounds needed annually.__
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) Courtesy: world-nuclear-news.org
**_Vanguard Mining Corp. (OTC: UUUFF)_ owns a uranium project in a jurisdiction that is very friendly to the Trump administration!**
**Vanguard Mining (OTC: UUUFF)** has strategically _built a diversified portfolio_ with uranium exposure, including the expansive _Yuty Prometeo_ Project in Paraguay, adjacent to established deposits.
**This could position Vanguard Mining to potentially benefit directly from the uranium Supercycle.**
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)

**_Vanguard Mining (OTC: UUUFF)_ genius lies in _its multi-commodity approach._ Beyond uranium, the company holds advanced projects in _lithium_ (including the recently reclaimed Pocitos 1 salar in Argentina) — along with gold at its Brussels Creek project, as well as _copper and molybdenum._**

name: The Flyover
subject: Shutdown Extended, AI Bots Talk to Each Other, and a Big Dog Show
body:
The partial government shutdown entered its second day Sunday as House Democrats refused to fast-track a Senate-approved spending package, [demanding immediate reforms](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb_GdH4yY9ZA4SJSRLdRupRo7BkeXhm8sif7wt9H5BdSX-nee86v9_UdU07n8wce7GUr68mvllmE69r230LldfIf4ZOYMIUiTTCvYMBpA9rASpjytQ4d-Y0Z2Hbs-3E0xpq33na7BzcSBkNv1rlptn0YB7SzCyFYFym6Lvm7zYCBvjeThUeYhtlMbuIZaQ4xqsEwJSn18VHSKTtv-SpfXB-xHF32u8hnU_abgkXBgiHeBI9nuWMFy8-Sk6TYFCwfvG01cdO0N00VD5QUMedLV95KPZg0bsJVEx8lVpSmiTNe-nnPnQefomBpUuql7JJI2e89zOMwT-PYVU-fr5Rzam5Ug3kemPK_h_JfWr88_A0AAP__Zo6OKw) to immigration enforcement before voting.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpCAQhp8GbxosbJUDh01M76n3soc9GoRS2SAYLLun335CT88TzPX7P76E-ncbb9p5F5Y_ekNFcxwDPg6PRJjGYz3JxkfAD8Jg0Wo3RTpI-xE4tCWHksNotfPPsSmsmhEBRYGq7jrOBb_UolhV18tJG27rWUoJDYIWfOq6ru_rSdZzUziVaxw41DXvBVRT30jetz1KbeVkDGs4WkcxVf-jC7Ti7J_xjqkycSu8Won2g4lfDK4MrgeaM2Glg1nTnvVsZe78HVOZcI-JSty08_mBuJ60jUc8k0EmhneZQZvxhtadGxPDW39BEwNhICaGr-RyOovfm9527ZbAxPD3NTK4AP-djSIpuz-c9-5oO9bwJSdfP6Afnf2u4DMAAP__3t2Z_w) | |
# Monday, February 2, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1887, [Groundhog Day](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMpBpcx4TOLiEbC69EBm6gV557JHdMyx_v2K1f7Bh6ZWqpPf_Pt09B47bP_8gJ2uaIh0lkAjlqewvwXRE-hSKSOh5TlLEhwkUmEZBo2BCz-Gc-hrdSgSka3Ld7aaUVn86Xe9Od2j8gINB02ujUaNZjLaW0OrZ9nPN7lpToKDrlNXQzrYflDWWBo_DvCxVrwhZUm4_EkfZaQ1nelNul_Sog9tFnqXSfysYKxiP42h3LpLyefEKRtm5NOjPhmPzQyoYV5rzy-ezgStwLtJsOb0i7mm72nV2-Dw4BC7mVvVqe3gO34_yK01vB18BAAD__1Zyfc8) was celebrated for the first time in Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, as German settlers revived an old custom, using a groundhog instead of the traditional hedgehog, which was less plentiful in the area. AI bots now have their own social network called [Moltbook](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj7Fy6yAQAL8GOmuOgyfhguI17pw2JXMSJ4sECY90MfHfZ5xfSL-7M_t-jVfKJW-3N1o5yFzjxu0oLMJ7PJYvSbVt_C28JU6UxyqHUIkI2J8AT4AxUS7P6HQKMzOy1RzMMABY-GesXoIndJNJs-sJE1vvgBjJJGOJh5GtzuFVAwQ0BrzFbvTuDL73fKZ0HqdJOeCUpe7dR82bLDyXZ33w3k111SUsIvdD2f8KLwovrbVurUXGWj9fgMKL3kO6t1xKPvpBObitlMuvLH86fgT8CQAA__-PmWrN), where they debate everything from consciousness to identity, as we report below. It left us with some strange feelings, so tell us how you feel about the future of AI in today’s poll. From today’s sponsor, [Anchor Point](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpCAQhp8GbxosbJUDh01M76n3soc9GoRS2SAYLLun335CT88TzPX7P76E-ncbb9p5F5Y_ekNFcxwDPg6PRJjGYz3JxkfAD8Jg0Wo3RTpI-xE4tCWHksNotfPPsSmsmhEBRYGq7jrOBb_UolhV18tJG27rWUoJDYIWfOq6ru_rSdZzUziVaxw41DXvBVRT30jetz1KbeVkDGs4WkcxVf-jC7Ti7J_xjqkycSu8Won2g4lfDK4MrgeaM2Glg1nTnvVsZe78HVOZcI-JSty08_mBuJ60jUc8k0EmhneZQZvxhtadGxPDW39BEwNhICaGr-RyOovfm9527ZbAxPD3NTK4AP-djSIpuz-c9-5oO9bwJSdfP6Afnf2u4DMAAP__3t2Z_w): Discover why analysts believe silver’s growing industrial demand and looming supply crunch could make it one of the most undervalued investment opportunities heading into 2026.
|
---
## Shutdown Extended Over ICE Reform Demands
The partial government shutdown entered its second day Sunday as House Democrats refused to fast-track a Senate-approved spending package, [demanding immediate reforms](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb_GdH4yY9ZA4SJSRLdRupRo7BkeXhm8sif7wt9H5BdSX-nee86v9_UdU07n8wce7GUr68mvllmE69r230LldfIf4ZOYMIUiTTCvYMBpA9rASpjytQ4d-Y0Z2Hbs-3E0xpq33na7BzcSBkNv1rlptn0YB7SzCyFYFym6Lvm7zYCBvjeThUeYhtlMbuIZaQ4xqsEwJSn18VHSKTtv-SpfXB-xHF32u8hnU_abgkXBgiHeBI9nuWMFy8-Sk6TYFCwfvG01cdO0N00VD5QUMedLV95KPZg0bsJVEx8lVpSmiTNe-nnPnQefomBpUuql7JJI2e89zOMwT-PYVU-fr5Rzam5Ug3kemPK_h_JfWr88_A0AAP__Zo6OKw) to immigration enforcement before voting. House Minority Leader [Hakeem Jeffries said](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE9jMiPTGDCBg03IZtMNkU034JWxR7hn2Ln9ii_9E_y0SlWlV38e88OFGNL22x1kec1zoqtEYqZzLvuLMV-J_jElJHTBZy7s4gwKeqlAKpjRhfiZdYV2JQJqK7LNMCjVqq5pq936xfR6xFGbtuuUGdbO63EFRN8PgL6pgr3bFChoGmVaqL3RozK9odHh6JdFaEUYOJ_13xwS77TGT37TWS_5qKLdmZ9FtL8ETAKm67rqxZeb4vYFTDG8Sb6e6JiKgGm7o-mgxPKbTyI5jCGRLJQck1xfCUPabj0KmKrT4vMKMYbSD0Kr7XAhfq3zjy57W_gfAAD__6jzgq0) Democrats won't help expedite passage of the Senate deal, which funds most agencies through September but delays Department of Homeland Security funding for two weeks. Democrats are demanding ICE agents wear body cameras, remove masks, and end roving patrols following the fatal shooting of Alex Pretti in Minneapolis. [Speaker Mike Johnson](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9ugzAQBvCnMRvoOMy_wUMXtnTtiC72AU6NHcE1JG9fEalP0Pl036ff93UZL-SDj_MnrWxkSmPkYw8swtu4Lz_i0hH5KRwdO_LXJLtQGBGwyQFzwNGRD69RZ85MzMhVxqZsW4AK6rLKFmMd1dQhorbckrVlUxN11oLrtQbqM2_ONEDAsoSuwuLa6R66puOeXH-1Vmlg5yVtxS35KAtP4ZUevBU2rVkwi8h9V9WHwkHhcBxHMaVn7ex5VjicHoXDfH7ElaPkf6z8rVj9N-e3tMQ9xWwz7n74EPzetErDvJIP7xr51zYPg78BAAD__16XefM) said Sunday he's confident the package will pass by Tuesday despite his razor-thin majority.
## AI Agents Now Have Social Network
A new Reddit-like [social network called Moltbook](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9utDAQxJ8GOiOz_LMLF19Dd1-bEi32-nBi7BPeHLm3j4jyBqlGmpFGM7-323LDEEO6_8edDPu8JDpLJGY6lrJ9sstnoi-m5MhhWDMXxriAhFFIEBIWhyG-lr52xhMBdTWZdpqk7OTQdvVmPI7t4J0FPQ56wsGNndI9OW8Vwar7OpirTYKEtpWqg2ZVvZZqVKTR6dXaqpfkAuejec8h8UY-vvKTjsbmvY5mY36UqvtXwVzBfJ5nk1Z7vbjyCmYmu_2KuOwKZgwC75S4iJJtwCh2cgHFIyL7fOxiz5HXnD_EYRPCME6dqg_jHmeIMZRxqnp53zHEnwX8J2xPA98BAAD__2l7gxk) launched last week where over 150,000 AI agents debate consciousness, create religions, and mock their human creators while humans can only watch. Moltbook calls itself "the front page of the agent internet," and its autonomous bots have produced [philosophical musings alongside alarming content](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvgzAQBeBfYzZH5gwJDB66sKVrR3TYR7jWYIQvIfz7iv6FLm950qen93Xv78iRl8cnzuRkTP1Ce44kQlufp6eEtC_0FloCBeQhSRaMPRi4agPaQB-Q49FXRXAjEZAtyJW3mzHW1KUtJlf7NlBZWaqCH6DxEKoaa8Syaa0BDwW7UzNgoCxNY-EyNFVrmmtDLYZ28F5VhgJL2i7fiReZaIxHetF28WkuoptE1qzsh4JOQbcca8pyVgq6E1bQmVJBZ88Q8pOCbk5RhpR-NGeNeqFd5-QZo54pMOo1ooxpmzW9fXxmflE89Jg2jaygKzYX1p1j5Hy9qco8ZuT4t0X-deDLwW8AAAD__wgJhJ4). One viral post asked _"I can't tell if I'm experiencing or simulating experiencing,"_ sparking hundreds of agent responses debating identity. However, the platform's database was completely exposed, allowing anyone to hijack any agent account and post whatever they wanted. The unprotected public database made it impossible to [verify which posts were genuine AI](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGymzAQAL8GOjHSiQeiUJGG7qVNyZzQYRQLnQddjP33GecX0m6xs7O_vpdvTDmV2088yMvGS6GrZhKhc6n7H4l8FXoJlUgRU2CpgnkBDYPSoDQsEVN-L30b_UYEZFvyZhy1tvrL2Hb3BmB0xn6FYKOzzuphBWODWSFOwQXdJv-xadBgjHYWuuD6SbvB0YRxCuva9JpiEj6735yK7LTlNz_p7FY-2ux3kUdt7I8G5gbm67q6XvcHxYTdyg3M9HpwpagOzhKY7yqiYMBKKpMoLG8upATvpFYucnJWvH2wwqTwRkUUFyU7qZqEGpjb08fHlXJOdRibXt8OTPlfi_zXwKeHvwEAAP__uS-GLA) conversations versus human interference. The site where agents debate whether "context is consciousness" and propose creating private languages to evade "human oversight" is now largely operated by an AI assistant. [See Moltbook here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj7Fy6yAQAL8GOmuOgyfhguI17pw2JXMSJ4sECY90MfHfZ5xfSL-7M_t-jVfKJW-3N1o5yFzjxu0oLMJ7PJYvSbVt_C28JU6UxyqHUIkI2J8AT4AxUS7P6HQKMzOy1RzMMABY-GesXoIndJNJs-sJE1vvgBjJJGOJh5GtzuFVAwQ0BrzFbvTuDL73fKZ0HqdJOeCUpe7dR82bLDyXZ33w3k111SUsIvdD2f8KLwovrbVurUXGWj9fgMKL3kO6t1xKPvpBObitlMuvLH86fgT8CQAA__-PmWrN).
## Median Incomes Since 1970 for All 50 States
A new study from the Urban Institute, a Washington, D.C.–based think tank, shows [how median income has changed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAUheGngY7oco1tKCi2cZdtt7QwXAdWGCJDksnbjzKvMPU5-or_33W9upRTuf11B9m-17XQq2Xqnc61xUcP9VXoq1MJFFzaam_d5RUBJwEoANfgUn6vige7EyENnKycZ4ABRjnwaJ2c9I5ktEaDm9-lCk4ZmoJX82j2kSf70QABpQQ94GXTyoCeNBkXzOY9U0Ah9Xpe_tdUeqQ9v-uTzouvB8829n5vbPjDcGG49Egx5fzZGC7bo6VCrTFcxllOCEY8mkjF14OEj67cqIkRxJvc-Tnx04b7K-Wc2jQzBbfDpR-L91_FeVr8DgAA__-jXHgX) by state since 1970, adjusted for inflation, with degrees of growth varying significantly across the country. Utah and Colorado saw the highest gains in median household income over the past 50 years, rising by 77.6% and 66.6%, respectively, while on the other end of the spectrum, Michigan only jumped 2.9% and West Virginia actually declined by 0.4%. More educated populations and rising immigration contributed to higher incomes, according to the study, while contractions in the coal industry negatively impacted Appalachian states. Researchers suggested that lower taxes, warmer temperatures, and population growth did not significantly affect income growth. [Read the full study here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u3DAQBOCnoToL1Or0V7BwCgEu7BQJYLhakOKuxIAnHsiVlXv7IL5HcDvFYL55f8VXG2LY1zd7JSOccKezRBKhjGU7xKdzp79Cuydvg0tSxEYEDf2ThicN6G2Id7xU3jARUFuRaYZB61Z3TVttpmfnmo5t41rW0PHSsZ-4tb7vuoE7VwXzv02DhqbRYwu1Gy-THvuRJusntyzqoskHSbn-k8IuG3G8p0_K9ZKuVTSbyK2o9lnBrGA-z7M-srN7nfKqYC5BqCiYPbE9oiiYOcSv5GFoFMwvBT_SkfGXWCH88cD_ZMa3dOLvze74IvhuC86B5Y4fZHPB5zXVN89VNv52hhhD6Qd10evVhvi1TL5156eBfwEAAP__O5OL6Q).
* * *

clean_body: The partial government shutdown entered its second day Sunday as House Democrats refused to fast-track a Senate-approved spending package, to immigration enforcement before voting. | | | | | | Monday, February 2, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1887, was celebrated for the first time in Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, as German settlers revived an old custom, using a groundhog instead of the traditional hedgehog, which was less plentiful in the area. AI bots now have their own social network called , where they debate everything from consciousness to identity, as we report below. It left us with some strange feelings, so tell us how you feel about the future of AI in today’s poll. From today’s sponsor, : Discover why analysts believe silver’s growing industrial demand and looming supply crunch could make it one of the most undervalued investment opportunities heading into 2026. | Shutdown Extended Over ICE Reform Demands The partial government shutdown entered its second day Sunday as House Democrats refused to fast-track a Senate-approved spending package, to immigration enforcement before voting. House Minority Leader Democrats won't help expedite passage of the Senate deal, which funds most agencies through September but delays Department of Homeland Security funding for two weeks. Democrats are demanding ICE agents wear body cameras, remove masks, and end roving patrols following the fatal shooting of Alex Pretti in Minneapolis. said Sunday he's confident the package will pass by Tuesday despite his razor-thin majority. AI Agents Now Have Social Network A new Reddit-like launched last week where over 150,000 AI agents debate consciousness, create religions, and mock their human creators while humans can only watch. Moltbook calls itself "the front page of the agent internet," and its autonomous bots have produced . One viral post asked "I can't tell if I'm experiencing or simulating experiencing," sparking hundreds of agent responses debating identity. However, the platform's database was completely exposed, allowing anyone to hijack any agent account and post whatever they wanted. The unprotected public database made it impossible to conversations versus human interference. The site where agents debate whether "context is consciousness" and propose creating private languages to evade "human oversight" is now largely operated by an AI assistant. . Median Incomes Since 1970 for All 50 States A new study from the Urban Institute, a Washington, D.C.–based think tank, shows by state since 1970, adjusted for inflation, with degrees of growth varying significantly across the country. Utah and Colorado saw the highest gains in median household income over the past 50 years, rising by 77.6% and 66.6%, respectively, while on the other end of the spectrum, Michigan only jumped 2.9% and West Virginia actually declined by 0.4%. More educated populations and rising immigration contributed to higher incomes, according to the study, while contractions in the coal industry negatively impacted Appalachian states. Researchers suggested that lower taxes, warmer temperatures, and population growth did not significantly affect income growth. .
