| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/979f5ee1-9d1a-4ad2-aa2e-f2c6a6001961?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I don't think there is anyone in the world that hasn't aspired to someday pay a visit to sunny California. The Golden State is rich with sunshine, warm climate and natural splendor as far as the eye can see. Millions of people across the globe make the trek just for a chance to soak up some of what California has to offer. From national parks to amusement parks, California is blessed with some of America's best. It's reputation as a premier vacation destination brings in billions of dollars to state coffers every year.
I began writing about California's mass exodus in late-2020 when Governor Gavin Newsome implemented his despotic COVID mandates on California's citizenry. For many, this was simply the straw that broke the camel's back. Initially, many of California's residents were somewhat content having to pay the highest individual taxes in the country; so long as life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness was unincumbered.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ytK33IBN770_SXJiApVzTb42W03KB-pnW-fkocSAEsw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186642250)
Unfortunately, the Golden state and its progressive legislators have taken this once thriving paradise and turned it into an open-air flop house, where crime, drugs and homelessness permeate the landscape. Fleecing the once thriving middle class and committing itself to furthering its extinction. Recent data from the Public Policy Institute shows over 10 million Californians at or near poverty levels, which equates to over a quarter of its population.
Good paying jobs are becoming all but scarce as companies continue to pack-up and leave the sunny paradise due to over taxation and woke policies. Tesla, Oracle, Palantir and Hewlett Packard are just the latest mega size companies to pack up its forty thousand jobs and leave; and head for republican led states. It seems wokeness doesn't bode well for a company's bottom line, or shareholders expectations. To make matters worse, California's lawmakers are now seeking to raise taxes on what they call "California's wealthy"; at unprecedented levels to offset the continued losses of tax revenue due to the departures.
Of all 50 states, California has the highest individual income tax rates, but this will be a drop in the bucket for what's about to come.
The thought of enjoying historical landmarks such as Rodeo Drive, Malibu's beaches or San Francisco's Golden Gate Park are also becoming distant memories. Crime plays a large role in dismaying anyone from attempting to enjoy the scenery. Roving retail theft gangs and train robberies are the latest fads to hit the Golden State. California's permissiveness on crime coupled with woke prosecutors who refuse to prosecute criminals for violent and non-violent crimes have created a hostage situation for those citizens unable to flee wokeness. All these factors, along with the ever-increasing poverty and illegal immigration, will decimate these once desired destinations.
California's progressive criminal policies have resulted in some of the nation's worst recidivism rates by far. In the last 10 years, California has averaged a 50% recidivism rate on all crime. Open air drug markets and the decriminalization of drugs has resulted in the doubling of overdose deaths in just one year. This will only get worse without swift intervention.
In just two years, California has lost so many residents, the state has lost one of its Congressional seats in the U.S. House of Representatives, according to census data. Tampa Fla, Miami Fla and Phoenix Arizona are the top three escape cities for the former Californians as they seek refuge in republican states. It seems lower taxes and family values does have a place in American culture, just not in blue states.
Sadly, progressive states like Washington and Oregon have begun to mimic these detrimental policies and have essentially started the fast-track down the same path as the Golden State. Residents are starting to flee in record numbers as woke policies envelop these communities.
Will the last person to leave Seattle please turn out the lights?
Vincent

clean_body: When a state's "progress" starts driving families and businesses out, is it progress--or collapse? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more When a state's "progress" starts driving families and businesses out, is it progress--or collapse? | | | Feb 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- I don't think there is anyone in the world that hasn't aspired to someday pay a visit to sunny California. The Golden State is rich with sunshine, warm climate and natural splendor as far as the eye can see. Millions of people across the globe make the trek just for a chance to soak up some of what California has to offer. From national parks to amusement parks, California is blessed with some of America's best. It's reputation as a premier vacation destination brings in billions of dollars to state coffers every year. I began writing about California's mass exodus in late-2020 when Governor Gavin Newsome implemented his despotic COVID mandates on California's citizenry. For many, this was simply the straw that broke the camel's back. Initially, many of California's residents were somewhat content having to pay the highest individual taxes in the country; so long as life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness was unincumbered. Unfortunately, the Golden state and its progressive legislators have taken this once thriving paradise and turned it into an open-air flop house, where crime, drugs and homelessness permeate the landscape. Fleecing the once thriving middle class and committing itself to furthering its extinction. Recent data from the Public Policy Institute shows over 10 million Californians at or near poverty levels, which equates to over a quarter of its population. Good paying jobs are becoming all but scarce as companies continue to pack-up and leave the sunny paradise due to over taxation and woke policies. Tesla, Oracle, Palantir and Hewlett Packard are just the latest mega size companies to pack up its forty thousand jobs and leave; and head for republican led states. It seems wokeness doesn't bode well for a company's bottom line, or shareholders expectations. To make matters worse, California's lawmakers are now seeking to raise taxes on what they call "California's wealthy"; at unprecedented levels to offset the continued losses of tax revenue due to the departures. Of all 50 states, California has the highest individual income tax rates, but this will be a drop in the bucket for what's about to come. The thought of enjoying historical landmarks such as Rodeo Drive, Malibu's beaches or San Francisco's Golden Gate Park are also becoming distant memories. Crime plays a large role in dismaying anyone from attempting to enjoy the scenery. Roving retail theft gangs and train robberies are the latest fads to hit the Golden State. California's permissiveness on crime coupled with woke prosecutors who refuse to prosecute criminals for violent and non-violent crimes have created a hostage situation for those citizens unable to flee wokeness. All these factors, along with the ever-increasing poverty and illegal immigration, will decimate these once desired destinations. California's progressive criminal policies have resulted in some of the nation's worst recidivism rates by far. In the last 10 years, California has averaged a 50% recidivism rate on all crime. Open air drug markets and the decriminalization of drugs has resulted in the doubling of overdose deaths in just one year. This will only get worse without swift intervention. In just two years, California has lost so many residents, the state has lost one of its Congressional seats in the U.S. House of Representatives, according to census data. Tampa Fla, Miami Fla and Phoenix Arizona are the top three escape cities for the former Californians as they seek refuge in republican states. It seems lower taxes and family values does have a place in American culture, just not in blue states. Sadly, progressive states like Washington and Oregon have begun to mimic these detrimental policies and have essentially started the fast-track down the same path as the Golden State. Residents are starting to flee in record numbers as woke policies envelop these communities. Will the last person to leave Seattle please turn out the lights? Vincent This Substack is reader-supported. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. If you like what you read, please forward it to a friend. body:
We don’t like this one bit. Do you

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/lawler-for-congress/sanctuary-petition?amount=50&utm_source=acoustic&utm_medium=email)
---
---
| | Rockland County Democrats have lost their minds. Do you agree, Peter? They’ve just introduced the “Immigrant Protection Act” – and here’s what it would do...
* ❌ Bar county employees and law enforcement from proactively cooperating with ICE, even when dealing with individuals who have prior criminal histories
* ❌ Prohibit honoring immigration detainers or providing release notifications, allowing individuals wanted by federal authorities to be released back into the community
* ❌ Create additional legal and bureaucratic hurdles that discourage coordination between local law enforcement and federal agencies
* ❌ Prioritize immigration status protections over public safety considerations, tying the hands of police officers and corrections officials

_In short, this bill would make Rockland County a “Sanctuary County”, and would prioritize THEIR political aspirations ahead of YOUR safety._ Since I was first elected to Congress, I’ve been working on serious, bipartisan immigration reform that includes:
* ✅ Securing the border and stopping illegal immigration
* ✅ Restoring cooperation between federal and local law enforcement
* ✅ Fixing our broken immigration system humanely and responsibly

_But Sanctuary laws do the opposite._ _**They block cooperation, incentivize exploitation, and risk costing us millions in federal public safety and law enforcement funding.**_ Rockland families deserve leaders who prioritize public safety, the rule of law, and accountability. [**_If you agree, and you want the Rockland Democrats’ “Immigrant Protection Act” voted down, then please, sign your name to the petition below, right away._**](https://links.email.lawlerforcongress.com/els/v4/jyhq9bqgabcyw7mlh19bv/YxOC2eSW5FhBvHyJkj9kFTdn0vM9zqe7Utur_W48H0xYempWD8AwTRhDaqtPaM8wUQxx/Zty3oKIDypt3KM93nTrn1R5OUZOuGLYZDCkk-G0YCbAQipeyh2GxBhQE_oH5kSPGFX964dE8rzBsf24k9TgEKUj6OVJGDujkHwcs6ZiyEeBAXFusZQu5H9knT5awZIA-jYxlMhGITCZ98tL9klMi9885HrcCUikVtBhbxCIMT9L9kE3rSYbea6fGtW0ARgAWU9bv4MhRGWMjTJR8wX-hxgcigIt72WzlTiiTrwPKWohQkYi4kgu9KR5uVQl5TI98lrAtsQ_rmIju8XOxo8SnIFpj3p6GQxE2I4mL4VAjXXZ52yIVDQ1gVDhI_wRxRWkf6BE=)

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zupja9v4ivdkuf66612kp4f337dt9k1j9tj9g370_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh96c21jhnj1d8phrql0slrl64sjc6pf6f6pvodo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)
---
**[And when you make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, we'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book -- as our thank you for carrying his legacy forward.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zms2f99dtdbcoe3g9dp1acco8ao4cs9c0964nuk0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlokqh2l7pjh7ka6f3n0vqfedd7571camcc7k54g_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)
---
Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we'll ship you a copy of Charlie's final book straight to your door.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeicvaqjdnf29f43pl80k4jds0maseqvfc4af830_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi3sk6qirilotio0bjihd4f1mdeha0a12r655qt8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)
---
Friend, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- _the very things Charlie gave his life for. _

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgg5mge16qdo77q9dm50ai1e6cf7fas2vj6fnlng_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z590237hbru7cu0hd1g5u9kda83a4b6po9s55npg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)**
---
**P.S.** Charlie Kirk's final book, _**Stop, in the Name of God,**_ is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God.

[**Please make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, and we 'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book to your door.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc6g2v3sbi20shj0coglt01ulp72vu3f90rugddg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0c1jmao32cjh2bs)

subject: President Trump and Elon Musk Issue Stark Warning ∕ Monday, February 2, 2026
body:
Both President Trump and Elon Musk are warning about something that could send the market down 50%, real estate down 40% and savings accounts down 30%. | | | [-](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=d9f32c26ebff47939dfa732cb0290308&_e=Xk5Nan-1AZ4vi36WeXLD_izw3CTcOuq23WznRuyD0DBEZa9ltbr0IGzNdhX066WaLkCeCo82W5fxwALX9dU8j9QUNMXQLYHn7WkOFfO-gJxOuai3Vkw_HrbY-9BMQ-XbKSw8MnOi9AaR46K6ofJUxWkQ_W5OcYVzid5ue_5NvN6RvvdF5EM9FlM_aEni1DWjm1uNPyFS7gysx2xh28O1oqZHS2NPBKEWTFiZ_1kqFNgcRYEFkrsTqJbqrHPMeLVvlKOJCvAzRX_fpepdlKgFE0DmFZ3oU48_uLw4GvWhH8iJCfL6nGQREhVjECg1aZ1ylGLIIn7_noUVizac6ftV__FBdepH5orWKm3o3FzLm8eB2pbT2-h4XxAV9nbcTMwc)

**Don't want to receive our publications?**[**Unsubscribe here**](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_s=d9f32c26ebff47939dfa732cb0290308&_t=KWejmxrgilJyP4x7jxM_2H-oodyyupGI7zSkRfjeHxP93f7WTjtovR2N2vG6LXDF9vBy-HYA0U3Ihtez_KiJ4sHaEvMhSe7CxIIT7nuJXNgqbR_yeNeHyLWiIuGBYXyT)
---
|
---
| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. # Trump eyes massive mineral stockpile boost
President Donald Trump is preparing "Project Vault," a groundbreaking **[$12 billion strategic stockpile of critical minerals](https://substack.com/redirect/717e4c0a-b59f-454a-9f8a-ed001f3512b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** including rare earths, combining $10 billion in Export-Import Bank loans with private capital to slash U.S. reliance on China for EV batteries, defense tech, and advanced manufacturing--sparking sharp gains in domestic rare earth miner stocks Monday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/717e4c0a-b59f-454a-9f8a-ed001f3512b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Stock Surge Hits Miners:** MP Materials rose 6%, USA Rare Earth 13%, and Critical Metals 12% in early trading as investors anticipate accelerated domestic demand and government support.
* **Project Vault Details Emerge:** The initiative pairs $1.67 billion private capital with a $10 billion EXIM Bank loan to build a private-sector stockpile shielding manufacturers from supply disruptions.
* **China Dependence Targeted:** Effort counters Beijing's dominance over rare earths and critical minerals vital for electric vehicles, defense systems, and high-tech products amid ongoing trade tensions.
* **Builds on Prior Moves:** Follows government equity stakes in companies like MP Materials and funding talks with USA Rare Earth to strengthen U.S. mining and processing capabilities.

* * *
* * *

# Precious metals crash spectacularly unwinds epic rally
Gold and silver prices **[extended brutal declines Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/095726c3-622b-4c98-916b-5f03ce5ff5d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after a record-breaking rally imploded, with spot gold down about 4% following a 10% tumble and silver off 6% after a 16% slide, driven by Trump's Fed pick Kevin Warsh sparking tighter policy bets, a surging dollar, and forced unwinding of crowded speculative positions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/095726c3-622b-4c98-916b-5f03ce5ff5d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Crowded bets unwind** : Traders rapidly exited overextended long positions built during months of relentless gains fueled by geopolitical fears, currency worries, and Chinese speculation.
* **Trump 's Fed nominee impact**: Kevin Warsh's nomination as Fed chair raised expectations for stricter monetary policy, boosting the US dollar and eroding precious metals' appeal.
* **Historic volatility extremes** : Gold posted its biggest slump in over a decade while silver suffered a record intraday drop on Friday, with metals clawing back some losses amid reassessment.
* **Liquidity strains emerge** : Banks faced trading challenges from extreme volatility, compounded by higher CME margin requirements, accelerating the selloff in bullion ETFs and derivatives.

* * *
* * *
# Bitcoin hovers near $78000 as downtrend bites hard
Bitcoin clings to $78000 **[amid persistent sell-off pressure,](https://substack.com/redirect/07410fe2-1b5b-48d6-be1d-907d3854f380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** hovering near that level after dipping to its lowest since April amid a fourth consecutive month of losses and a broader crypto market fragility triggered by hawkish Fed signals.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07410fe2-1b5b-48d6-be1d-907d3854f380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Downtrend Remains Intact** : Analysts stress the broader bearish trend persists with no clear reversal catalyst, as sentiment shifts and deleveraging dominates trading activity.
* **Support Zones Emerge** : Mid-$70000 region eyed as key support, aligning with historical lows and potentially attractive for selective buying.
* **Investor Caution Prevails** : Flows indicate reluctance to buy the dip, with positioning data showing traders focused on unwinds rather than rally preparation.
* **Market Losses Mount** : Crypto sector sheds $1.7 trillion (39% from peak), with Ether down 23% year-to-date amid whale selling and forced liquidations since October.

# Oracle looks to raise billions to fund its massive AI projects
Oracle **[announced plans Sunday to raise $45 billion to $50 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/546bc983-83bd-445e-ba20-f2c8225b1a7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in 2026 through debt and equity to expand cloud infrastructure, fueling AI demand from major clients like OpenAI, Meta, and Nvidia. Shares rose 5% in premarket trading on Monday, easing investor concerns over funding the aggressive buildout.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/546bc983-83bd-445e-ba20-f2c8225b1a7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Funding Breakdown Revealed** : Oracle targets half the proceeds from equity-linked securities and common stock, including a new $20 billion at-the-market program and mandatory convertible preferred issuances.
* **AI Demand Drivers** : Massive raise addresses contracted needs from top cloud customers including AMD, TikTok, xAI, and others amid record data center deals in 2025.
* **Balance Sheet Strategy** : Company emphasizes balanced debt-equity mix to preserve investment-grade credit rating **[despite heavy AI-related capital expenditures.](https://substack.com/redirect/6b1d4478-e744-4b3d-8fe1-40631c4df1a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Market Reaction Mixed** : The initial premarket dip reversed to gains as analysts view the plan positively, alleviating for the moment **[prior worries over financing Oracle's rapid expansion.](https://substack.com/redirect/6b1d4478-e744-4b3d-8fe1-40631c4df1a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
* * *
# Melania doc shocks with massive $7 million debut haul
Amazon's "Melania" documentary, directed by Brett Ratner and chronicling the first lady's preparations for Donald Trump's 2025 inauguration , **[stunned the box office with a $7 million domestic opening weekend,](https://substack.com/redirect/1945ecf2-96aa-4cc7-baaf-0ee39c4c5cc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** surpassing expectations and marking the strongest debut for a non-music documentary in over a decade despite scathing critics' reviews and controversy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1945ecf2-96aa-4cc7-baaf-0ee39c4c5cc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Audience Demographics Drive Success:** Women and moviegoers over 55 accounted for more than 70% of ticket sales, with rural theaters contributing an outsized 46% of grosses compared to their usual share.
* **Production Costs Sky High:** Amazon MGM Studios invested an estimated $40 million to acquire the film and nearly $35-40 million more on marketing, making it one of the most expensive documentaries ever produced.
* **Critical Backlash vs Fan Praise:** The film earned a dismal 11% critics' score on Rotten Tomatoes but a near-perfect 99% audience Popcornmeter rating from viewers suggesting once again that audiences and critics are split on a Trump product.
* **Long-Term Streaming Potential:** Amazon executives highlighted positive momentum and a planned docu-series extension, anticipating significant ongoing performance on Prime Video beyond its theatrical run.

* * *
* * *
# Tariff triumph as US crushes Japan's steel dominance
For the first time since 1999, the United States surpassed Japan in crude steel production in 2025, **[climbing to the world's third-largest producer](https://substack.com/redirect/5962eee1-ab20-464a-81c0-5e1ab7e0a444?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with an output of 82 million tons, thanks to President Trump's protective tariffs that boosted domestic manufacturing amid a global industry slowdown.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e97ff962-71ac-4598-878b-6429efe27f55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Production Surge Reported:** US crude steel output rose 3.1% to 82 million tons in 2025, ending two years of declines and marking the first increase recently.
* **Tariffs Doubled Impact:** Trump's administration started with 25% tariffs on imported steel and aluminum in 2024, then raised them to 50%, credited with driving the domestic production rebound.
* **Global Ranking Shift:** America vaulted ahead of Japan to claim third place worldwide in steel production, behind only China and India, after trailing for 26 years.
* **Industry Optimism Voiced:** Nucor CEO Leon Topalian praised the tariffs as a positive force, noting strong economic demand and forecasting a solid 2026 for US steelmakers.

name: Arizona Democratic Party

Democrats across Arizona need signatures to get on the ballot. The deadline is April 6th. Will you add yours today? |

Here's what's at stake: Democrats face structural disadvantages at every level in Arizona. To even get on the ballot, candidates need thousands of signatures from voters like you. From school board races to Congress, every Democrat running needs your signature.
The deadline to qualify is April 6th, and we're racing against the clock.
If we don't hit these signature requirements up and down the ballot, voters won't have Democratic choices in November. That means MAGA Republicans could run unopposed in races where Democrats should be competing. It means fewer voices fighting for working families, reproductive rights, and Arizona's future.
We can't let that happen.
Right now, Democratic candidates across Arizona are counting on grassroots supporters to help them meet signature thresholds. Your signature helps ensure that come Election Day, Arizona voters have real choices — not just the candidates that corporate interests and extremist groups want them to see.
**[So, will you add your signature to help Democrats get on the ballot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124578105/599046029/1326574547?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20260202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDkwZWM2OGQtNjcwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b6GfZBA_35l_Q8rer036nuEhfuMPGTbKpH7Us6Pqfas=&emci=6f143bf1-01fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=d90ec68d-6700-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=9307116)**
[ADD YOUR SIGNATURE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124578106/599046030/1326574547?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20260202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDkwZWM2OGQtNjcwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b6GfZBA_35l_Q8rer036nuEhfuMPGTbKpH7Us6Pqfas=&emci=6f143bf1-01fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=d90ec68d-6700-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=9307116)

name: James Talarico
subject: I nearly died
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
When I was 28 years old, I almost died.
I was running in my first race for the Texas House. I decided to walk the entire length of my district — 25 miles in one day — holding town halls along the way. I wasn’t worried — I hike Big Bend every year!
But about halfway through, I started feeling nauseous and fatigued. I threw up a couple of times on the way, but figured I was just dehydrated. Somehow, I finished.
When I got home, I slept for 36 hours. My family rushed me to the ER, where nurses checked my blood sugar. I was immediately diagnosed with type 1 diabetes. I was in diabetic ketoacidosis, which ends in coma and death without insulin.
When I got out of the ICU, I went to Walgreens to pick up my first 30-day supply of insulin. It cost me $684 for a necessary medicine that costs Big Pharma $10 to produce. I didn’t have that kind of money (most Texans don’t, either) — so I put it on my credit card.
This is why so many people with diabetes ration or skip doses. Some of them die because of it.
**So when I got elected, I passed bills to cap the price of insulin at $25 a month.**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260202-re-ak&t=1&akid=428%2E1347274%2EPLA2Yn)
For years, politicians allowed Big Pharma to push people into bankruptcy or face death because corporate profit came first. With our bill, we put an end to Big Pharma’s manipulation of the insulin market, which drives up prices to maximize profit.
It’s time to take our fight for guaranteed health care to our nation’s capital and finally put the lives of Americans over the profits of billionaire mega-donors and special interests.
But I’ll be honest: it’s going to be expensive. **Big Pharma will likely come after me in this race, pouring millions of dollars into corporate PACs to defeat our movement.** And we have to fight back without a single dollar from corporate PACs.
**[Your support would mean a lot to me. If you believe we need new leaders fighting for the people in Washington, please consider making a donation to our campaign today as we sprint toward the primary on March 3.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260202-re-ak&t=2&akid=428%2E1347274%2EPLA2Yn)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

I know what it means to fight for my life. In the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight for yours.
James

name: Trey Trainor for Texas
subject: When MLB Went Woke & Hurt Workers, I Fought Back – Teixeira Said Nothing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TREY TRAINOR FOR TEXAS
body:
MLB rewarded China while punishing Georgia – Where was Mark Teixeira?

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=4d3fe76c62&u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=d8da5eb147)
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=a7768cac88&e=4d3fe76c62)
| | | | | | Peter,
As a lifelong conservative, proud Texan, and a Republican candidate for Congress in TX-21, I've always believed in calling out hypocrisy and standing firm on principle – especially when it hurts everyday Americans and small businesses.
Back in 2021, when Major League Baseball went completely woke and pulled the All-Star Game out of Atlanta, Georgia, over misinformation about the state's common-sense election integrity law, **I didn't stay silent** – and neither did**President Trump** nor**Senator Marco Rubio**. We all spoke out boldly against MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred's blatant hypocrisy around the same time.
I wrote an op-ed in **The Daily Caller** titled ["**Commissioner Rob Manfred Is Inconsistently Woke**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=3105c37be1&e=4d3fe76c62) ," where I pointed out the facts:
_"In the end, Manfred took the All-Star game from Georgia to a state [Colorado] with almost identical election laws. Manfred’s hypocrisy is just as clear."_
Manfred moved the game to Colorado – a state with similar voter ID requirements and restrictions on providing food and drink to voters in line. Yet at the very same time, MLB was aggressively expanding its business ties in **Communist China** , a country with zero voting rights and a record of severe human rights abuses. MLB maintained offices and youth development centers in China, streamed hundreds of games annually through its major partnership with Tencent (a company closely tied to the Chinese Communist Party) and continued building facilities and grassroots programs to grow the sport in a market that suppresses freedom.
Meanwhile, my primary opponent, former MLB player Mark Teixeira – who at the time was working as an ESPN analyst for Major League Baseball broadcasts – said absolutely nothing. He chose the "go along to get along" approach, staying quiet as the league's decision cost Georgia jobs, revenue, and opportunities for locally owned businesses in Atlanta.
That moment showed the clear contrast in leadership:**President Trump, Senator Rubio, and I fought for conservative values, election integrity, and standing against woke corporate bullying – no matter how powerful the opponent.** Mark Teixeira demonstrated a willingness to stay silent when principle was on the line.
In Congress, we need fighters who will drain the swamp, secure our borders, cut wasteful spending, and defend America First policies alongside President Trump – not those who shrink from the tough battles.
The Republican Primary is March 3, 2026, with early voting starting February 17. I humbly ask for your vote so I can take this same bold leadership to Washington and represent the strong conservative values of TX-21.
Please visit [**trey4tx.com**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=31cc0efc6d&e=4d3fe76c62) to learn more, [**volunteer**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=77d9f07886&e=4d3fe76c62) , or[**contribute**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=5d10becd1b&e=4d3fe76c62). Together, we'll win this seat and make a real difference.
God bless you, and God bless Texas,
**Trey Trainor** Republican Candidate for Congress, TX-21
---
| [Support Trey](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=89fc448782&e=4d3fe76c62)
---

# [A quick update](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=186640753&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NjQwNzUzLCJpYXQiOjE3NzAwNTg5MTEsImV4cCI6MTc3MjY1MDkxMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oYNprTdIsU2k9UF2sX7XUfylqq2HW4Xdr43ys1jxArM)
### We have just 183 days until the Michigan primary
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Feb 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..PPBjzuEePqqNGOvROTN_5l4EPU5DT6bpti3uw52k4m0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/a-quick-update?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hi team, it's Haley with a quick update.
My team is still processing January's fundraising totals, but with so much at stake, we've already had our first finance meeting of February.
The reality is -- **we only have 183 days until the Michigan primary** , so every single one counts. Our grassroots team has stepped up before in huge ways. And I'm so, so grateful.
As we face our biggest fundraising goal yet this month, I'm humbly asking folks to step up once again. My team just told me we need to raise another $9,812 today to stay on track. So here are five quick reasons to chip in right now:
1. **We have to stop the chaos.** Between the longest shutdown in U.S. history, cuts to SNAP, and surging health care costs - working families are ready for strong, stable leadership.
2. **Trump 's tariffs are hitting Michigan hard.** They're hurting the manufacturing industry I've spent my career fighting to protect. And we need more public servants speaking up.
3. **The GOP megadonors are circling.** Outside spending groups and billionaires are zeroing in on Michigan, trying to buy this seat for Republican Mike Rogers
4. **We can win.** Polls show I'm the strongest Democrat running - I'm consistently polling the best against Mike Rogers in the general.
5. **The affordability crisis is crushing hardworking Americans.** It's no secret that folks are struggling. I'm running for Senate to do what I've always done: fight for working families. But I can't do it alone.

This goal is critical. If we fall short, we risk falling behind just as national Republicans ramp up their attacks.
**Will you rush a gift before midnight to help us keep Michigan blue?**
[Chip in now](https://substack.com/redirect/20b1d2eb-e09e-49d8-b791-33f20ee6a45a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With grit,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/20b1d2eb-e09e-49d8-b791-33f20ee6a45a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
It's folks like you who are powering our fight in Colorado.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124579792/599050582/1720001450?amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode=email_020226_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTgzZWI2My02OTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HIbIjOdRNek21mhnZ2gLuYqWlEu4I1rP7gaylg5eUY8=) Folks, I have some good news to share: Thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we hit our first end-of-month fundraising goal of the year just before our midnight deadline. This was our campaign’s first big test of the election year, and we’re so grateful for people like you who stepped up to help us meet our mark. It’s folks like you who are powering our fight in Colorado. _Really, we mean it!_ **Our campaign doesn’t take a single cent from corporate PACs, and most of the donations we receive are under $25. It’s hardworking people in Colorado and across the country who make our campaign, and the work we’re doing in the Senate, possible.** It’s your support that pushed us over the finish line and helped flip this seat from red to blue in 2020, and it’s your support that’s going to help us defend this seat in November. And if I’m being totally honest, with the election year in full swing — and Trump and the GOP targeting our state — we need you by our side now more than ever. **_[I know we’ve been asking for your help a lot recently, but there's too much at stake to lose focus. I’m one of the only first-term Democrats in the Senate up for re-election this year, and control of the Senate could come down to this seat. So if you can, I hope you’ll consider chipping in a couple bucks today to power our team to victory in Colorado.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124579793/599050583/1720001450?amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode=email_020226_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTgzZWI2My02OTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HIbIjOdRNek21mhnZ2gLuYqWlEu4I1rP7gaylg5eUY8=)_** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124579794/599050584/1720001450?amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode=email_020226_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTgzZWI2My02OTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HIbIjOdRNek21mhnZ2gLuYqWlEu4I1rP7gaylg5eUY8=)

With gratitude,
John

name: Tony Thurmond
subject: Three Key California Lawmakers Endorse Our Campaign for Governor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Thurmond for Governor 2026, FPPC# 1461509
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Dear Friend,
I’m excited to share some big news. Three key California lawmakers have endorsed our campaign for Governor!
* State Senator Dr. Akilah Weber Pierson , Chair of the California Legislative Black Caucus
* State Assemblymember Dr. LaShae Sharp-Collins
* State Assemblymember Anamarie Ávila Farías
In announcing her endorsement, Senator Weber Pierson said:
"Tony Thurmond's life story serves as evidence of what's possible in the great state of California. At every step, Tony overcame adversity, from being orphaned at a young age to living in poverty and relying on government assistance to get by, he harnessed the power of a great public education which led to a lifetime of public service: as a social worker, school board member, city council member, state legislator and now as State Superintendent. Tony's story is not only an inspiration, but a testament to the fact that the California dream is alive and well. I am proud to endorse Tony because he will fight for every single Californian - no matter who they are or where they're from. Tony will make the people of California proud as our next Governor."

clean_body: [] Dear Friend, I’m excited to share some big news. Three key California lawmakers have endorsed our campaign for Governor! State Senator Dr. Akilah Weber Pierson , Chair of the California Legislative Black Caucus State Assemblymember Dr. LaShae Sharp-Collins * State Assemblymember Anamarie Ávila Farías In announcing her endorsement, Senator Weber Pierson said: "Tony Thurmond's life story serves as evidence of what's possible in the great state of California. At every step, Tony overcame adversity, from being orphaned at a young age to living in poverty and relying on government assistance to get by, he harnessed the power of a great public education which led to a lifetime of public service: as a social worker, school board member, city council member, state legislator and now as State Superintendent. Tony's story is not only an inspiration, but a testament to the fact that the California dream is alive and well. I am proud to endorse Tony because he will fight for every single Californian - no matter who they are or where they're from. Tony will make the people of California proud as our next Governor." Together, we are building a campaign focused on lowering the rising cost of living, protecting our immigrant communities, and standing up to the Trump administration! With more than 350 endorsements from leaders across the state, our movement continues to grow every day. [] If you’re able, please consider making a contribution today to help us keep building this momentum and reach voters across California! name: On the frontlines with Our Revolution
subject: We won’t stop until ICE is OUT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1012&refcode=email-20260202_v&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

This is Dieu Do, Our Revolution organizer on the ground in Minneapolis.

I'm writing to you today to make sure you know the truth of what's
happening right now in my city. Because despite what Trump and his cronies
may say to try to calm tensions, the reality is nothing has changed on our
streets. ICE’s violence and intimidation are still daily life for our
neighbors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35022?source=email-20260202&t=1061&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]Headline: Trump signals interest in easing tensions, but Minneapolis
sees little change on the streets

But our movement hasn't let up for a second doing the work needed to
protect our communities AND get ICE out for good. Right now, organizers on
the frontlines are patrolling neighborhoods, delivering food, and
protecting kids at bus stops from being snatched by ICE. And we’re
mobilizing the grassroots and growing our power to show up in massive
numbers to send a clear message to Trump: we will not stop until our
communities are safe from ICE’s terror.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1058&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20260202nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]The truth is this kind of work takes resources – direct action, mutual
aid, and so much more. Will you rush a contribution right now to power our
grassroots defense, help protect families, and drive ICE out of our
communities?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20260202nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1044&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20260202nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20260202nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20260202nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1048&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20260202nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1049&amount=9&refcode=email-20260202nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

As Trump tries to make it seem like things have changed, and Border czar
Tom Homan talks about a possible drawdown plan IF state and city officials
cooperate, the truth is ICE agents are still stalking our streets, fueled
by federal directives and operating with near-total impunity.

I’ve been teargassed on the street while trying to help a pregnant woman
get care during a chaotic ICE raid. I’ve seen my neighbors tackled to the
street and families torn apart. But I’ve also seen the power of our people
and the strength of this community.

Despite these efforts to terrorize us into silence, it’s only making us
stronger.

Two Fridays ago, in temperatures of 20 degrees below zero, over 200,000
Minnesotans made history, braving the cold for the first general strike in
the U.S. in nearly 80 years. Our message was loud and clear: End the
federal ICE occupation now.

This past Friday, we did it again – this time across the country – and
we’re not going to stop until the terror stops. But that’s not all. We’re
also watching out for our neighbors, forming late-night patrols and
putting ourselves on the line to stand between ICE and its targets.

Our communities are exhausted, scared, and angry – yet hope grows every
day that our mass effort will end this occupation.

Because one thing is clear: a growing number of us across the country are
standing up and refusing to let ICE terrorize our communities in silence.
But like every movement for justice, we need grassroots power – the power
of people like you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35023?t=1055&amount=22&refcode=email-20260202nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]We know this work makes a difference. When we show up – together – we save
lives. And together, we will build the power we need to get ICE out of our
communities for good. Please donate what you can now to keep this
resistance alive. The time to end ICE violence is now – and every dollar
raised matters.

When we organize, we win,

Dieu Do

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35022?source=email-20260202&t=1011&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]Photo of Our Revolution Organizer in Minnesota

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]Sign Up

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2026 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22266?t=1010&akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=10161%2E5885482%2EjDOYie

name: April McClain Delaney
subject: Thank you for helping us start strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Because of your support, we closed out January strong and launched this year with real momentum. That early show of belief matters more than you might realize. It allows us to plan ahead, stay organized, and be ready for the work in front of us.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124580143/599052089/-1765601992?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2026-02-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2NlZGU5YzUtNmEwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HcyQ9gjSKyzr2SDmeVQ7atMyRrC1hkUc_qiurRryOo=)
---
| Hi Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to say thank you.

Because of your support, we closed out January strong and launched this year with real momentum. That early show of belief matters more than you might realize. It allows us to plan ahead, stay organized, and be ready for the work in front of us.

I am deeply grateful for everyone who stepped up, shared a word of encouragement, or helped power this campaign forward. Every conversation and every contribution makes a difference.

Now we are fully stepping into a new chapter. This year will bring a competitive Democratic primary and a lot of attention to this race. The stakes are high, and the road ahead will not be easy. But I am confident in what we are building together.

Thank you for believing in this work, in our shared values, and in a Maryland where families come first and leadership shows up and delivers.

I am honored to be in this fight with you.

With gratitude,

April McClain Delaney

[_**P.S. We are heading into our next phase already, and keeping up our momentum matters. If you are able to chip in any amount to help us continue building, it would mean a great deal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124580144/599052117/-1765601992?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2026-02-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2NlZGU5YzUtNmEwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HcyQ9gjSKyzr2SDmeVQ7atMyRrC1hkUc_qiurRryOo=)

clean_body: Because of your support, we closed out January strong and launched this year with real momentum. That early show of belief matters more than you might realize. It allows us to plan ahead, stay organized, and be ready for the work in front of us. | = | Hi Peter, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Because of your support, we closed out January strong and launched this year with real momentum. That early show of belief matters more than you might realize. It allows us to plan ahead, stay organized, and be ready for the work in front of us. I am deeply grateful for everyone who stepped up, shared a word of encouragement, or helped power this campaign forward. Every conversation and every contribution makes a difference. Now we are fully stepping into a new chapter. This year will bring a competitive Democratic primary and a lot of attention to this race. The stakes are high, and the road ahead will not be easy. But I am confident in what we are building together. Thank you for believing in this work, in our shared values, and in a Maryland where families come first and leadership shows up and delivers. I am honored to be in this fight with you. Fellow Conservative,

I’m not writing you today to alarm you, _**but rather to help you understand how precarious our current situation is.**_

During the 2024 campaign, your hard-earned dollars propelled us to victory, capturing not only the House, but the Senate and the White House. And I believe that the last twelve months have been among the most productive in Washington in DECADES.

But if polls are to be believed, then that productivity, our majority, and perhaps even the future of our Republic as we know it today are in danger.

There is no way to put this other than to deliver the bad news outright: **Democrats have extended their lead over Republicans by 14 points on the generic ballot.**

_**If you’ll recall, I only won my seat in Montana by a little more than 7.5%, and in Texas, my friend Sen. Ted Cruz won his race by just over 9%.**_

Hate is a powerful motivator, and Democrats abhor President Trump and all those who stand alongside him.

**_But there is still time._**

**[I’m asking you for a donation of $25, $50, $75, or even $100 right now that we’ll use to help elect Republicans in some of the most fiercely contested races this year. clean_body: The work we are doing in the Senate is too important to stop - but our majority is in grave peril. | Fellow Conservative, I’m not writing you today to alarm you, but rather to help you understand how precarious our current situation is. During the 2024 campaign, your hard-earned dollars propelled us to victory, capturing not only the House, but the Senate and the White House. And I believe that the last twelve months have been among the most productive in Washington in DECADES. But if polls are to be believed, then that productivity, our majority, and perhaps even the future of our Republic as we know it today are in danger. There is no way to put this other than to deliver the bad news outright: Democrats have extended their lead over Republicans by 14 points on the generic ballot. If you’ll recall, I only won my seat in Montana by a little more than 7.5%, and in Texas, my friend Sen. Ted Cruz won his race by just over 9%. Hate is a powerful motivator, and Democrats abhor President Trump and all those who stand alongside him. But there is still time. - No more government shrinkage. No more tax cuts. No more border enforcement measures. I didn’t fight every single day of 2023 and 2024 to win a Senate seat against the most endangered Senate Democrat, only to watch us lose our precious majority because Democrats motivate their voters through lies and hatred of everything we’re doing to make America a better place for everyone. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy U.S. Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

My name is Alex Vindman, and after a lot of discussion, I have made the decision to run for Florida’s United States Senate seat.

I hope you will give me a chance to explain — but if you already know the importance of winning in Florida, then I am asking you to split a Founding Donation between my campaign and Mark Warner today.

[_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-260202-vindman-foundingdonor**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124580814/599054235/239430592?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_VindmanSplit_260202_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjM3Mjc0Zi02YzAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jh0FUcwgn2EY-ntdGpEHc2aIDN2Wjz0dj5c2GgYtS0w=)

Running for the United States Senate in Florida was not an easy decision. I knew the challenges going into this.

Ever since I blew the whistle on Donald Trump’s phone call with Ukraine, the president has had a vendetta against me. He attacks me every chance he gets on social media, and his billionaire allies will spend wherever it takes to pummel us in attack ads.

But as a former combat veteran in the United States Army, we don’t back down from a tough fight. We run towards it.

Our country is in chaos. While thug militias attack citizens and tariffs push prices sky-high, my opponent can’t seem to put public service before her own self-interest.

Ashley Moody screwed Florida homeowners by caving to the big insurance companies, supported this administration that gutted disaster help for communities trying to rebuild, and had over a million dollars in her corporate stock traded last year while she had access to insider information only Congress gets.

Ashley was hand-picked to be a ‘yes’ vote for Trump and the billionaire class. She is not Florida’s senator. She’s theirs.

So, that’s why I am running for the United States Senate. Because it’s time for us to make our voices heard and bring real leadership to Washington.

I know we can put Florida in play and save our democracy against an out-of-control president, but I cannot do it alone.

clean_body: | | | = = Derek, My name is Alex Vindman, and after a lot of discussion, I have made the decision to run for Florida’s United States Senate seat. I hope you will give me a chance to explain — but if you already know the importance of winning in Florida, then I am asking you to split a Founding Donation between my campaign and Mark Warner today. = Running for the United States Senate in Florida was not an easy decision. I knew the challenges going into this. Ever since I blew the whistle on Donald Trump’s phone call with Ukraine, the president has had a vendetta against me. He attacks me every chance he gets on social media, and his billionaire allies will spend wherever it takes to pummel us in attack ads. But as a former combat veteran in the United States Army, we don’t back down from a tough fight. We run towards it. Our country is in chaos. While thug militias attack citizens and tariffs push prices sky-high, my opponent can’t seem to put public service before her own self-interest. Ashley Moody screwed Florida homeowners by caving to the big insurance companies, supported this administration that gutted disaster help for communities trying to rebuild, and had over a million dollars in her corporate stock traded last year while she had access to insider information only Congress gets. Ashley was hand-picked to be a ‘yes’ vote for Trump and the billionaire class. She is not Florida’s senator. She’s theirs. So, that’s why I am running for the United States Senate. Because it’s time for us to make our voices heard and bring real leadership to Washington. I know we can put Florida in play and save our democracy against an out-of-control president, but I cannot do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Alex Vindman and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Every vote — and every dollar — matters. Thank you in advance for anything you can give. Alex Vindman ****=** Alexander Vindman is a former member of the United States Army. ## Commonsense Corner:
---
There’s a new sheriff in town. As you may have heard, Tim is proud to be the new chair of the DOGE subcommittee, and trust us—he’s about to blow the lid off some wild corruption in Washington. Here’s a little taste of what he’s uncovered so far: There are sitting members of Congress who own massive buildings they’re renting back to the federal government. As Benny Johnson put it, it’s like the [snake eating its own tail](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/e9JZ3C4RzOlUv1KLXaxNoLP8uipVVbDO0u0S5NVB0u5vfDxoutj4ZXvTx1louBJf2LQkys9fLqHzfA2-U3ZK2TCrNocBercGo7BLGcu5EipW4dbS3-5mBAzW3iOVl0JlOXM22pBEKA1OF7iTHm6kxc7fLfAxk-OpHJG2n7Kffk4pigH--ceCBCQOZeWIX9AMjL3dObo-HOshxGnqp4XUCCHbMWbH4pbLvqU35I7q4Xbu2xeo_tOPKWW8lTwmLrOJfo0BctytEgujL6CmZYBYvbPfXGTTlM7IJWQgfPqE0kcMepDiwG6ceGcVVkeXFv_PNn5rNWEcZI6GvjgNEK5FWWtH1oTByz98Z4VFi-UrcrSCrM0Rj4LgspBPVaC2mfB6JCcXn96ZpbNKDrhgM_ncXzlHeegq6m7lE_o3HWLxATEX_7K4El2GMZo6qmQwQ3pxcw/DtjbPPu-0kV-YfXfsCSqXe-mIvp2r98z/17). Members of Congress shouldn’t be getting rich off the system they’re supposed to oversee. Have some dadgum decency, for heaven’s sake. Bringing this kinda stuff into the light sure isn’t gonna be easy. We know when you take on the swamp, it fights right back! But Tim didn’t come to Washington to make friends. He came to tell the truth, clean house, and do right by the American people.

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: There’s a new sheriff in town. As you may have heard, Tim is proud to be the new chair of the DOGE subcommittee, and trust us—he’s about to blow the lid off some wild corruption in Washington. Here’s a little taste of what he’s uncovered so far: There are sitting members of Congress who own massive buildings they’re renting back to the federal government. As Benny Johnson put it, it’s like the . Members of Congress shouldn’t be getting rich off the system they’re supposed to oversee. Have some dadgum decency, for heaven’s sake. Bringing this kinda stuff into the light sure isn’t gonna be easy. We know when you take on the swamp, it fights right back! But Tim didn’t come to Washington to make friends. He came to tell the truth, clean house, and do right by the American people. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Do you think members of Congress should be allowed to profit from government leases and contracts? Last Week’s Poll Results | This Week in Tim’s Feed: | Sport Your Support: | | | | | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

**GOOD NEWS!**
We are very pleased to share some good news on the opioid front: **For the first time ever, Colorado has seen a 60% reduction (!) in maternal overdose deaths.**
Unintentional drug overdose is the leading cause of perinatal death nationally and at the state level. We are _so_ glad to see the funding Phil secured as attorney general put to use by the Colorado Perinatal Care Quality Collaborative (CPCQC) to create resources that help everyone.
**[Sign on if you agree: our next governor needs to keep fighting for Coloradans affected by the opioid crisis >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124581121/599055130/-253392148?refcode=ea.97e5f6ab-6d00-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.97e5f6ab-6d00-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2U1ZjZhYi02ZDAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZJGgEGZTAapFvbzl4rWYH6ipIcyvGdMscHu7foDXCI=&emci=c8b82216-5500-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=97e5f6ab-6d00-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=51844520)**

clean_body: Where we’ve been and where we’re going. It’s hard to believe the calendar has already flipped to February! Keep reading for Team Phil updates you won’t want to miss.👇 ICYMI: FEBRUARY FORUMS Join us at the Denver Athletic Club on Saturday, February 21, at 1:30 p.m. to hear from Phil and Michael Bennet about their plans to build an affordable Colorado. If you care about housing, public transit, or increasing opportunity in CO, this one’s for you. YIMBY Colorado will be hosting — | | Busy on Saturday, February 21? No problem. There’s another opportunity the next day! Join us on Sunday, February 22, at 5 p.m. for a virtual forum hosted by Indivisible Colorado. You’ll hear from Phil and other gubernatorial candidates about their plans to lead our state and defend our democracy. | GOOD NEWS! We are very pleased to share some good news on the opioid front: For the first time ever, Colorado has seen a 60% reduction (!) in maternal overdose deaths. Unintentional drug overdose is the leading cause of perinatal death nationally and at the state level. We are so glad to see the funding Phil secured as attorney general put to use by the Colorado Perinatal Care Quality Collaborative (CPCQC) to create resources that help everyone. | SIGN UP AND GET INVOLVED! I am heartbroken.
You’ve probably seen the videos of ICE’s violence and chaos coming from every corner of Minnesota.
What’s happening in Minnesota makes it clear: **We need Senators who will stand up for what's right all the time, not just when it's politically expedient.**
We need Senators who reject the status quo and who will fight for big, bold change.
Minnesotans have a really clear choice in this race. My Democratic primary opponent publicly praised Trump’s ICE and voted to strip immigrants of due process last year.
I will make sure we treat every person in Minnesota with the dignity and respect they deserve. That means comprehensive immigration reform, a pathway to citizenship, and completely overhauling ICE.
It’s time to build an immigration system that keeps every member of our community safe.
**I’m running for Senate to stand up to Trump, stop his dangerous agenda, and stop ICE from terrorizing our communities. Minnesotans deserve safety, compassion, and due process — not fear.**
**[I will always stand with Minnesota. If you can pitch in $5 or $10 today to stand with me and The Jane Fonda Climate PAC, I'd really appreciate your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124581245/599055440/89281171?refcode=ea.dd2afa2f-6e00-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.dd2afa2f-6e00-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkMmFmYTJmLTZlMDAtZjExMS04MzJmLTAwMGQzYTFmMGU0YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P1f3Dfl-6aAv9XegeNhLtL-BOXBQuUENvYDEN7aDsJY=)**

clean_body: | | This message is from our JanePAC-endorsed climate champ for U.S. Senate in Minnesota, Peggy Flanagan. = I am heartbroken. You’ve probably seen the videos of ICE’s violence and chaos coming from every corner of Minnesota. What’s happening in Minnesota makes it clear: We need Senators who will stand up for what's right all the time, not just when it's politically expedient. We need Senators who reject the status quo and who will fight for big, bold change. Minnesotans have a really clear choice in this race. My Democratic primary opponent publicly praised Trump’s ICE and voted to strip immigrants of due process last year. I will make sure we treat every person in Minnesota with the dignity and respect they deserve. That means comprehensive immigration reform, a pathway to citizenship, and completely overhauling ICE. It’s time to build an immigration system that keeps every member of our community safe. I’m running for Senate to stand up to Trump, stop his dangerous agenda, and stop ICE from terrorizing our communities. Minnesotans deserve safety, compassion, and due process — not fear. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being in this with me, 💚 Peggy | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| | For Immediate Release | Feb 02, 2026 – Grand Rapids, Michigan OP-ED: Why are you Black?A Journey from Nigger to Negro to Black.You were born, raised, educated, and employed, yet at some point you blindly accepted this "Black" label, one that biology can't justify, but somehow everyone tells you this is what you are. Deep down, you know: You are you, with an evolutionary adaptation to sunlight just like every other human being.
Yet, no matter how clever or smart you thought you were, someone convinced you to believe what you know in your heart isn't true. In fact, like a programmed tool, you also then accept that someone else is "White", another absurdity, yet you and that person accept it without question.
And now both of you are easily manipulated emotionally and physically into believing, saying, and even doing despicable things on the basis of these labels. You tick the box on forms without a second thought. They even say you are special. You were given the privilege of the single shortest month of the year to celebrate "your history", with a label you didn't choose, but somehow accepted without question. You are the only one with a "history month" defined entirely by the appearance of your skin? Interesting, yet you fight to keep this label like your life depends on it.
If you can't define who you are on your own terms and become who you want to be, then accept the simple truth, that another human being has molded you in the image they want you to be, and you have become a mindless avatar used by someone more clever and smarter, making you hold the line to ensure division persists, while they enrich themselves. Austin ChengeUS Army VeteranFormer Republican Candidate for Governor of Michigan For more information, contact:
The Office of Austin Chenge
Website: [www.austinchenge.com](https://austinchenge.com/so/75PmVjYb5/c?w=eD1OdhdjhoORxY6JKL57FQOgp9x4k0zoxhGRPl_amdw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5hdXN0aW5jaGVuZ2UuY29tIiwiciI6ImE4OWUxMWYyLTdlNjUtNGRjMS05ZWQzLWIxMWRhOTQxN2ZlZCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjIyZWRmOWZhLWFjOWItNDY2Yi1hZDVjLTI1ODY3NjIyOThhYSJ9) The Office of Austin Chenge.
