name: Roy Cooper
subject: Ready to move mountains with me?
body:
There’s a better path forward.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
**Together, we can move mountains for this country, Peter.** We’ve had to do it right here in North Carolina — we spent _years_ working to get Medicaid Expansion, and we finally got Republicans to the table and got it passed. It wasn’t easy. We’ve had to fight like hell for every step forward we’ve taken. But I’m conscious of the fact that there is much more that needs to be done to protect the rights of Americans and provide a better path for the future when some politicians are set on dragging us back. Extreme Republicans have banned abortion in states across the country, endangered our public education system, and rolled back critical legislation combating climate change. They even slashed funding for Medicaid and SNAP just to give tax breaks to the richest. **This is wrong, Peter, but I still believe that we can change things.** I believe that every elected leader must do the hard work of creating safety, prosperity, and opportunity for all Americans, and that if we do, America can still be a place where dreams are fulfilled. **[Everything is possible when we do it together. I’m ready to do everything in my power to make this country better for all of us, but I need your help to make it to the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to donate right now?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5258?t=7&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5259?t=8&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5260?t=9&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5261?t=10&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5262?t=11&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5263?t=12&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5264?t=13&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
---
Thanks so much,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5258?t=14&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=468%2E124072%2Eaw5o4o)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Senator Katie Britt (AL)
subject: This is personal, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
I need your trust right now.
|
---
| | | | [](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,
I need to ask a favor of you. _**_This is personal_**_.
I just heard something in a**__highly sensitive__** D.C. meeting that I cannot, in good conscience, accept.
The news they presented suggested that the __**core spirit**__ and _**_dedication_ **_of our movement—the very thing we have fought for—is starting to _**fail**_.
_**[They were so smug about it, but I know the truth lies with the grassroots patriots like you.](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**_
I don't believe this news for a second, but I need you to hear what they are trying to spread. I need a __trusted__ patriot to listen to my concerns and help me put this terrible narrative to rest for good.
---
|
---
**[I am humbly asking you to hear me out right now, Friend](https://link.email.brittforsenate.).**
|
---
**[Please click the link below—it's the only way I can share the urgency of this situation:](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**
|
---
[Read my Urgent Message](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
For the fight,
\- Katie Britt, U.S. Senator (AL)
|
---
| | ****

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
|
---
[STAND WITH KATIE >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
| |
# **We'd be sad to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving our emails, click[HERE](https://link.email.brittforsenate.com/click/e13188/VaHR0cHM6Ly9iZmEubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYnJpdHRmb3JzZW5hdGVfY29tMjYwMjAy/LbmNsWjNhU284/qP2hpZHM9bmNveFdJWmFmbzc4bHM/gaYEANA/s4k53a876df)**
---
| | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.
---

Will you stand with me? | | | | We'd be sad to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving our emails, click** | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Washington Examiner: Trump is making healthcare affordable again
body:
| | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=86b2e02adb004f40ba983b7c9afea495&_e=g4L7k_0Iu5zwhVlPihFWm8rQy-atoZ_dvGkFRxXJckGzqJQD5ypJHKmN537RDwZZ7ibnwm9ug4hP6f06QsCQC04p9nJ-gr5JBFrE8zATgu1NWRKXOUV29rdCxD3NrL0i0dgTehf3s3zNqpoBmdczaO-THn94Tt9cjm8PEHf4EBYpGekeh8W2H1CakXuWgkloHb03_32osniVWSSMI9W26SwfceUWwXVDD2DFJYrCR1qNF5syttcjbgT-_mxTp5uh2S0OWKBGf0IBh0O7R281rIbzirqiHHuxom8c30Ncjio2cLDICUO0YYDykW1-5l5d)
---

---
**Trump is making healthcare affordable again** By Bobby Jindal & Charlie Katebi
---
As healthcare costs continue to squeeze family budgets, Congress remains locked in debate over extending enhanced COVID-era Obamacare insurance company subsidies that artificially lower premiums for some consumers. Rather than wait for band-aid proposals from Congress, President Donald Trump is taking decisive action to deliver real reforms that lower costs for all Americans — not just the ones on Obamacare.

Currently, seniors pay significantly more for services when visiting clinics owned by a hospital system, rather than an office that is independently owned and operated by a physician. Medicare Part B, which covers outpatient care, pays 170% higher prices for procedures, 30% higher prices for imaging services, and 20% higher prices for tests delivered in a hospital-owned facility compared to independently owned offices. Since seniors with Part B must pay a 20% coinsurance rate for every service they receive, these payment differences can add hundreds or thousands of dollars to a senior’s annual medical expenses. For example, a patient who visits a physician’s office to receive a spinal injection would pay $51. However, if the same patient visited a hospital-owned office for the exact same service, they would pay $148. These preferential payment rates have encouraged large hospital systems to acquire thousands of physician offices. This influx has inflated the cost of care for seniors and taxpayers and has created healthcare monopolies. Between 2004 and 2024, the cost of healthcare in Medicare’s Part B rose 281%, increasing from $135 billion to $516 billion. Seniors have borne these rising costs through higher premiums and out-of-pocket fees. Industry consolidation has also led to higher premiums for patients with commercial insurance. [**Finish reading at WashingtonExaminer.com**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=86b2e02adb004f40ba983b7c9afea495&_e=g4L7k_0Iu5zwhVlPihFWmww4rgkyM4t32Xqm_zJ09VP1KXu5v_YpYg9BtkG3nbGHxoHfIqf-c7-alLpgsOlITKYZri3vgJt06Bk1t43dO7UDNK_zDBjlxQjO6E3PxgDmwBO11HrGF9aZZ4ttbn__OkRfqR2X6w0pO5DF8eU-iRl4BJVG7A0uAkd0EoGf6nErO_3tx0kLWVujTQpJ6W3WJgzUaRYLIOKD0LvroDMKbEf832zKuAmMlcnmBlEObo05Yd6FRpiH-shRJW5_JaPECpASz3fPyRfWxEfb555fF6tLrf79hJoe3fqpktfTibB2pF-jqnmxDjw2ARnXP7Dwm2zxX5Sk22iYPZtP-2sOsD57Uo3UDLXhkhJu8Ip85z1SKbunPPLd4xoWzo0rT9TJGaSJKDtMs4GGzKTTlKtibyv9wKh8OvmI8rXRPdCEuwPDchq90y2wV-4LTX5KY2PvbZfVXNIe1OyZ8rTZ7LFVl7wrzVfvIyXnJXLmi0JMAI-3Hf9s_fj5_4xV8eHpLYbHk9q3TShANALZB9i5hmkP8oCYZPiUdOdbLL5Mmol2Ec0nnPJIucmrFMeEjBI5MS53Fki45SXlVyoCHKn1vaKARRY%3D)

subject: Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent John Sununu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This changes everything.
Peter, this changes everything:
**Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent, John Sununu, in an incredible shake-up to our race for Senate.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100329?refcode=em20260202-10019&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10019%2E614464%2E_7LFkp)

Trump said that Sununu has his **“complete and total endorsement”** — and that will come with a tidal wave of Republican spending to try to flip this Senate seat.
**[Peter, I’m counting on the help of this grassroots team to fight back. If you were waiting for a sign to step up and join our movement, this is it. Please split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us stand up to Trump’s hand-picked candidate today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100329?refcode=em20260202-10019&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10019%2E614464%2E_7LFkp)**

name: Ruth's List HQ
subject: Week 3 Update: Ruth’s Watchlist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ruth's List Florida Incorporated
body:
RuthsListFL.org [RuthsListFL.org]
Peter,
As Week 3 of Florida’s Legislative Session closes, it is clear that the Republican Majority intends to push through several dangerous, extreme policies related to reproductive care, regardless of the numerous concerns that legislators and advocates have shared over these policies’ potential impacts on public health, education, safety, and even affordability.
Fortunately, our Ruth’s List alumnae in the State House and Senate will not back down from a fight when our rights are on the line, and neither will we. Together, we’ve stopped these policies from passing the Legislature before and together, we can do it again.
Here are the bills that you can take action on today:
❌ SB 164/HB 289 Civil Liability for the Wrongful Death of an Unborn Child: This bill has now passed the Florida House, as well as two of three of its committee stops in the Florida Senate [https://floridapolitics.com/archives/776815-after-long-debate-senate-committee-oks-changing-wrongful-death-act-to-cover-fetuses/] . SB 164 would jeopardize access to fertility and emergency care services by opening litigation floodgates on doctors that provide care for pregnant women. As Senator Tina Polsky noted in debate, “this bill talks about litigation and raising economic damages when there already are remedies in law for the unbearable idea of losing a pregnancy through the negligence of another.”
This bill has been filed before, but each year it fails because it is too extreme, even for the Republican supermajority. Now, it’s just two votes away from the Governor’s desk. That’s why we are urging you to contact your State Senator now and tell them to vote no on SB 164. [https://www.weareplannedparenthoodaction.org/a/sb164-hb289-action]
Contact Your State Senator [https://www.weareplannedparenthoodaction.org/a/sb164-hb289-action]
❌ SB 1090/HB 1071 Education is beginning to move quickly through the legislative process, despite lawmakers and members of the public voicing deep concerns over its potential harmful effects on access to sexual/reproductive healthcare education in Florida schools and its mandate of the use of certain content, like the infamous “Baby Olivia” video, which was made by one of America’s largest, most extreme anti-choice organizations.
HB 1071 has now passed favorably through two of its three committee assignments, but we still have the power to stop it in its tracks. Please, take a moment and contact your Representatives now and tell them to vote no on HB 1071 and its companion bill, SB 1090. [https://www.plannedparenthoodaction.org/planned-parenthood-florida-action/session/indoctrination-in-public-schools-sb-1090-hb-1071]
TAKE ACTION on SB 1090/HB 1071 [https://www.plannedparenthoodaction.org/planned-parenthood-florida-action/session/indoctrination-in-public-schools-sb-1090-hb-1071]
❌SB 166/HB 173 Parental Rights would prohibit physicians from providing contraception and STI testing to minors without parental consent, regardless of the minor’s personal circumstances. This bill faced bipartisan opposition in 2025 for being so extreme, but now it is starting to make progress in the Florida House.
But, HB 173 has only passed one committee stop in the House so far, and we still have time to stop this bill from passing both chambers. If you haven’t done so already, please contact your representatives and tell them to vote NO on SB 166/HB 173.
TAKE ACTION on SB 166/HB 173 [https://www.weareplannedparenthoodaction.org/a/sb-166-hb-173-action]
Despite having to defend attacks against our healthcare, our alumnae are still showing up for their constituents and working hard to make life better for all Floridians. Here are several bills sponsored by RLF-alums that are making progress towards passage this Session:
✅CS/SB 298 and CS/SB 296, sponsored by Senate Democratic Leader Lori Berman, has passed the Florida Senate and awaits voting in the House. Leader Berman, a longtime champion for women, children, and victims of domestic violence, is continuing her fight to make Florida families safer by advocating for the HAVEN Act.
🗞️ Senate passes ‘HAVEN Act’ to expand state protections for victims of domestic, dating violence [https://floridapolitics.com/archives/776904-senate-passes-haven-act-to-expand-state-protections-for-victims-of-domestic-dating-violence/]
As its companion bill, HB 269, in the House awaits a hearing, we will be tracking this legislation closely and sharing updates on how you can support this bill soon.
✅SB 42/HB 47 Specific Medical Diagnoses in Child Protective Investigations has passed favorably through its first committee assignments in each chamber. In the House, Representative Robin Bartleman introduced this bill, alongside fellow RLF-alums Representatives Anna Eskamani and Debra Tendrich. This bill would create specific language in statute providing guidance to the Department of Children and Families and Child Protection Teams in Florida in the handling of children with unique medical conditions undergoing protective investigations.
✅HB 675 Affordable Housing has passed unanimously through its first committee in the Florida House. This bill, introduced by House Democratic Leader Fentrice Driskell, prioritizes making housing more affordable in our state, a top concern for many residents, and seeks to lower costs especially for first-time homebuyers.
Companion bill SB 756 is being carried by Senate Democratic Leader Pro-Tempore Tracie Davis, along with fellow alums Senators LaVon Bracy Davis and Kristen Arrington.
While the Republican Majority concerns itself with rolling back our rights, Democrats are laser-focused on what Floridians care about most: living safely and freely in a place that they can afford.
If you’ve made it this far, thank you for supporting the work of our alumnae in office, as well as our work at Ruth’s List to build the bench of elected women leaders in Florida. With your help, we’ve elected hundreds of women to state and local office that champion policies to improve life for us all.
Can you help us start off February strong by making a donation today? Your support will help us elect even more pro-choice women on Election Day this year.
- Ruth’s List HQ
DONATE [https://secure.everyaction.com/vzMqwlHd4Uu9OKikQzWffQ2]
Did someone forward you this email? Subscribe to our list by clicking here [https://secure.everyaction.com/KrLB7bwpn0SpPj0TG_lnyg2] .

Here are several bills sponsored by RLF-alums that are making progress towards passage this Session: ✅CS/SB 298 and CS/SB 296, sponsored by Senate Democratic Leader Lori Berman, has passed the Florida Senate and awaits voting in the House. Leader Berman, a longtime champion for women, children, and victims of domestic violence, is continuing her fight to make Florida families safer by advocating for the HAVEN Act. 🗞️ Senate passes ‘HAVEN Act’ to expand state protections for victims of domestic, dating violence [] As its companion bill, HB 269, in the House awaits a hearing, we will be tracking this legislation closely and sharing updates on how you can support this bill soon. ✅SB 42/HB 47 Specific Medical Diagnoses in Child Protective Investigations has passed favorably through its first committee assignments in each chamber. In the House, Representative Robin Bartleman introduced this bill, alongside fellow RLF-alums Representatives Anna Eskamani and Debra Tendrich. This bill would create specific language in statute providing guidance to the Department of Children and Families and Child Protection Teams in Florida in the handling of children with unique medical conditions undergoing protective investigations. ✅HB 675 Affordable Housing has passed unanimously through its first committee in the Florida House. This bill, introduced by House Democratic Leader Fentrice Driskell, prioritizes making housing more affordable in our state, a top concern for many residents, and seeks to lower costs especially for first-time homebuyers. Companion bill SB 756 is being carried by Senate Democratic Leader Pro-Tempore Tracie Davis, along with fellow alums Senators LaVon Bracy Davis and Kristen Arrington. While the Republican Majority concerns itself with rolling back our rights, Democrats are laser-focused on what Floridians care about most: living safely and freely in a place that they can afford. If you’ve made it this far, thank you for supporting the work of our alumnae in office, as well as our work at Ruth’s List to build the bench of elected women leaders in Florida. With your help, we’ve elected hundreds of women to state and local office that champion policies to improve life for us all. Can you help us start off February strong by making a donation today? Your support will help us elect even more pro-choice women on Election Day this year. - Ruth’s List HQ DONATE [] Did someone forward you this email? Subscribe to our list by clicking here [] . Follow us on social media: [] [] [] [] [] BECOME A MEMBER [] DONATE [] Paid for by Ruth's List Florida Incorporated. Contributions are not tax deductible. Ruth’s List FL P.O. Box 7368 St Petersburg, FL 33734 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 2/2/2026
body:
Colorado appeals court orders new briefs after state flags statute oversight in Tina Peters case
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**February 2, 2026** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Rocky Mountain Voice family,
We want to begin today’s digest by circling back to the Tina Peters case, which once again dominated readership and engagement across Rocky Mountain Voice this week — not just because of one development, but because several threads are now converging at the same time.
Our most viral story by far focused on [new sworn court admissions from former Dominion executive Eric Coomer](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), which reignited unresolved questions tied directly to the Mesa County election case. That reporting [spread rapidly on social media](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and became one of our **_most-read stories _ever__** , underscoring just how much public interest still surrounds the facts that were never examined before Peters was prosecuted.
At the same time, our reporting on [Peters being assaulted in prison](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and then placed into isolation became the second-most-read story of the week. That piece raised serious questions about inmate safety, classification, and whether Peters — a nonviolent, elderly inmate — is being housed appropriately while her appeal remains unresolved.
**But the most time-sensitive development is happening now in the appellate court.**
Late last week, the Colorado Court of Appeals ordered new briefing after the Attorney General’s Office acknowledged it had [overlooked a key statutory issue tied to Peters’ felony charge](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Rather than issuing a ruling based on an incomplete legal framework, the court paused the appeal and required both sides to submit new filings.
What that means is that the court is actively reassessing whether the correct version of the law was applied — a narrow question, but one with significant consequences. At the same time, Peters’ defense has asked the court to [reconsider bond pending appeal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), arguing that circumstances have changed, that the appellate timeline has been extended, and that her continued incarceration now raises safety concerns that were not before the court at sentencing.
_Those filings are now in motion. The court has not ruled._
Over the weekend, speculation circulated online about Peters possibly being released. At this point, we have **not seen documentation or a court order confirming that claim** , and we want to be clear with readers: while a bond request is pending, no release has been ordered as of this writing. We will report that immediately if and when it happens.
What makes this moment different is not any single headline, but the convergence of facts: sworn admissions in related litigation, a reopened appellate briefing due to a statutory oversight, documented safety issues inside the prison, and a court now reconsidering whether continued incarceration is appropriate while these questions remain unresolved.
Beyond the legal proceedings, the political implications are becoming harder to ignore. Democratic leaders — particularly Attorney General Phil Weiser — have begun pointing to the handling of the Tina Peters case as evidence of their enforcement record. If the case ultimately shifts in Peters’ favor, that posture could carry real consequences for the 2026 state elections, especially for figures like Weiser and Secretary of State Jena Griswold who have tied their political narratives to its outcome.
This case is still moving — and the next filings and orders will matter.
As always, we’ll keep our focus on what’s verifiable, what’s documented, and what the courts actually do — not rumor or speculation. We’ve linked our full reporting below so you can follow each piece for yourself. We’ll continue covering developments closely as they unfold.
— Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Eric Coomer’s court admissions reignite unresolved questions in Colorado’s Mesa County election case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY A.L. GOODWIN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Recent court filings in Coomer v. Byrne et al., Case No. 8:24-cv-00008-TPB-SPF (M.D. Fla.), contain sworn admissions by Dr. Eric Coomer, the former Director of Product Strategy and Security for Dominion Voting Systems, that materially alter the public understanding of foreign interaction with U.S. election system technology._
__
**[A closet, a camera and a setup: Tina Peters assaulted in prison then thrown into solitary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY A.L. GOODWIN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _On the evening of January 18, just after 9:00 p.m., Tina Peters was assaulted inside the La Vista Correctional Facility in Pueblo, Colorado—not in a yard or a common area, but in a narrow janitor’s closet, out of view of surveillance cameras._

**[Colorado appeals court orders new briefs after state flags statute oversight in Tina Peters case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Colorado Court of Appeals has reopened briefing in Tina Peters’ criminal appeal after the state acknowledged it overlooked a key statutory issue while briefing and arguing the case. The appeal’s timeline changed on Jan. 29, when the Court of Appeals ordered a new round of briefing following a late filing from the Attorney General, a “notice of erratum” addressing the felony charge.
|
---
**LEGISLATIVE SESSION**
**[Colorado’s quiet revival: A custody provision lawmakers stripped is back in SB26-018](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) When Colorado lawmakers removed custody language from a transgender-related bill in 2025, the fight appeared to cool — or at least move out of view. It didn’t last. Jan. 14 marked the formal introduction of Senate Bill 26-018, backed in the Senate by Katie Wallace and Chris Kolker and carried in the House by Meg Froelich and Lorena García. No Republicans signed on.
__
**[Colorado Homeowners Face Property Tax Shock After Temporary Relief Expires](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Mike Fitz, 76, who lives in Centennial in a single-family home he has owned since 2001, paid $3,876.98 in property taxes to Arapahoe County two years ago. Fitz just learned after checking the website of the Arapahoe County Assessor’s Office that his 2026 tax bill has shot up to $5,435.47, and that already factors in a discount of $750 for the senior homestead exemption.
**[Colorado Lawmakers Lean on Fees to Sidestep TABOR Tax Limits](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) More than 30 years after Colorado voters approved the Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights, a growing share of state spending now falls outside the voter-approved limits intended to restrain government growth.

**[READ MORE ON LEGISLATIVE SESSION](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**STATE**
**[Sheriffs and prosecutors rally behind Michael Allen for attorney general, cite courtroom experience](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A handful of sheriffs and district attorneys from different parts of the state have come out in support of Fourth Judicial District Attorney Michael Allen, today, as he campaigns for Colorado attorney general. The endorsements focus on his years spent in actual courtrooms prosecuting cases and the way he’s managed to cut back on some crimes in his district.

**[Medicaid Cuts For Disabled Coloradans Advance Without Board Approval](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) When it came time for any of the Colorado Medical Services Board members to make a motion, there was only dead silence. For two hours, the 11-member board that governs the state Medicaid program heard pleas from parents who provide round-the-clock care of their adult children with severe disabilities.
**[Colorado voters to decide future of police cooperation with ICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Initiative 95 would amend the state constitution to require that police officers, sheriff’s deputies and prosecutors alert federal immigration authorities if they charge someone whose immigration status is in question if that person has a prior felony conviction or the charge is for an alleged violent crime.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Obama Implicated in Newly Released Russiagate Documents as Tulsi Gabbard Refers Evidence to DOJ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE GATEWAY PUNDIT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard, released a bombshell report with new and damning information on Wednesday. On Wednesday afternoon she shared with White House reporters at the daily briefing.

**[CCP-Linked Activist Network Backs National Anti-ICE Strike](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Acollection of far-left groups — led by a Communist activist network tied to CCP-linked millionaire Marxist Neville Roy Singham — is attempting to organize a nationwide anti-ICE school and business shutdown, with anti-Israel activist Linda Sarsour declaring that “we will bring this country to a halt.”
**[Green Energy Fell Short When Winter Storm Fern Tested the Grid](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) With America’s power grid stressed by a historic winter storm, expensive “green” energy sources like wind and solar proved unreliable. The analysis backs up Trump’s recent moves regarding wind energy.
_**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Mayor Johnston Promises Resistance if ICE Comes to Denver](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER7](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) On Monday [last week], Denver Mayor Mike Johnston outlined his goals for the city in 2026, which included safety, affordability, and climate resilience. However, before Johnston dove into what he wants to see in Denver this year, he addressed rising community fears sparked by two deadly federal enforcement encounters in Minneapolis, vowing to protect residents if ICE were to target Colorado.
**[Inside the Assessor’s Office: Why Greg Ketcham Is Running for Jefferson County Assessor](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) For most Jefferson County residents, the assessor’s office only becomes visible when a valuation notice arrives in the mail. For Greg Ketcham, the office has been his professional home for more than eight years — and it’s the reason he decided to run for Jefferson County Assessor.

**[PRCA Chooses Cheyenne Partnership Over Staying in Colorado Springs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[KDVR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Professional Rodeo Cowboys Association (PRCA) has announced that it will move from its current headquarters in Colorado Springs to Cheyenne, Wyoming. According to a press release from the PRCA, the Board of Directors has approved a “non-binding memorandum of understanding to seriously consider relocating the organization’s headquarters, along with the PRCA Hall of Fame and Museum of the American Cowboy, to Wyoming.”
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Joe Oltmann, Eric Coomer, and the War Over Reality](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Joe Oltmann is one of the most polarizing political figures to come out of Colorado in the post-2020 era, but the real story isn’t whether you like him, dislike him, or agree with every word he has said. The story is what happens to a person who steps into the most dangerous topic in modern American life, election integrity, and refuses to retreat when the pressure escalates._
__
**[There Is No Constitutional Right to “Protest”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MICHAEL J BADAGLIACCO "MJB", [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In the heated discourse surrounding civil unrest and public demonstrations, a common phrase echoes through media and activism: the right to “peacefully protest.” Contrary to popular opinion, this term appears nowhere in the United States Constitution._
__

**[When “affordable housing” means government-funded housing in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) This commentary argues Colorado’s so-called “affordable housing” is effectively government-funded housing, driven by state and federal grants, tax credits, and redirected TABOR funds that benefit politically connected developers while expanding high-density projects and long-term public subsidy dependence rather than market-driven affordability.
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|

There are now just 36 days until the special election in Georgia to fill the seat vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene. 20 Republicans are running. One Democrat is running. I'm that Democrat. This is how we win. This is how we take back the House -- and put a check on Trump's rampage against our Democracy. I'm Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat. Husband. Father. Retired Brigadier General. | Peter,
On Friday, the DOJ released its newest trove of documents related to the Epstein child trafficking network.
Among the thousands of new files is a FBI document detailing allegations the FBI was looking into regarding Trump and Epstein trafficking children. Shortly after making it public, the DOJ quickly removed the document from their website.
However, many internet sleuths were able to save the file and it is now available on the website of Congressman Seth Moulton (D-MA).
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gt1fowGNFxCLDNGpqNxQt8ZC0ZKykRRYP-7Bwl3dpzzV88rVOLOz3hJQEo61K8MeSMKU_-sodXSwcqnyJbaxRDnPvci-oESIvnYFFUzm7145VgVsSwpOEk5BFjKO6dEjSjpkA5mYtZlmLl5mz7yPBQ6cpDXjGQ4gxOk2QA4nIcis28wmQhGDtSSrSP2WpNQbPcmhQHvkrVfjjLJjZFgXl77C-RX2hqzjMjfrG3LsZLo=&c=ozn6HDrU0pevT1BciIqwoktt_RW052Naer-26QptOpkpCVPXhTum6g==&ch=3N-yTZF3glZXPiMu_GOD13M6qoTcwfp8pr5-pM9eSTvVGjBi15jTXA==)
---
Among the allegations in the FBI document is that Trump participated in orgies with young girls alongside former President Bill Clinton and that he would host parties at his home in Mar-A-Lago called "calendar girls," where Jeffrey Epstein would bring children for Trump to auction off.
But it gets far worse, another aspect the FBI was investigating was a young woman who was allegedly assaulted by Trump and in the aftermath disappeared. Years later remains matching what she wore the night she went missing were uncovered but DNA tests were inconclusive.
Another alleged alleged victim mentioned in the FBI file reported being threatened by Trump's then head of security who said that if she ever talked of what happened she would "end up as fertilizer for the back nine holes [referring to the Trump golf course in Rancho Palos Verdes] like the other c***s."
Our opponent Lauren Boebert is complicit in the coverup of these crimes. For years she campaigned on how she would release the files and demand justice but now that the files are out there and they indict President Trump, she's dropped her stance on justice and was recently quoted saying "nobody gives a rip about Epstein anymore."
We just outraised her for the 2nd quarter in a row, this time by a margin of 5:1, and when Trisha and Boebert went head to head in 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district.
Turning the Epstein files into the Epstein trials starts with taking back the House and removing his #1 enabler and defender -- Lauren Boebert. [We are poised to do it but we need your help. Can we count on you to make a donation of whatever amount is meaningful to you? Our average donation is $25. Many give more, some give less, the amount doesn't matter because they will add up.](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gt1fowGNFxCLDNGpqNxQt8ZC0ZKykRRYP-7Bwl3dpzzV88rVOLOz3hJQEo61K8Mek-0C-_UF3dVwJvKXxQ5MpV7PkNtpIzMM3OCINb1RKZN279ue7lgGCRZR4JsXgXhukZmTQACXoLA_-uZUqyuat18ymVzb4ojzNbuKw5vaneeRG9K84EqyY8APac7EnE9-TE-9ONVPYHSveCXblzuJFPkGrXfLp60Gv-X7fWKxn4uiQlZuD7IOUQ==&c=ozn6HDrU0pevT1BciIqwoktt_RW052Naer-26QptOpkpCVPXhTum6g==&ch=3N-yTZF3glZXPiMu_GOD13M6qoTcwfp8pr5-pM9eSTvVGjBi15jTXA==)

clean_body: | | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However == you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | == | Peter, On Friday, the DOJ released its newest trove of documents related to the Epstein child trafficking network. Among the thousands of new files is a FBI document detailing allegations the FBI was looking into regarding Trump and Epstein trafficking children. Shortly after making it public, the DOJ quickly removed the document from their website. However, many internet sleuths were able to save the file and it is now available on the website of Congressman Seth Moulton (D-MA). | == Among the allegations in the FBI document is that Trump participated in orgies with young girls alongside former President Bill Clinton and that he would host parties at his home in Mar-A-Lago called "calendar girls," where Jeffrey Epstein would bring children for Trump to auction off. But it gets far worse, another aspect the FBI was investigating was a young woman who was allegedly assaulted by Trump and in the aftermath disappeared. Years later remains matching what she wore the night she went missing were uncovered but DNA tests were inconclusive. Another alleged alleged victim mentioned in the FBI file reported being threatened by Trump's then head of security who said that if she ever talked of what happened she would "end up as fertilizer for the back nine holes [referring to the Trump golf course in Rancho Palos Verdes] like the other c***s." Our opponent Lauren Boebert is complicit in the coverup of these crimes. For years she campaigned on how she would release the files and demand justice but now that the files are out there and they indict President Trump, she's dropped her stance on justice and was recently quoted saying "nobody gives a rip about Epstein anymore." We just outraised her for the 2nd quarter in a row, this time by a margin of 5:1, and when Trisha and Boebert went head to head in 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. Turning the Epstein files into the Epstein trials starts with taking back the House and removing his #1 enabler and defender -- Lauren Boebert. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you for your support in this critical fight. Team Trisha | == | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th Congressional District. Trisha is a labor leader, federal public servant, and native daughter of the district. Trisha fought for working Americans as the speechwriter of the National AFL-CIO and will carry that fight to D.C. as the next Congresswoman for CO-4. | | | == Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado | | | | 9609 S University Blvd, PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However [if you'd like to unsubscribe,](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l1g0MsXkWj_Fa3u7QL3_BlwxWV4rnfRaq3XDBF973nfqAQtvIqQs3H0KNflPWRQvT4ykM1ErTJ3KJIWsH9hPtSJN-mVKgLoAuGuL4DDlva_qMucnlRxAXXkjUjNnIk3VjRcVAOXmw0f191IuQEjjedHq38sAlraWWOW1dt91N9vM7hafKqkaaH4xPZejltSR9uCwW9AMDKE=&c=3VpsaIl0Q13BJJrX30f4wRW_3E8mEAScUv4cJydxm32yLVOdkj5P4w==&ch=0VPzjN87LlQb-cIJHaJfkNPjQLMGPer0kfWgkPXmAnTQlfuFXVVoqw==) you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.

| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l1g0MsXkWj_Fa3u7QL3_BlwxWV4rnfRaq3XDBF973nfqAQtvIqQs3HIAcZBvQD-Ce1aWKIpDXDVvt6P12GXnAPlTu72_U0_ZnRV4mu_UkpcuuY2QWVhn8wZx2pjSZBJNXdLJNDAc5NyN-lTqnwdLvO-YfpcXu1zf8y0cT-KNM1XH-CeTDCBRjpCp6xIbjn-27F1XdIOTE1p-1QT0-ojBlOV3TnezPtgexZMzfcg7Glw=&c=3VpsaIl0Q13BJJrX30f4wRW_3E8mEAScUv4cJydxm32yLVOdkj5P4w==&ch=0VPzjN87LlQb-cIJHaJfkNPjQLMGPer0kfWgkPXmAnTQlfuFXVVoqw==)
---
| Peter,
On Friday, the DOJ released its newest trove of documents related to the Epstein child trafficking network.
Among the thousands of new files is a FBI document detailing allegations the FBI was looking into regarding Trump and Epstein trafficking children. Shortly after making it public, the DOJ quickly removed the document from their website.
However, many internet sleuths were able to save the file and it is now available on the website of Congressman Seth Moulton (D-MA).
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l1g0MsXkWj_Fa3u7QL3_BlwxWV4rnfRaq3XDBF973nfqAQtvIqQs3HIAcZBvQD-Ce1aWKIpDXDVvt6P12GXnAPlTu72_U0_ZnRV4mu_UkpcuuY2QWVhn8wZx2pjSZBJNXdLJNDAc5NyN-lTqnwdLvO-YfpcXu1zf8y0cT-KNM1XH-CeTDCBRjpCp6xIbjn-27F1XdIOTE1p-1QT0-ojBlJqcLw8H5HEUO68gacB7x8Q=&c=3VpsaIl0Q13BJJrX30f4wRW_3E8mEAScUv4cJydxm32yLVOdkj5P4w==&ch=0VPzjN87LlQb-cIJHaJfkNPjQLMGPer0kfWgkPXmAnTQlfuFXVVoqw==)
---
Among the allegations in the FBI document is that Trump participated in orgies with young girls alongside former President Bill Clinton and that he would host parties at his home in Mar-A-Lago called "calendar girls," where Jeffrey Epstein would bring children for Trump to auction off.
But it gets far worse, another aspect the FBI was investigating was a young woman who was allegedly assaulted by Trump and in the aftermath disappeared. Years later remains matching what she wore the night she went missing were uncovered but DNA tests were inconclusive.
Another alleged alleged victim mentioned in the FBI file reported being threatened by Trump's then head of security who said that if she ever talked of what happened she would "end up as fertilizer for the back nine holes [referring to the Trump golf course in Rancho Palos Verdes] like the other c***s."
Our opponent Lauren Boebert is complicit in the coverup of these crimes. For years she campaigned on how she would release the files and demand justice but now that the files are out there and they indict President Trump, she's dropped her stance on justice and was recently quoted saying "nobody gives a rip about Epstein anymore."
We just outraised her for the 2nd quarter in a row, this time by a margin of 5:1, and when Trisha and Boebert went head to head in 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district.
Turning the Epstein files into the Epstein trials starts with taking back the House and removing his #1 enabler and defender -- Lauren Boebert. [We are poised to do it but we need your help. Can we count on you to make a donation of whatever amount is meaningful to you? Our average donation is $25. Many give more, some give less, the amount doesn't matter because they will add up.](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l1g0MsXkWj_Fa3u7QL3_BlwxWV4rnfRaq3XDBF973nfqAQtvIqQs3HIAcZBvQD-CrSYqfv0aEorQ_09-xNdV2GUYQOuoPJS09LOX7LyAbrW_uGBZUzBK_vdV1DWFdYUy_ZKB4k3bgySrJXClE6ySfzjscoTNjIgCeTuhsci_0Dhy4U6HQWDkix-XaPfsMsaCAT928JfvSF55EEgHc5xLY68910s763XhAFeNsKVvVCfFg_zliT8JvA==&c=3VpsaIl0Q13BJJrX30f4wRW_3E8mEAScUv4cJydxm32yLVOdkj5P4w==&ch=0VPzjN87LlQb-cIJHaJfkNPjQLMGPer0kfWgkPXmAnTQlfuFXVVoqw==)
---

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: They love to talk a big game
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I want you to hear me on this

Derek, some politicians love to talk a big game about freedom. They love to wrap themselves in the flag and claim that their idea of freedom rules above all else.

But hear me on this:

It’s not freedom when the far-right tries to tell us what books our children can and can’t read.

It’s not freedom when the government tells women what they can and cannot do with their bodies.

And it sure as hell isn’t freedom when regular Pennsylvanians are forced to pay the price of the President’s tariffs.

**But here in Pennsylvania? We’re about real freedom.** The freedom to get ahead. The freedom to choose. The freedom to feel safe and be safe. The freedom to provide for your family. **That’s what this campaign is all about.**

**[Derek, can I count on you to chip in just a few dollars to help me keep protecting real freedom here in Pennsylvania? clean_body: I want you to hear me on this Derek, some politicians love to talk a big game about freedom. They love to wrap themselves in the flag and claim that their idea of freedom rules above all else. But hear me on this: It’s not freedom when the far-right tries to tell us what books our children can and can’t read. It’s not freedom when the government tells women what they can and cannot do with their bodies. And it sure as hell isn’t freedom when regular Pennsylvanians are forced to pay the price of the President’s tariffs. But here in Pennsylvania? We’re about real freedom. The freedom to get ahead. The freedom to choose. The freedom to feel safe and be safe. The freedom to provide for your family. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Analysis: Maryland’s Proposed 2026 Congressional Map Replicates Unconstitutional Gerrymander Previously Struck Down in Judicial Watch Lawsuit
body:
Judicial Watch announced that a Democrat-proposed 2026 congressional redistricting plan for Maryland is in key respects identical to the unconstitutional gerrymander struck down in a prior Judicial Watch lawsuit—but is even more partisan and less compact than the invalidated 2021 map.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header]

Team,

It’s time to impeach Kristi Noem.

Under Kristi’s leadership as Secretary of Homeland Security, federal agents have killed two people, and in both cases, not only has there been zero accountability or transparent investigation, but Noem has repeatedly lied about what happened. Now, ICE is ramping up activity in Phoenix.

Federal officials and their agents must follow the same laws and standards as everyone else. There must be real oversight, accountability, and consequences when those in power abuse their authority.

I’m running for Congress to stand up to the kind of extremism we are seeing from Noem and the DHS, but to do that, we have to flip AZ-1.

Can you chip in to my campaign so we can deliver justice and accountability in our government? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=260202_mw_noem]

clean_body: [] Team, It’s time to impeach Kristi Noem. Under Kristi’s leadership as Secretary of Homeland Security, federal agents have killed two people, and in both cases, not only has there been zero accountability or transparent investigation, but Noem has repeatedly lied about what happened. Now, ICE is ramping up activity in Phoenix. Federal officials and their agents must follow the same laws and standards as everyone else. There must be real oversight, accountability, and consequences when those in power abuse their authority. I’m running for Congress to stand up to the kind of extremism we are seeing from Noem and the DHS, but to do that, we have to flip AZ-1. Can you chip in to my campaign so we can deliver justice and accountability in our government? name: Christopher Ahuja for Congress
subject: ICE Raids Hit Our Neighborhoods, Silence Is Not an Option.
body:
This is a time to speak out.

| | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=1b89c9962f&e=53c7d12fc7)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,
Yesterday, ICE agents snatched people from our neighborhoods in North Hills, Panorama City, and Van Nuys.
Parents, workers, and community members were taken from their daily lives in an instant. It’s happening here again, in Los Angeles.
Communities are destabilized. Children are asking questions no child should have to ask. Entire neighborhoods are left uncertain about who will be next.
I’m running for Congress because silence in moments like this is not acceptable.
I believe:
* No one should be targeted for who they are or where they come from
* Immigration policy must be lawful, humane, and grounded in dignity
* Leaders have a responsibility to speak up when injustice shows up in our communities

Los Angeles has always been a place where artists, storytellers, and cultural leaders help shape the conscience of the country. Progressive voices in our city have never waited for permission to stand up, and we need that leadership now.
Brad Sherman does nothing to push back on ICE prowling in our neighborhoods. He does not have the will or the fight to protect our community.
[**Your support**](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=d44b457797&e=53c7d12fc7)[****](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=44a7129500&e=53c7d12fc7) helps ensure that:
* ICE actions are confronted
* Immigrant communities have advocates
* California sends leaders to Congress who will challenge cruelty

This campaign is about protecting the soul of our community, and choosing courage over comfort when it matters most.
---
| |
**In solidarity,**[](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=9b5482563a&e=53c7d12fc7)**Chris Ahuja****Democratic Candidate for Congress, CA-32****No Fear. No Silence. Let’s Go.**[**Donate today!**](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=4148359b78&e=53c7d12fc7)

name: Eileen for Colorado
subject: Eileen for Colorado February Newsletter
body:
Welcome to our February Newsletter

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
### Wow, it’s February. I can’t believe we’re already one month into 2026. And what a month it’s been. I’ve been busy traveling the district, but also keeping my eyes on — and heart with — all that’s going on in Minnesota. [I stand with those raising their voices.](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=199d99d503&e=1c5f08419c)
---
| |
### Best, Eileen.
---
| | | | | [](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=93972935c0&e=1c5f08419c)
---
[](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=1450087496&e=1c5f08419c)
---
[](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=6e8a89396a&e=1c5f08419c)
---
[](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=05e36e6120&e=1c5f08419c)
---
[](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=e8ae8b339e&e=1c5f08419c)
---
[](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=f28147647d&e=1c5f08419c)
---
[](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=2b4bfc5e25&e=1c5f08419c)
---
[](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=2430d1b056&e=1c5f08419c)
---
|
---
| | In January, I was able to travel to **seven different counties** in our vast district. We’ve traveled over 12,000 miles thus far during this campaign! This month, we held **five meet and greets and attended three candidate forums** — including a virtual meet and greet that had almost 100 attendees. And we couldn’t be more grateful for all of the people who attended and showed their support at the CO-04 candidate forum at the **Wind Crest Senior Living Community** and in Wellington after the candidate meet and greet. It’s honestly the largest honor of this campaign getting to know so many incredible CO-04 residents.

In January I was able to visit another of our rural health centers — **Lincoln Health Community Hospital** a 15-bed critical access hospital.**** I met with Rachel who is the director of nursing operations. She has worked at the hospital for 15 years. It is this type of commitment that makes our rural communities so special. And their creativity when it comes to maximizing patient care in unparalleled — like creating a unique ER doctor rotation to maintain continuity of care. However, they face many challenges that all rural care facilities are facing including **lack of funding** and lack of Telehealth reimbursement. More on that from CPR News below.

I also met with John and Amy of the **Kit Carson Rural Development** organization. Kit Carson, like many rural communities, faces a lack of affordable housing, particularly in the inverted housing market where it costs more to build a house than its worth. Their organization in focused on bettering their community through obtaining grants and donations for more **affordable housing** , brownfield site cleanups to make existing housing safe, incubating small businesses, and improving public spaces. Their commitment is an inspiration!
I met John and Amy at the **Kit Carson Cafe** , which, if you’re ever in the area, may I suggest the chicken/bacon/ranch calzone. Debbie is magic in the kitchen!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
Not only are people feeling the exasperation of high costs of health care, but the essential health care facilities in our district are too. As John Daley at CPR News reports, **50% of rural hospitals in Colorado are operating at a loss, with labor costs up by 39% and supply costs up by 50%** — both outpacing inflation. He focuses on Lincoln Community Hospital, that I was able to visit this month. Congress needs to act to help these critical facilities, and the patients who depend on them. Please take the time to give it a read.
---
| [Rural hospitals wrestle with a new landscape after federal cuts, worry they’re starting to drown financially](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=f5900c69de&e=1c5f08419c)
---
|
---
|
---
| | If you’re looking for a New Years Resolution — make getting Eileen on the ballot one of them! We are actively looking for Caucus delegates to represent Eileen for Colorado at Caucus! So if you — and your friends and neighbors! — want to see integrity and service back in politics, committee to caucusing for Eileen and please sign up [here](https://eileenforcolorado.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=400e8fa21dba23169b817268c&id=8b9a89ec0b&e=1c5f08419c).

**What is Caucus and Assembly?** The caucus and assembly process is a series of three events at which the local and state Democratic parties vote to place candidates on the primary ballot, from the lowest to the highest levels of office. We need you to commit to caucus to get Eileen’s name on the ballot.
**Who can Caucus?** Any registered voter in Colorado’s 4 district can caucus, provided their registration is up to date, and they’re registered as a Democrat by the beginning of February 2026. Updating your registration online is easy and takes only two minutes. Note — you can always change your affiliation after March if you don’t wish to stay affiliated long-term.
**How do I Caucus for Eileen?** Never Caucused before? No worries. We’ll have training and send guides along the way. Think of caucus and assembly as a series of votes, each one leading to the next. To be able to take the final vote to get Eileen on the ballot, you must attend all three of the events below.

clean_body: Welcome to our February Newsletter | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Wow, it’s February. I can’t believe we’re already one month into 2026. And what a month it’s been. I’ve been busy traveling the district, but also keeping my eyes on — and heart with — all that’s going on in Minnesota. | | Best, Eileen. | | | | | | | | In January, I was able to travel to seven different counties in our vast district. We’ve traveled over 12,000 miles thus far during this campaign! This month, we held five meet and greets and attended three candidate forums — including a virtual meet and greet that had almost 100 attendees. And we couldn’t be more grateful for all of the people who attended and showed their support at the CO-04 candidate forum at the Wind Crest Senior Living Community and in Wellington after the candidate meet and greet. It’s honestly the largest honor of this campaign getting to know so many incredible CO-04 residents. In January I was able to visit another of our rural health centers — Lincoln Health Community Hospital a 15-bed critical access hospital.** I met with Rachel who is the director of nursing operations. She has worked at the hospital for 15 years. It is this type of commitment that makes our rural communities so special. And their creativity when it comes to maximizing patient care in unparalleled — like creating a unique ER doctor rotation to maintain continuity of care. However, they face many challenges that all rural care facilities are facing including lack of funding and lack of Telehealth reimbursement. More on that from CPR News below. I also met with John and Amy of the Kit Carson Rural Development organization. Kit Carson, like many rural communities, faces a lack of affordable housing, particularly in the inverted housing market where it costs more to build a house than its worth. Their organization in focused on bettering their community through obtaining grants and donations for more affordable housing , brownfield site cleanups to make existing housing safe, incubating small businesses, and improving public spaces. Their commitment is an inspiration! I met John and Amy at the Kit Carson Cafe , which, if you’re ever in the area, may I suggest the chicken/bacon/ranch calzone. Debbie is magic in the kitchen! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Not only are people feeling the exasperation of high costs of health care, but the essential health care facilities in our district are too. As John Daley at CPR News reports, 50% of rural hospitals in Colorado are operating at a loss, with labor costs up by 39% and supply costs up by 50% — both outpacing inflation. He focuses on Lincoln Community Hospital, that I was able to visit this month. Congress needs to act to help these critical facilities, and the patients who depend on them. Please take the time to give it a read. | | | | | If you’re looking for a New Years Resolution — make getting Eileen on the ballot one of them! We are actively looking for Caucus delegates to represent Eileen for Colorado at Caucus! So if you — and your friends and neighbors! — want to see integrity and service back in politics, committee to caucusing for Eileen and please sign up . What is Caucus and Assembly? The caucus and assembly process is a series of three events at which the local and state Democratic parties vote to place candidates on the primary ballot, from the lowest to the highest levels of office. We need you to commit to caucus to get Eileen’s name on the ballot. Who can Caucus? Any registered voter in Colorado’s 4 district can caucus, provided their registration is up to date, and they’re registered as a Democrat by the beginning of February 2026. Updating your registration online is easy and takes only two minutes. Note — you can always change your affiliation after March if you don’t wish to stay affiliated long-term. How do I Caucus for Eileen? Never Caucused before? No worries. We’ll have training and send guides along the way. Think of caucus and assembly as a series of votes, each one leading to the next. To be able to take the final vote to get Eileen on the ballot, you must attend all three of the events below. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join us for a meet and greet in Elbert, CO. This is an opportunity to ask questions and connect with the local community. RSVP for address. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | In a district bigger than the state of South Carolina, sometimes, we have to meet digitally! Join us. RSVP is required to join the Zoom meeting. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Signed up to caucus for Eileen and ready for the next step? Sign up for one of our caucus trainings! This training session will be available to join virtually or in-person.We will go over caucus process, rules, dates & locations, and your role in detail so you are feeling confident and ready to help elect Eileen. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Signed up to caucus for Eileen and ready for the next step? Sign up for one of our caucus trainings! This training session will be available to join virtually or in-person.We will go over caucus process, rules, dates & locations, and your role in detail so you are feeling confident and ready to help elect Eileen. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join us for a Meet & Greet in Fort Morgan at The Block! This is an opportunity to meet Eileen, ask questions, and connect with the local community. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join us for a Meet & Greet in Sterling at the Tennant Art Gallery at Northeastern Junior College! This is an opportunity to meet Eileen, ask questions, and connect with the local community. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join us for a Meet & Greet in Windsor! _Never retreat. Always advance. _ This is Tom Cotton, and I’m running for re-election to the Senate to keep advancing President Trump’s agenda and fighting for Arkansas's conservative values. As we gear up for the upcoming election, your support has been invaluable in this campaign for Congress.Now, we're calling on dedicated volunteers like you to help make a real impact at the polls! We're looking for enthusiastic poll greeters to join us on the first day of early voting, Thursday, February 12, 2026. As we gear up for the upcoming election, your support has been invaluable in this campaign for Congress.Now, we're calling on dedicated volunteers like you to help make a real impact at the polls! We're looking for enthusiastic poll greeters to join us on the first day of early voting, Thursday, February 12, 2026. As a poll greeter, you'll welcome voters, share information about our campaign, and encourage participation in this crucial primary. It's a fantastic opportunity to connect with the community and drive voter turnout.Shifts are available throughout the day, and signing up is quick and easy. Please visit our Sign Up Genius page to reserve your spot: Your time and energy mean the world to us—let's work together to make this election a success! name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Minnesota
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
My colleague Amy Klobuchar announced her campaign for Governor of Minnesota.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2408%2E135344%2EOIfWRc)

My colleague Amy Klobuchar recently announced her campaign for Governor of Minnesota.
In a minute, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to her campaign, but first I wanted to share a few words and thoughts about what has happened in her state over the past few weeks.
Whether you are a Democrat or a Republican, what has happened in Minnesota runs against the fundamental freedoms of who we are as Americans.
This is what President Trump meant when he said he wanted to go after the "enemy within." Now, two American citizens have been killed by their own government as part of this operation -- one that is part of a larger continued, coordinated assault on our Constitutional rights with a specific focus on individuals and groups who disagree with this president.
This moment requires accountability and leadership.
Kristi Noem should do the responsible thing and resign. If she won't, President Trump should fire her. If he won't, she should be impeached.
Last week, I voted no on a bill that included more funding for ICE. My power is my vote, and there must be fundamental reforms to ICE before we give them even more taxpayer money. This Administration has lost the trust of the American people when it comes to deploying federal forces on our streets.
And we need to elect leaders who can help bring Minnesota together long after ICE and border patrol leave the state.
So this is the part where I ask:
[**Can you please split a contribution between Amy Klobuchar's campaign for Governor in Minnesota and my re-election campaign to the Senate in Michigan? Use this link to give.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-klobuchar.pSdhqM&refcode=em260202-klob&t=2&akid=2408%2E135344%2EOIfWRc)
**[DONATE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-klobuchar.pSdhqM&refcode=em260202-klob&t=3&akid=2408%2E135344%2EOIfWRc)**
Thank you for reading and donating if you're in a position to chip in a few bucks.
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2408%2E135344%2EOIfWRc).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=2408%2E135344%2EOIfWRc)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidate and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She is not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: Grateful and honored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2602-q1-ak [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2602-q1-ak]Hey team,
I wanted to reach out personally to say thank you for being part of this campaign. Because of your support, we hit our fundraising goal for January.
It means a great deal to me that so many people have stepped up to support my vision for CO-03. You’re the reason we’ve made it this far, and why we’re going to keep pushing forward together.
I know there are a lot of demands on your time and attention, and I don’t take any of that lightly. I’m deeply grateful to have you on my team and honored to have your help in my fight for Colorado.
Although we still have a lot of work ahead of us, moments like this remind me why it’s worth it.
Thanks again for your steadfast support.
— Alex Kelloff

name: Michele Tafoya
subject: Why I quit my dream job –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tafoya for Senate
body:
It was the hardest decision I’ve ever made.

Folks might've killed to have my job.
I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary.
I reached the pinnacle of my career... but there was one problem:
I had to watch what I said. I was a public-facing representative for a world-class sports network. I couldn't share everything I believed, and no one really knew I was a Conservative.
So I hung up my press badge and quit my dream job so I could speak my mind. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=641fb174422147888ee731183965d97a&_e=-Mpm_uIEXpYlYQB7uTEdTi5ss0bzLkDvqugBp4lrbHL6XlrnqgpMKQ6lUBvQaq2Yf6HXeQZO3ukyVX4LRS925OnJoAqBR2LPrv_wucFVNKUrEhsEwpupLa05ZZAiGiZPQv5wtVwt4HFCHt6Sdjq1tUaVORp1ydNR4F1xsEPq4fJHj3ubid7SppVfUwGASuSEIROLSGY41q837Q-goN2LT4qGAfDxNt6Ap9TvA5auboQgIx-F3dhLqHg0VfNfpPy7MkcXdXbWKWiNrjG5GYDDGF6fQMcdh589WpKoEiWDbT3jsQbu794nrx2qmdii53Yndc1ySLUq8qqK0Z-iNR7A-5hoS387NTKb8jj47_-ex-YqHbXYB0noWy_lhmiesY-DCq-fqWku5VblIm-d-IFCdLIa1HLnJsM_KE19E9IItBpUwu10fZDMGGp74L9lsOgJEsMTTXwS6CKO3oB4ivpw6-a0Vcr4gdeUMU77f-pgmTC7968KbAy7s3VgWvZ7iTMP75ooRfIphg_HosQEH0wHlKS2VODKyfCEi2N6af5QKg56ML4kroT0DvZx8_DIuaw8jDsveuNLMHpyJ_I-REf2RvAC_ZcmLYRCzTArj33EILDJ97KZPrSRp-zIn-BvSPXtdhrDzYLYm68MudKMAHTefFhf7UQ2T3dWpSyWWalm5U-ad60wc6GfElaHCqqKUcpDkRba8yaYqe_ce_BWss0N66UDK7RXTJl5YLdy-qSxJVekQnBnfQd2dMLVru9X3vouCf4p4LBLEWEOSKfmDfc24NwPcFWbeylKbRWrbbeIGghcD28LAXGbr2Pa5DFVGE7B)It was the hardest decision I've ever made. I was scared, excited, and liberated - all at the same time. **
**People said I was OUT OF MY MIND. **
**But I knew God was leading me in a certain direction, and that 's no time for half-measures. I knew he had a plan for my life. So I took a leap of faith and never looked back.**
**[Now, a few years later, I’ve started a growing podcast, campaigned for commonsense in Minnesota, and now launched a campaign for U.S. Senate!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=641fb174422147888ee731183965d97a&_e=-Mpm_uIEXpYlYQB7uTEdTi5ss0bzLkDvqugBp4lrbHL6XlrnqgpMKQ6lUBvQaq2Yf6HXeQZO3ukyVX4LRS925OnJoAqBR2LPrv_wucFVNKUrEhsEwpupLa05ZZAiGiZPQv5wtVwt4HFCHt6Sdjq1tUaVORp1ydNR4F1xsEPq4fJHj3ubid7SppVfUwGASuSEIROLSGY41q837Q-goN2LT4qGAfDxNt6Ap9TvA5auboQgIx-F3dhLqHg0VfNfpPy7MkcXdXbWKWiNrjG5GYDDGF6fQMcdh589WpKoEiWDbT17q8EROhhXdSMVdPalPwtMkaKfjBvWZyMM9pMfTTfHuihRluduk--ZwSrdVevsPpyU66xg6SEG-je2qQFnquThJotg47MP9_xiB3xaYj2RtfHMFzTeykyhv-3rcPZBpr176hA4lOMrqaT-EzftwVJ59bpEfmpovwkoi7Tl-HGG4s-Bya44i0B2AZT1GDy_fa55PRa1NsKhnrvGnYfYxvOcnbiHIL)**
**I believe God put me here for a reason. **
**I believe Minnesota is the land of 10,000 problems right now. **
**And I believe a no-BS, sane person who 's ALL-IN can win this seat. **
** But I'd be lying if I said fundraising doesn't make a difference in a race like this. The far-Left is readying a FORTUNE to drown out our message and take this seat out of play. **
**Our path to victory solely depends on raising enough to keep up. **
**My finance team tells me we 'll need to bring in 10,000 founding donors ASAP so we can: 1) Hire staff, 2) Recruit volunteers in every corner of the state, 3) Print yard signs, 4) Launch our first advertising blitz, and 5) Start contacting on-the-fence voters. **
**I 'm afraid that'll make the difference between a winning campaign and a losing one.

name: Amanda Gonzalez
subject: This one means a lot: educators are with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Amanda for Colorado
body:
| | | Hi Peter, I’m really proud to share this: **the Colorado Education Association just endorsed our campaign for Secretary of State.** CEA is the **largest labor union in Colorado** , representing more than 40,000 educators—teachers, paraprofessionals, counselors, bus drivers, and other school leaders—in every corner of our state. Rural and urban. Eastern Plains to the Western Slope. Folks who show up every single day for Colorado’s kids, who know that in a functional democracy, our schools are well-resourced and our teachers fairly paid. Endorsements like this don’t happen by accident. And they don’t happen lightly. Educators know what it looks like when politicians side with corporations and billionaires instead of working families. They live with the consequences. It means classrooms stretched beyond capacity. It means underfunded schools. It means kids falling through the cracks. That’s a failure of democracy. **Democracy is whether people have a real voice in the decisions that shape their lives. As a former CWA member, I know that Unions help make that possible.** Educators know that strong public schools and a strong democracy rise and fall together. You can’t have one without the other. That’s why CEA endorsed this campaign and why I’ll continue to stand with working people. Can you help us build on this momentum? [If you’re an educator, a union member, or someone who believes our democracy is worth fighting for, will you donate $15 today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqum6oshDjP8NRpbzhRH5VoGgfsGEd1_X3AQhfcn_f1pr-CbHR-54SpyGkbaPUpDtlkszmgOfUotrnYhkt1HApNWzlSk5ST7MkYeSiGyK3gz5G_lSxhfJZG-fEhBSvlTnJ5RZaNMTtUpE8gdWXUM5UMsKVzaFExRNG5C_fR1Z472i6WIsDGeo1-iSYnVe9iZDtmuQfggJkCRXBHzzjSRB-jHwzXxoerv3g5twgWgph_wUyBxEqEmKOHaSPjPV8XGaH75ugRAw33utfvjw8upCl8IcVIW-Rw8Sh0oWcweNwsa12ckQBMoqtiihZZb5gLZAyrfRxrT3pBquJOMZEXtQy-E/4nt/gf5AIHMnRuu-g6c3IUz-gg/h0/h001.N6z9UUsXi-KnC3ZixuYvY_QiwvvLVgD7wPYVWcYFGp4) Every grassroots contribution helps us organize, reach voters, and build the kind of people-powered movement we all believe in and deserve. name: AOC
subject: Epstein files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need them all.
#
Even with everything in this Epstein drop, remember: this is a minority of the files.
This is STILL just what they were **willing** to release — in violation of the law, which requires release of _all_ files.
Pam Bondi’s Department of Justice is still hiding most of them.
**We need them all**.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
Between this, directing federal agents to arrest journalists, and her attempted extortion of Minnesota voter files, **Bondi should be up for impeachment right alongside Trump**.
We will not be intimidated. And we will not comply with illegal activity — even if it comes directly from the President and his cronies.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260202.sfylUd&refcode=em20260202-10710-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10710%2E2526796%2EX5Mz7y)

name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: Abdul is calling to abolish ICE. His opponents won’t.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1643%2E251025%2ENd2LFD ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1643%2E251025%2ENd2LFD ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

ICE has killed, injured, and kidnapped multiple American citizens — and
yet, some politicians think giving ICE more funding for training is the
solution to end this violence.

We know that’s not true.

This isn’t an issue that started with the Trump administration. The ICE
agents committing these heinous acts have been a part of the agency for
years.

The problem isn’t a lack of resources. The problem is ICE itself.

ICE has become a paramilitary force operating outside the bounds of the
Constitution and basic human decency. That’s why Abdul is calling to
abolish ICE, and he’s the only candidate in this race taking that stance.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/abolish-ice-petition/?source=em20260202-1643&akid=1643%2E251025%2ENd2LFD ]If you agree that ICE should be torn down and immigration enforcement
must be rethought from scratch, add your name today. Every signature helps
ensure this issue doesn’t get buried — and gives Abdul the backing he
needs to hold ICE accountable once he’s in office.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/abolish-ice-petition/?source=em20260202-1643&akid=1643%2E251025%2ENd2LFD ]Add your name ››

Thank you,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Every $5 donation adds up fast. When you chip in, you’re joining the person who gave before you, and the person before them. That’s how grassroots campaigns win – by people showing up together. But if we’re going to compete with the big-money operation from the other candidates, we need this grassroots team to step up. clean_body: Guess how many push-ups I did? | | | | | | | Last week, I met with a group of cadets from West Point. Meeting these young men is a great reminder of why we have the greatest military in the world. But when one West Point cadet challenged me to an impromptu push-up contest in the halls of the Capitol, I had to accept. Jesse Watters wanted the whole story, and I was proud to tell it. HEAR IT FOR YOURSELF ⬇⬇⬇ Are you curious about how many pushups I did? Donate below and you can find out! | | In Liberty, Josh Hawley Save this contact card **. It helps prevent Big Tech from suppressing our means of communication. | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | | |
