subject: Should I assume we won’t hear back from you?
body:
Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I've reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they've texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages?

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Oregon’s natural legacy depends on you
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2?am=20&contactdata=sdeZZqZ50agK6Ml4ws6fS633cugG4F5YnZu+QVMK6/nPHhr0qBzigeng8S9K5qbdKq/vadPpDeULNPZ89yXTzCVhhqE5ivp0hq5eCIICtSKHOLClwiOUciM6jdBWGVAS [https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2?am=20&contactdata=sdeZZqZ50agK6Ml4ws6fS633cugG4F5YnZu+QVMK6/nPHhr0qBzigeng8S9K5qbdKq/vadPpDeULNPZ89yXTzCVhhqE5ivp0hq5eCIICtSKHOLClwiOUciM6jdBWGVAS]
Peter,
Oregon’s 2026 short legislative session began today — and the decisions made in Salem will shape our climate, wildlife, and communities for years to come.
We’ll be in the Capitol every day of session, meeting with lawmakers and fighting for our 2026 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon [https://olcveducationfund.org/2026-legislative-session/] — including landmark wildlife and habitat funding, holding polluters accountable, and protecting critical investments in climate, clean energy, and conservation.
In addition to fighting for our priorities, we know we will have to play a lot of defense to defend against threats to our environment. It’s only day 1 of session, and we’ve already designated four bills as Major Threats to Oregon’s landmark land use planning system, clean water, forests, and environment. This session is going to take every one of us to ensure that we continue making progress and defending against rollbacks. We can’t win without you .
Your gift today fuels the advocacy that makes change possible — from mobilizing volunteers to putting pressure on decision-makers when it matters most.
A $50 donation helps us recruit and train new volunteers, sparking hundreds of conversations for climate action. [https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2] Not only this, but we need your help to ensure we have the resources to stop Major Threats. [https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2]
Give now [https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2?am=20&contactdata=sdeZZqZ50agK6Ml4ws6fS633cugG4F5YnZu+QVMK6/nPHhr0qBzigeng8S9K5qbdKq/vadPpDeULNPZ89yXTzCVhhqE5ivp0hq5eCIICtSKHOLClwiOUciM6jdBWGVAS]
Peter, will you help make sure we’ve got what it takes to protect Oregon’s people, places, climate, and environment this session? [https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2]
Your gift today is an investment in a healthier, climate-safe future for all Oregonians. Our work isn’t possible without your support.
With determination,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Lindsey.png]
Lindsey Scholten (she/her)
OLCV Executive Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124587621/599074862/-2026962184?amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.02_Five-Reasons_B2_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZiMTM3MC04MDAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKcBW7xivM9vqYm8CZRK_7DpRKhryDa-t_sL8EYMTjI=) I wish I didn’t have to ask, but I need help. [**_I’m Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to chip in $5 to help me win my critical race and take back the Senate, but first, let me give you 5 reasons why your support is so urgently needed today: _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124587623/599074865/-2026962184?amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.02_Five-Reasons_B2_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZiMTM3MC04MDAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKcBW7xivM9vqYm8CZRK_7DpRKhryDa-t_sL8EYMTjI=) 1️⃣ Donald Trump is acting out of control – and we need to put a STOP to his unchecked power. 2️⃣ With experts officially declaring that the “Senate is in play,” winning key Senate races in 2026 is ESSENTIAL in making that happen. 3️⃣ Trump’s Super PACs are already sitting on nearly $300 million to attack and defeat Democrats like me. 4️⃣ These are expected to be the toughest and most expensive midterm elections in history, and we need everyone to do what they can to win. 5️⃣ Grassroots support is the only way we fight back, win my critical election, and flip the Senate. Help us keep the momentum going with a contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260202_outraisedopponent_act&amount=10]

This is huge. Truly. Thank you for powering our grassroots movement. 83% of Cori’s donors are grassroots supporters just like you , and after launching in the final three months of last year, this movement raised over $525,000 , without taking a dime from corporate or right-wing lobbyists
But here’s what the numbers also revealed, and why we absolutely cannot slow down now:
More than HALF of our opponent’s money came straight through AIPAC and corporate PACs. If we’re going to beat them, we need you to help us keep the momentum going with a contribution of $10, $20, or whatever you can afford today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260202_outraisedopponent_act]
Who’s supporting him tells you everything you need to know.
AIPAC, Big Oil, Big Pharma, ICE contractors, and war profiteers like Lockheed Martin are once again trying to buy Missouri’s 1st District. They’re not going to back down.
But obviously neither are we.
Cori Bush is a fighter for St. Louis who refuses corporate PAC money and answers only to the people. And that’s exactly why they’re coming after her.
If you can, chip in right now to help us keep building momentum and show the corporate PAC machine that St. Louis is not for sale >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260202_outraisedopponent_act]

We’ve proven what this movement can do. Now let’s finish the job.
— Cori Bush HQ

As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.

We must have accurate information as the campaign heats up. This is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country – a new poll shows Haley tied with her MAGA opponent – and we need to communicate with you effectively.

So, null, let us know by midnight tonight:
**ARE YOU A DEMOCRAT?**
| | [Confirm Democrat](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=2111%2E49239%2EgH5wtR)
---
| | [Confirm Other](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=2111%2E49239%2EgH5wtR)
---
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13548?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=2111%2E49239%2EgH5wtR) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13547?t=10&akid=2111%2E49239%2EgH5wtR)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

---
Our client is the first person sued under HB7, Texas's new "bounty hunter" law that allows virtually anyone to sue someone for allegedly manufacturing, distributing, mailing, prescribing, or providing abortion pills into Texas, for at least $100,000.

[Under HB7, anyone believed to have provided someone in Texas abortion pills is at risk:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124587851/599075524/-883891047?sourceid=1151125&utm_campaign=26emrge-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2U2NTlhNS04MTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l--Z60KMMhg9fELY8M1tNhe3XF3bh3Tws2phWWgZU5o=&emci=f8e659a5-8100-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=fce659a5-8100-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=954237)
* A parent who hands their child abortion pills
* A pharmaceutical company that manufactures the medication
* A doctor in another state—like our client

[This lawsuit is part of a coordinated national effort by anti-abortion extremists to intimidate providers and stop patients from accessing care—but we refuse to let providers fight alone.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124587852/599075525/-883891047?sourceid=1151125&utm_campaign=26emrge-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2U2NTlhNS04MTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l--Z60KMMhg9fELY8M1tNhe3XF3bh3Tws2phWWgZU5o=&emci=f8e659a5-8100-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=fce659a5-8100-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=954237)
[DEFEND PROVIDERS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124587853/599075526/-883891047?sourceid=1151125&utm_campaign=26emrge-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=hb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2U2NTlhNS04MTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l--Z60KMMhg9fELY8M1tNhe3XF3bh3Tws2phWWgZU5o=&emci=f8e659a5-8100-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=fce659a5-8100-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=954237)

Texas's HB7 is a dangerous test case, and extremists want to use it to spread fear across the medical community and build a national strategy to make abortion pills inaccessible.

[The Center is defending those who care for us. | **Peter, no one expected someone like me to be elected to Congress. But against all odds, I’m here – and it’s important you understand _how_ I got here.** This email is long, so if you don’t have a spare minute to read this all the way through, [**_please consider chipping in a few bucks so I can keep fighting for all of us in Congress. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Cs1Oolu9MG6BP6VwFIha-Q~~/AAPPABA~/JbSfDQjV0cd8yCz2V5ENmQyYJ8Thpgt679mW8tRiDAuILvBqS55d5ROPJq4kHhthhEaB_9XCEY1HucsQOarjOlCvuN1-DoIPxoFmnXpwkwQuLPBDwfbQn-hCP6LZSRAHlSuq1wTR2y1DK8ze0r-Nw7X-6G8MH_OTynjtMOTxhr6tnCFGoJDEs1piqlpGYcBXEt-7s_eVaUVp4RZL6TDCt_LrjVdZsRsBeyIb2vnhrW1yOxXIvdBGQ_z0jiIR7BQdNpqqohNcahec6_Rbb9TYVyDK0oZoJxWrFwspOxzNWaULborqCgUCkq_lLZ8kqpOVrvQ25NHrMWc1n1c6Y4w1j_8k9DYFzGXaOdMFlUpjJkU~) I was raised in a working-class family. My parents struggled through more broken systems – from underfunded schools, to outrageous healthcare costs, to juggling different jobs to pay the bills. Even when I grew up and ran for Congress, I was a Gen Z working class kid – I didn’t have the same advantages that other candidates have. I drove for Uber and racked up credit card debt just to make ends meet during my campaign. Because of that, everyone counted me out. **But I was able to defy the odds: by becoming a community leader, the National Organizing Director for March for our Lives, and the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress.** _Now, I need you to help me defy the odds once again to**stay** in Congress._ I’m determined to keep fighting for working-class folks, but I can’t do that without your grassroots support. [**_Please, if you can, donate a few bucks right now to keep me fighting in Congress for the most vulnerable among us. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Cs1Oolu9MG6BP6VwFIha-Q~~/AAPPABA~/JbSfDQjV0cd8yCz2V5ENmQyYJ8Thpgt679mW8tRiDAuILvBqS55d5ROPJq4kHhthhEaB_9XCEY1HucsQOarjOlCvuN1-DoIPxoFmnXpwkwQuLPBDwfbQn-hCP6LZSRAHlSuq1wTR2y1DK8ze0r-Nw7X-6G8MH_OTynjtMOTxhr6tnCFGoJDEs1piqlpGYcBXEt-7s_eVaUVp4RZL6TDCt_LrjVdZsRsBeyIb2vnhrW1yOxXIvdBGQ_z0jiIR7BQdNpqqohNcahec6_Rbb9TYVyDK0oZoJxWrFwspOxzNWaULborqCgUCkq_lLZ8kqpOVrvQ25NHrMWc1n1c6Y4w1j_8k9DYFzGXaOdMFlUpjJkU~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/HpXZf6_a45TOoLt5aeNATQ~~/AAPPABA~/Ecbjlg_Y4QELvi-4gqGXhftarRu7hirl9MdwvpDGcr3xGX-Za40w8mfuL52BHv6VR3vkhLXbSjx8sqS5YOI4GQUj4I5Sk5UY0U8L_OxvBDcxtCluLKTWOkEYA6Diigy0r2EGBbrH5z9Y62H-fRql5YBVOo_RlB3bbWI_tCtduw1lpRwNqPolqGldeXFo-BYefusK1NmXkd2WuvvKMp0pTPp_0Q8d4UHTpXQo6hpGGLf5Cukx2EQsruvRHkQtKPHIDrOLlx40jBE0m25pvXaSJGilT4jFY88F0Y27R2qWzkAEkgeTc4rppyS3LUKYEcJEtKjXwBG_i5q3StQQvkMW6FdClxP1WNCNK_iBpktuON_VDH_H7HH_x52ag7JB-7JG)

clean_body: | ~ | Peter, no one expected someone like me to be elected to Congress. But against all odds, I’m here – and it’s important you understand how I got here. This email is long, so if you don’t have a spare minute to read this all the way through, ~ I was raised in a working-class family. My parents struggled through more broken systems – from underfunded schools, to outrageous healthcare costs, to juggling different jobs to pay the bills. Even when I grew up and ran for Congress, I was a Gen Z working class kid – I didn’t have the same advantages that other candidates have. I drove for Uber and racked up credit card debt just to make ends meet during my campaign. Because of that, everyone counted me out. But I was able to defy the odds: by becoming a community leader, the National Organizing Director for March for our Lives, and the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Now, I need you to help me defy the odds once again tostay in Congress. I’m determined to keep fighting for working-class folks, but I can’t do that without your grassroots support. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thanks for hearing me out, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. Hi friend, it's me, Winter. My mom Rachel calls me Winnie.
I don't usually write Substacks. I usually beg for an early dinner, take long naps, and run around outside. But mom is busy running for Congress so I'm stepping in.
**Mom works really hard. She 's always talking about things like health care, affordability, and "Dan Meuser." (I'm not a fan. He sounds not very nice.)**
She always tells me about the people she meets across PA-09. She says families here are stretched thin and folks are tired of broken promises and just want things to work.
And she ALWAYS talks about her priorities: You work hard. You take care of your family. You look after your neighbors.
That makes sense to me. It's basically how dogs like me live!
**My mom is running for Congress to bring those priorities to Washington. But campaigns cost money, and she can 't pay for things with donations of stuffed squirrels or kisses. Trust me, I checked.**
**[So will you please help her out and chip in today? She really wants to flip this seat so she can fight for working families, and I really want her to spend less time fundraising and more time giving me pets.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a77488dd-651d-413a-ba4d-cc3e0a71a43a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a77488dd-651d-413a-ba4d-cc3e0a71a43a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thanks for listening to a dog with a big heart. Time for a nap!
- Winnie 🐾

name: Becca Balint
subject: Did we really pull this off?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
Honestly? I didn’t know if we would | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124589308/599080778/-785282667?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzYyNDExYy04NTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vcIcFGuAtzz0fdoHOGn74cXTZRgWfLt6Npn1FyFfZO4=)
---
Peter – It’s Becca. **I wanted to reach out today for one simple reason: thank you.** Together, we hit our January goal. And because of you, we can keep showing up fast, staying present, and fighting for anyone and everyone who may need us And I need you to know this: **people in Minnesota feel it**. When communities are grieving and afraid, when it feels like the rest of the country might move on too quickly — it matters deeply to know that people hundreds or thousands of miles away are saying, “ _**We have your back. You are not alone.**_ ” That kind of solidarity is powerful. It cuts through the isolation that cruelty depends on. You all met this moment with courage. With generosity. With a refusal to look away when it would have been easier to do just that. And I don’t take that lightly... not for a second. [_**But movements don’t survive on outrage alone. They survive because people decide they’re in it for the long haul. If that feels true for you, I invite you to click here and stay with us as we keep showing up for the people who need us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124589309/599080779/-219944582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzYyNDExYy04NTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vcIcFGuAtzz0fdoHOGn74cXTZRgWfLt6Npn1FyFfZO4=) **[KEEP STANDING WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124589310/599080780/-219944582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzYyNDExYy04NTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vcIcFGuAtzz0fdoHOGn74cXTZRgWfLt6Npn1FyFfZO4=)** In moments like this, I also want to remind us to check in on our neighbors. Reach out. Ask how someone’s doing. Make sure people know they’re not alone. **Sometimes the most powerful thing we can do is remind someone that they’re seen, they’re valued, and they don’t have to face this alone.** What keeps me going, even on the hardest days, is knowing that we’re in this together. It’s knowing there are people like you who refuse to turn away, who understand that real change takes consistency and care, not just moments of urgency. That shared commitment is what makes this work possible. [_**So, if today feels like a moment you want to lean in again — even just a few dollars — it would mean the world to me and to the people counting on us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124589311/599080781/-219944582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzYyNDExYy04NTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vcIcFGuAtzz0fdoHOGn74cXTZRgWfLt6Npn1FyFfZO4=) **Here’s what I believe with my whole heart: showing up for each other is an act of courage. Loving people you may never meet, refusing to let fear or distance divide us — that is how movements are built. That is how change happens.** I lead with empathy because I refuse to lose my humanity in this work. And I fight with everything I have because the stakes demand it. **Those two things are inseparable for me, and they’re exactly why I’m not backing down.** So, I have to say it again: **THANK YOU** for standing up in a time when everything feels heavy. Thank you for choosing courage anyway. You are making a real difference, and I am so proud to be in this fight with you. With so much gratitude,
— Becca _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124589312/599080782/-219944582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzYyNDExYy04NTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vcIcFGuAtzz0fdoHOGn74cXTZRgWfLt6Npn1FyFfZO4=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124589313/599080783/-219944582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzYyNDExYy04NTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vcIcFGuAtzz0fdoHOGn74cXTZRgWfLt6Npn1FyFfZO4=)**

clean_body: Honestly? I didn’t know if we would | = Peter – It’s Becca. I wanted to reach out today for one simple reason: thank you. Together, we hit our January goal. And because of you, we can keep showing up fast, staying present, and fighting for anyone and everyone who may need us And I need you to know this: people in Minnesota feel it. When communities are grieving and afraid, when it feels like the rest of the country might move on too quickly — it matters deeply to know that people hundreds or thousands of miles away are saying, “ We have your back. You are not alone. ” That kind of solidarity is powerful. It cuts through the isolation that cruelty depends on. You all met this moment with courage. With generosity. With a refusal to look away when it would have been easier to do just that. And I don’t take that lightly... not for a second. = = In moments like this, I also want to remind us to check in on our neighbors. Reach out. Ask how someone’s doing. Make sure people know they’re not alone. Sometimes the most powerful thing we can do is remind someone that they’re seen, they’re valued, and they don’t have to face this alone. What keeps me going, even on the hardest days, is knowing that we’re in this together. It’s knowing there are people like you who refuse to turn away, who understand that real change takes consistency and care, not just moments of urgency. That shared commitment is what makes this work possible. = Here’s what I believe with my whole heart: showing up for each other is an act of courage. Loving people you may never meet, refusing to let fear or distance divide us — that is how movements are built. That is how change happens. I lead with empathy because I refuse to lose my humanity in this work. And I fight with everything I have because the stakes demand it. Those two things are inseparable for me, and they’re exactly why I’m not backing down. So, I have to say it again: THANK YOU for standing up in a time when everything feels heavy. Thank you for choosing courage anyway. You are making a real difference, and I am so proud to be in this fight with you. With so much gratitude, — Becca If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: =?iso-8859-13?q?Ken=FFTravius?= Coleman, United for Democracy
subject: Tell Congress: Protect Haitian immigrants from ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Temporary protected status for Haitian families ends tomorrow. | |
---
Peter, Even as the turmoil in Minneapolis continues, ICE is gearing up for its next attack. **The Trump administration is officially revoking Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for Haitian immigrant families**** _tomorrow_****—and ICE is already mobilizing around communities, ready to pounce as soon as the status expires.** Haitian families received protected immigration status in America in the wake of a series of disasters and political instability rocked their country. Now, those same people who worked hard and played by the rules will suddenly find themselves under the same siege that Minneapolis has experienced. [**Send a message to your representative now. subject: Florida needs an Attorney General who tackles corruption, not enables it.

body:

Hi Peter, I’m Sean Shaw. As a former Florida State Representative and Florida’s Insurance Consumer Advocate, I’ve seen firsthand what happens when powerful interests go unchecked. I ran for Florida Attorney General in 2018 because I believed our state deserved better — an Attorney General who would actually fight for everyday Floridians. **[That belief hasn't changed. That's why I'm proud to endorse Jose Javier Rodriguez for Florida Attorney General, and I'm asking you to join me in supporting his campaign with a contribution of any amount today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124590142/599083468/-1680878311?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Shaw_020226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjVhMTM2MWItODgwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5U7mhN8Tz0g9DoUO0WB6JY-pQWiuJkKyIPPPvYJxUaI=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124590143/599083469/-1680878311?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Shaw_020226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjVhMTM2MWItODgwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5U7mhN8Tz0g9DoUO0WB6JY-pQWiuJkKyIPPPvYJxUaI=)**

When I ran for Attorney General, I said Florida needs a different approach, one that stands up to special interests, defends civil rights, protects our kids, and fights for everyday Floridians.
I believed then, and I believe now, that if you're doing wrong, you ought to be afraid, because the Attorney General should be willing to hold everyone accountable, no matter who you are.
**Jose Javier Rodriguez embodies that commitment.** He has the legal experience, courage, and integrity to aggressively enforce the law, take on corporate and political malfeasance, and protect consumers and workers. He understands that the Attorney General's job is to put the law and the people first.
Florida has a chance to bring fresh leadership to the Attorney General's office and finally address the rising costs and corruption crushing working families. But we're up against an incumbent funded by the same special interests that profit from the status quo.
**[Peter, will you chip in right now to help Jose Javier restore accountability to the Attorney General’s office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124590144/599083470/-1680878311?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Shaw_020226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjVhMTM2MWItODgwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5U7mhN8Tz0g9DoUO0WB6JY-pQWiuJkKyIPPPvYJxUaI=)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This special election is our chance to elect a true progressive fighter to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2760%2E4032634%2EZLvGD7)
---
Yes, 2026 will be a critical year and yes, we need to do everything we can to ensure Democrats win in November, secure majorities in the House and Senate, and put an end to Trump’s unchecked power. 2026 is also about ensuring that our Democratic majorities are filled with true fighters who will take a stand against corporate power and transform the lives of working people in this country. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Analilia Mejia to represent NJ-11 in Congress. As a daughter of immigrants, a union organizer, and the former head of the New Jersey Working Families Party, Analilia understands the issues that the people of NJ-11 are facing and has a proven track record of delivering for communities. She led and won the fight for the state to pass a $15 minimum wage, won paid sick days for every worker in New Jersey, and is ready to take this fight to Washington to un-rig our economy and make it work for working families across the country. **NOW is the time to support the progressive fighters who won’t bow to corporate interests to truly transform who our government works for. With early voting already underway, Analilia needs all the grassroots support she can get in order to turn out voters, keep her ads on the air, and win this Thursday.** [**So, if you’re able, will you please split a donation of $28 or anything you can to support Analilia’s grassroots-powered campaign and strengthen our work in Congress to prioritize working people over corporations?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3454?t=8&akid=2760%2E4032634%2EZLvGD7) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

subject: The candidate who wants to get a beer with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB BROOKS FOR CONGRESS
body:
As Democrats, aren’t we sick and tired of losing races we can and must win??

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124590699/599085648/966921121?refcode=email_020226_beer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjAxOTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTI1NDIwYmEtODkwMC1mMTExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MrFm2M9QxXL7mpcfkYpdrHC_5LhYO_m84VcPWpgerh0=) Peter, When you hear political consultants talk about a candidates’ electability, oftentimes it’ll come down to a simple question: **Would you get a beer with them? 🍺** First of all, we’d definitely answer YES to getting beer with our favorite firefighter/labor leader/snowplow driver running for Congress, Bob Brooks. But not only do we want to grab a beer with Bob, he’s the type of guy who’d want to get a beer with YOU and hear about your concerns. Bob is certainly not your typical Democratic congressional candidate (and that’s a very good thing). Instead, he’s a working-class guy who gives us our best shot to defeat MAGA congressman Ryan Mackenzie and flip this very close district in PA-07. [**Do you think you could kick in a few dollars to help Bob Brooks win this critical race? Only 2% of Congress comes from the working class. As Democrats, aren’t we sick and tired of losing races we can and must win?? That’s why we need a fresh crop of candidates who are turning the tables on a broken status quo.
Bob has actually lived the struggles of working class folks. He knows what it’s like to face foreclosure. He relied on food stamps as a kid. He’s been forced to work multiple jobs to get by.
Not enough of our elected officials get it. A career politician like Ryan Mackenzie certainly doesn’t. People like him just don’t understand how hard it is for middle-class families right now.
Mackenzie won PA-07 by only a single percentage point in 2024. This seat is winnable and with your help, we’ll secure a big victory for working people when we elect Bob Brooks this November.
Team Brooks
_P.S. Check this out: POLITICO interviewed Bob last week. Snowplow duties have kept him busy these past few days!_

subject: Weaker, not weak dollar by Steve Abramowicz
body:
Is Trump's weaker-dollar strategy economic realism--or a slow-motion tax on every American paycheck?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.KMmeejSa3sZ0_jTxAJNvZzp6Ghr043PVDidUNqYYZA4?) for more

# [Weaker, not weak dollar by Steve Abramowicz ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=186658089&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NjU4MDg5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzAwNzMzNTQsImV4cCI6MTc3MjY2NTM1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2lCvoLMM-tyxtpddrSCz0AbT3_tLXot9d9i7WMixLJU)
### Is Trump's weaker-dollar strategy economic realism--or a slow-motion tax on every American paycheck?
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| Feb 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=186658089&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NjU4MDg5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MDA3MzM1NCwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNjY1MzU0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNjcyOTU4OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8tO18Oj1lJLY2idThp24syZQXKQ2JxDG8q50BwC74c8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=186658089&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NjU4MDg5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzAwNzMzNTQsImV4cCI6MTc3MjY2NTM1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2lCvoLMM-tyxtpddrSCz0AbT3_tLXot9d9i7WMixLJU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=186658089&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg2NjU4MDg5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzAwNzMzNTQsImV4cCI6MTc3MjY2NTM1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2lCvoLMM-tyxtpddrSCz0AbT3_tLXot9d9i7WMixLJU)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/heartlandjournal/p/weaker-not-weak-dollar-by-steve-abramowicz?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fa52818e-31ec-42bb-a0d8-8e2c2090fda5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump wants a weaker dollar. His preference is for "not a weak dollar, but a weaker dollar", arguing that a somewhat diminished currency value benefits U.S. exports and manufacturing. The dollar has fallen by about 8 percent since he took office.

Kenneth Rogoff at Harvard Kennedy School for Business and Government said, "Donald Trump believes that devaluing the dollar will restore America's manufacturing sector to its former glory. But even if the greenback weakens sooner rather than later - as looks likely, regardless of policy decisions - a second Trump administration would probably still forge ahead with its disastrous tariff plan."

To do this, Trump wants to continue transforming the US into an export economy with the focus on the trade deficit.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.-YL1p0sBXU1wPuP5xtxwLkd2Y7sb1cIGsTDgu4447M8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186658089)
Trump's choice for treasury secretary, hedge fund manager Scott Bessent, [has laid out an economic plan](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e928eba2-f203-4646-8a39-2cf31dbeda57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) known as "3-3-3," which involves reducing the federal budget deficit down to 3 percent of gross domestic product (GDP), getting real GDP growth to 3 percent, and producing an additional 3 million barrels of oil a day by 2028.

This would more than fully close the fiscal gap, leaving debt as a percentage of GDP slowly declining in the long run. Bessent [explicitly stated](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/99432409-aba9-4fb9-ad93-e4e8ab6d2878?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that extending the 2017 tax cuts is a priority, and he would likely rule out tax increases on the wealthy to pay for them. This suggests a deficit target of 3 percent of GDP would require large taxes on imported goods.

The U.S. has lived with a massive trade deficit for decades. But under President Donald Trump's sweeping tariffs, that gap is suddenly narrowing -- and much faster than many expected.

"On the trade balance, which we know is going to be a deficit, we're expecting a number around $58 billion," Rick Santelli said. As he read through the Commerce Department's update, his tone shifted. "Buckle up, this is unreal! The movement in this number: -$29.4 billion -- we cut it basically in half! We cut it in half!"

October's $29.4 billion trade deficit didn't just come in well below economists' forecasts -- it marked a 39% drop from September's $48.1 billion gap.

As debt crosses $40T interest on debt is over $1T a year (more than social security) acts as headwind to productivity.

The recent release of the final [Monthly Treasury Statement](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/50fb5ab5-1fca-457b-8433-9907967bc32b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the Treasury Department shows that net interest costs totaled**$882 billion** in Fiscal Year (FY) 2024. The Monthly Treasury Statement shows that:

* Net interest spending **increased by $223 billion** from FY 2023 and has nearly tripled since 2020.
* Interest was the**second largest federal expenditure** in FY 2024, behind only Social Security.
* **We spent more on interest** on the national debt in FY 2024 **than national defense or Medicare**.

Reviving a campaign pledge, President Donald Trump wants a one-year, 10% cap on credit card interest rates, a move that [could save Americans](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7a136a4f-5515-4e38-9a23-4882f25a5e92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) tens of billions of dollars but drew immediate opposition from an industry that has been in his corner.

Reducing rates now will continue to inflate, if you don't want pay interest on credit card? Pay it off monthly.

More vital is DC's refusal to cut spending; also inflationary. Inflation is _the increase in the prices of goods and services over time_.

Tariff money on imports could slow as exports for cheaper dollar denominated items dominate while the cost of living in the US becomes more expensive (electric bills have double in some places, HB1 visas and CDLs issued by states for cheaper labor, deportations of illegals raising labor costs). Energy and labor are often the two largest line items for corporations that could slow the economy and stop stock market gains, 2025 Nasdaq did best domestically, but international markets did better last year. Rising all boats.

This type of command economy can give a false impression that socialism works when it is really cheap imported labor gains off setting Green New deal increased energy inputs.

_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

We are at a boiling point.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124591071/599087580/-153530995?refcode=EM_C_260202thanks_N_SB_30DO_3_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTk5ZmZlNy04YTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Oe5YI_0ski_1iOnbxCyK163u9MaV-rzRs_ChyReCO4=) Peter,

I wanted to reach out and thank you for your incredible support. With your help, we are kicking off my re-election campaign and the fight to take back the House strong – I am so grateful.

We are at a boiling point in America, where the Dictator from Day One is working to chip away at our fundamental rights and freedoms, and House Republicans are aiding in his efforts. We are not going to lie down and take it. We must fight back with everything we can – starting by protecting my seat and taking back the House.

With you by my side, we will continue to fight tooth and nail to defend our democracy and ensure that the American people are not being left behind. I know that together, we will endure.

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

Thank you, Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? ******=****** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Cowards
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Once again, Democratic leadership and Do-Nothing Democrats surrendered to
Donald Trump. Cowards.

This weekend, 22 Democratic senators — including Minority Leader Chuck
Schumer — voted with Republicans to fund the Department of Homeland
Security for two more weeks.

They gave up their leverage, claiming they’ll fight for ICE “reforms” over
the next two weeks while keeping them funded and terrorizing our
communities.

But ICE cannot be reformed — it must be abolished.

And so many of the so-called reforms they’re suggesting aren’t even
meaningful — they’re meek and performative at best, including more body
cameras and requiring ICE to actually follow the law and court orders.

Trump’s regime has BEEN ignoring the Constitution and murdering innocent
people while filming themselves: what makes Democrats think this will
change anything?

Schumer said the message must be “restrain, reform, and restrict ICE.” No
— it’s defund and abolish ICE, period.

This sums up the current state of the Democratic Party and why we need
more primaries to make this a REAL opposition party. We deserve better
than this, and Justice Democrats is working to make it happen by
supporting 10 working-class, progressive primary challengers this election
year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260202.5jjIpv&refcode=em20260202-37426&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37426%2E1203867%2EVY9VMq ]Help us send 10 Democrats to Congress who will fight to end ICE once
and for all: chip in $5 or more to fuel our 2026 primary
fights now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260202.5jjIpv&refcode=em20260202-37426&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=37426%2E1203867%2EVY9VMq ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Once again, Democratic leadership and Do-Nothing Democrats surrendered to Donald Trump. Cowards. This weekend, 22 Democratic senators — including Minority Leader Chuck Schumer — voted with Republicans to fund the Department of Homeland Security for two more weeks. They gave up their leverage, claiming they’ll fight for ICE “reforms” over the next two weeks while keeping them funded and terrorizing our communities. But ICE cannot be reformed — it must be abolished. And so many of the so-called reforms they’re suggesting aren’t even meaningful — they’re meek and performative at best, including more body cameras and requiring ICE to actually follow the law and court orders. Trump’s regime has BEEN ignoring the Constitution and murdering innocent people while filming themselves: what makes Democrats think this will change anything? Schumer said the message must be “restrain, reform, and restrict ICE.” No — it’s defund and abolish ICE, period. This sums up the current state of the Democratic Party and why we need more primaries to make this a REAL opposition party. We deserve better than this, and Justice Democrats is working to make it happen by supporting 10 working-class, progressive primary challengers this election year. [ ]Help us send 10 Democrats to Congress who will fight to end ICE once and for all: chip in $5 or more to fuel our 2026 primary fights now! [ ]Contribute $5 In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: I’m taking action to rein in ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Last week, I introduced new legislation to hold ICE and Customs and Border Protection accountable.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124591394/599088426/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTk5ZmZlNy04YTAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCf2KyN38q83Gqg69O1GGD2wciw30KQoALo3HtZVY8E=&emci=5608dea3-7c00-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=2599ffe7-8a00-f111-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | **I'm taking action to confront the Trump Administration's lawless immigration enforcement and defend our Constitution.** Last week, I introduced new legislation to hold ICE and Customs and Border Protection (CBP) accountable when their agents violate people's constitutional rights. It's called the _ICE and CBP Constitutional Accountability Act_ , and it is about ending the culture of impunity that has taken hold under Donald Trump. Under this administration, ICE and CBP agents have been empowered to trample basic freedoms — violating free speech, conducting searches without warrants, denying due process, and terrorizing communities across the country. **And instead of reining this in, Republicans have poured massive amounts of money into these agencies with almost no accountability.** As Ranking Member of the Senate Budget Committee, I led the fight against Republicans' so-called Big, Ugly Betrayal budget bill last year. That bill included nearly $75 billion in slush funds for ICE and another $70 billion for CBP — funding that Trump is now using to escalate a cruel enforcement campaign and tighten his authoritarian grip nationwide. **Our legislation changes the rules.** Our legislation gives Americans the legal tools they need to sue ICE and CBP when their agents break the law and violate our constitutional rights. These tools already exist to hold state and local law enforcement accountable if they violate your rights. It’s long past time that the same tools exist to hold federal agents accountable, too. **All Americans should be outraged that Trump's lawless federal agents are trampling the Constitution and spreading fear.** If we allow ICE and CBP to operate above the law, we surrender the fundamental freedoms that define us as Americans. This bill is about standing up for the Constitution, enforcing accountability, and making clear that no federal agency — and no president — is above the law. name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: We’ve seen this movie before
body:
After a decade of the same failures, it’s time for something new.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
If it feels like Texas is stuck on repeat, that’s because it is.
For the past 11 years, we’ve been living our own version of _Groundhog Day_ , waking up to the same failed leadership, the same tired playbook, and the same billionaire donors calling the shots while Texans pay the price.
Year after year, Greg Abbott and his deep pocketed donors keep us trapped in this loop, only interested in buying power for themselves.
While Abbott protects corporations and special interests, Texans are struggling with rising costs, underfunded school systems, and unreliable leadership that cares more about scoring political points and sucking up to Trump than delivering on real issues for our state.
But it doesn’t have to be this way.
Texas is full of hardworking fighters who look out for one another, and believe our government should do the same. We know what’s possible when we come together with the courage and determination to reimagine our future and pave a new path for Texas.
It’s time for us to break this cycle. Texans deserve a governor who puts the people of this great state first, and understands what’s at stake for working families.
**[If you’re tired of reliving the same bad movie year after year and are ready to roll the credits on Abbott’s Texas, will you chip in $5 today?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260202_1_groundhog.ddh_MJ&refcode=em20260202-519&amount=5&t=1&akid=519%2E299639%2EcJOWJs)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260202_1_groundhog.ddh_MJ&amount=5&refcode=em20260202-519&t=20&akid=519%2E299639%2EcJOWJs)
With gratitude,
Gina

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Little Round Top
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
On July 2, 1863, Colonel Joshua Chamberlain and the 20th Maine held the extreme left flank of the Union lines at Gettysburg — Little Round Top.
#
Peter:
Quick story for you about how small but strategic wins can influence the whole war.
On July 2, 1863, Colonel Joshua Chamberlain and the 20th Maine held the extreme left flank of the Union lines at Gettysburg — Little Round Top. If that position fell, the entire Union Army would be exposed, and the battle lost.
The Confederates sent wave after wave up Little Round Top, and Chamberlain and his men fought each back. But with ammunition running out and casualties mounting, Chamberlain was running out of time and options. He gave his troops an order: Fix bayonets, and charge down the hill.
That charge saved the day, the battle, the war, and ultimately the United States of America. All because a 35-year-old liberal arts professor from Maine wasn’t going to let anybody kick him off a hill.
On Saturday, Taylor Rehmet won an election in the most unlikely place — a Trump +17 district in Texas. We knew this race would be important, and we knew we could have an impact. We put $500,000 behind Taylor because we believed in him.
Small wins like that can influence the entire war.
Now, we don’t **_expect_** you to donate just because we’ve got a win to celebrate. We are **_hoping_** you’ll donate because we have hundreds more races to win this year. And we hope that by now you know — we’ll put your donation where it can have a real impact.
So, how about it:
[**Make a donation to VoteVets. It all adds up fast when lots of people chip in. And that’s how we’ll win — together.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb26.0dMHx3&refcode=em260202-1-90&t=1&akid=34917%2E3013755%2EHD-0LN)

Fellow American —

I want to be completely candid with you about what we’re walking into this year. The 2026 midterms are not routine — they’re shaping up to be a referendum election, and Democrats are already operating like they can taste the Speaker’s gavel again. Republicans hold the House right now, but our majority is razor-thin, and we cannot afford even a small slip in turnout, enthusiasm, or resources.

The hard truth is Democrats don’t need a “wave.” **They don’t need 30 seats. They only need a handful to flip control of Congress, and they’re building their entire strategy around that reality.** They’re targeting competitive districts nationwide, recruiting challengers, and using every headline they can to fuel small-dollar fundraising and motivate their base.

And we all know what happens if Democrats take the House. Deporting criminal illegal aliens is shutdown. We’ll be fighting tax increases instead of delivering tax cuts. And crazy Leftists will run all the committees. **Instead of results, Washington becomes a circus again — investigations, subpoenas, political stunts, and endless obstruction designed to paralyze President Trump’s final two years in office.** If Democrats flip the House, the America First agenda is dead on arrival.

That’s why I’m reaching out today. We have a narrow window to build the resources we need early so we can define this race on our terms, win the air war, and fund a serious turnout operation before Democrats’ outside money starts flooding in.

clean_body: They only need a handful to flip control of Congress, and they’re building their entire strategy around that reality. | Fellow American — I want to be completely candid with you about what we’re walking into this year. The 2026 midterms are not routine — they’re shaping up to be a referendum election, and Democrats are already operating like they can taste the Speaker’s gavel again. Republicans hold the House right now, but our majority is razor-thin, and we cannot afford even a small slip in turnout, enthusiasm, or resources. The hard truth is Democrats don’t need a “wave.” They don’t need 30 seats. They only need a handful to flip control of Congress, and they’re building their entire strategy around that reality. They’re targeting competitive districts nationwide, recruiting challengers, and using every headline they can to fuel small-dollar fundraising and motivate their base. And we all know what happens if Democrats take the House. Deporting criminal illegal aliens is shutdown. We’ll be fighting tax increases instead of delivering tax cuts. And crazy Leftists will run all the committees. Instead of results, Washington becomes a circus again — investigations, subpoenas, political stunts, and endless obstruction designed to paralyze President Trump’s final two years in office. If Democrats flip the House, the America First agenda is dead on arrival. That’s why I’m reaching out today. We have a narrow window to build the resources we need early so we can define this race on our terms, win the air war, and fund a serious turnout operation before Democrats’ outside money starts flooding in. We’ve worked too hard to let the radical left claw their way back into power and turn Congress into an emergency brake on President Trump’s agenda, fellow American. Thank you, Beth Van Duyne | | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION
subject: Join Team Karen for the KC for JOCO Volunteer Kickoff!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION * 6709 West 119th Street * Ste
body:
Join Team Karen for the KC for JOCO Volunteer Kickoff!

| | | | | |
---
| |
Hi Peter,I’m excited to invite you to our Volunteer Kickoff on **Wednesday, February 11 at 7PM** as we officially launch the 2026 primary!
---
| | | | |
---
| [RSVP TODAY!](https://us.list-manage.com/9NIaoca95Tl?e=7320325a61&c2id=7adf4106091b2bdf32986c5b36d3a494)
---
| | I’m running because just identifying problems isn’t enough, Johnson County needs leadership with priorities and a plan. In just five years, the county budget has grown by 45%, from $1.26 billion to $1.83 billion. Families feel that growth every month in their property tax bills, and still our commission is deaf to concerns and are raising spending year after year.As Commission Chair, I will fight to cut property taxes, rein in runaway spending, and restore fiscal sanity. COVID-era funding was meant to be temporary, but it created permanent obligations. I will work to eliminate waste, reduce non-essential spending, and make sure every tax dollar is spent wisely.I also believe Johnson County must remain family-friendly. That means expanding pathways to single-family homeownership, protecting neighborhoods, and pushing back against policies that favor out-of-state corporations over local families.**Our Volunteer Kickoff is your chance to meet the team, learn what we’re building, and find the role that fits you best. Whether you have a few minutes a week or more time to give, you can make a real difference.** This campaign is powered by neighbors like you who care about the future of Johnson County. I hope you’ll join us on **February 11 at 7PM**.Thank you,
Karen Crnkovich
Candidate for Johnson County Commission

---
| | | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/a9ad489043cf/5zc1o6h29x?e=7320325a61)
PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION * 6709 West 119th Street * Ste. 224 * Overland Park, KS 66209 * USA
[update your preferences](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=bcb96cb51f&e=7320325a61&c=2a75cc0fe4) or [unsubscribe](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=bcb96cb51f&t=b&e=7320325a61&c=2a75cc0fe4)

| | Fellow Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=922c1790724a484098b4ea7056f91a52&_e=evQW9YJ8NcnDrk2Bb9c2AOsj89-cppbZ4XYTVTNYqheBoCYt5AoJwLxD3mtGeOSrZuZyBuLf-pnHr2KQaJ2X80ARSql2Cpn2Vksq4WrY88erEGUAux5Htg5aq7Ph44c8JHWSnUSmg94E-QYTqZl7VP16bxI5y6sO08Jr-2PF781g1OOSTtnaCn8oAW_HzNBqBb4qqHgeZosOFBU0cGr5ImSyKng9DZGJHvAzj1WkdVQqdPvv_ZwjmoZdnm0H9DKoxj_sxweHnvDf8aK99KP6fScLWG8mxsG-ydR16L3KxkSACuYNfaicXzg5b62TnJPoerHbqj2Pa4QFA9H8GiYg-3LGEhCfO94nh6j3jRUXxc8LZgsKiOGH-c1hwHqylzPUhvMlTiTAk-XbPF7ux2GokRK-7OA70pp2egGFWeEAQO4Yo8r9W2cxAAd5Kyo0ZfHtywiFge5A_MWrKchgEq0Hc2X9d962KlZJZaZQAj7N_ToDLAFCEvCZzrftFCKD5R-1y0SKGkctzlT-g16w4v-Iijm0g8jHuMVM5yiz4BFImccDcsjWLhaxeRnJ6y3nbNsNNq5IRmtc5sp__zagFFjt9b4QeRw-4bl7PVZADzKxnF0vCxw73Q7cp-nAMogegCrEc2DilCS9npAokt6vWjO-ygyD5Tm0UFhY3s0G_iZ11k59QjAru_6tNxaOC6Ks7d5q)

This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we’ll send you a copy — as our thank-you for carrying Charlie’s mission forward.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=922c1790724a484098b4ea7056f91a52&_e=evQW9YJ8NcnDrk2Bb9c2AOsj89-cppbZ4XYTVTNYqheBoCYt5AoJwLxD3mtGeOSrZuZyBuLf-pnHr2KQaJ2X80ARSql2Cpn2Vksq4WrY88erEGUAux5Htg5aq7Ph44c8JHWSnUSmg94E-QYTqZl7VP16bxI5y6sO08Jr-2PF781g1OOSTtnaCn8oAW_HzNBqBb4qqHgeZosOFBU0cGr5ImSyKng9DZGJHvAzj1WkdVRLKR1iMc71-g0l-kWXaRocHpA2mz6c8RzbmnCrRGVpOnfx0V6AufIryh1BcN7TjqmwnJk_ALRkDNtA2FA9uIW7LpxCzXLI8qCWvskK_tf1r7B55LmjbG28xh3ZNmKLJhRUTZYckmKTCzM2lzdbTXt1y12aGiwKnKFKBj_pN08pKv5yFGvP4M1shzvDCg0OIP6-8rNEslFqdcILnMvRHLNPY4_sACVwKmNJMCcK0HQWVMpM_CAQx3zcVvL6HK6SyAiiEZgJcZ5nyPNs-eywxR44FbGHzXYytihBwip-ZKx1AmasagELBFqViiqqtHzaG1dEjESblSahLTPTZde3lXa48TABhlmq6u9Um7TH87mJqIOhntKFA85ulRo33ZJtzy9yv6ulsj_HUBkqPpxgaQO-4W6S-07ASHamuir3byLsYcr0E3hGCU79DvHmwchjXc3MyzYSAnuSquApl6Bm8db7)**

Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=922c1790724a484098b4ea7056f91a52&_e=evQW9YJ8NcnDrk2Bb9c2AOsj89-cppbZ4XYTVTNYqheBoCYt5AoJwLxD3mtGeOSrZuZyBuLf-pnHr2KQaJ2X80ARSql2Cpn2Vksq4WrY88erEGUAux5Htg5aq7Ph44c8JHWSnUSmg94E-QYTqZl7VP16bxI5y6sO08Jr-2PF781g1OOSTtnaCn8oAW_HzNBqBb4qqHgeZosOFBU0cGr5ImSyKng9DZGJHvAzj1WkdVSFp4TurvqW0Gk2ow1QeZm7aTrqQ_qbv6hwl85u-L7OkU4VNpnveYKTNnDUy7XgHu0AWI7upSO8eHdAym7010orZA2PxDNYGwrSrjBCL-LtcdGVEW0fFOzRiW29QzQlJlKmoUgng2cR8M3dJIwc4X5H43a97VxAVepByLLbNn4WLhhH59fNp52d3_4SKj9DXjWq0eZE-JGSl7lE_NywTTKtQQ7Hk0Eft3Xl66iZ_p2Rm2eUTW6Ccra0l0V2SOnhAj_mN4evAAhrD4I2sRgkVpF4C2nDMWTmM6SbAW_XMadv4KZWkOtb51j_Ez9sT32M1iJxjkhdJpptvGDyIR-lo0sV_UyEon9QAJnnSPMTuR508A5w3ZeSWV2LK-nYhgc4yG6nYSXMsPvcgHbk66WB8A5JxzLzHX8JrNVHaxgsqxYUYzWSg3qDF53oDh0NNED_KI2oxnkSb_K8SwEe3yYk6kMB)**

Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: This week’s M4F Dispatch
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e2a41d7e6363/welcome-to-the-m4f-dispatch-256?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=2b8d1bc808&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | |
# _The Truth They Don’t Want You to See_
---
|
---
| | Before ICE was killing people in broad daylight, they were killing people behind closed doors.
At least 32 people have already died in ICE detention in 2025 alone — a level of death not seen in more than two decades. And it’s no coincidence.
Under Trump’s renewed immigration crackdowns, detention centers have become prisons that are dangerously overcrowded. . Medical neglect has worsened. Access to attorneys and resources are scarce. And more families are losing loved ones behind locked doors with no accountability.
This cruelty isn’t new — it’s just harder to hide.
For years, people have died in ICE custody from abuse, denial of care, and inhumane conditions while politicians looked the other way. What we’re witnessing now is the natural outcome of America’s carceral system that has no sense of humanity.
We refuse to normalize this.
Every life lost in detention is a policy failure. Every death is preventable. And every one of them is a reason to keep organizing, resisting, and demanding an end to this violent system once and for all.
---
| |
# _National Shutdown Day Generates Nationwide Support_
---
|
---
| | Last Friday, people across the country took collective action to demonstrate that our nationwide shutdown is growing.
From California to Maine, communities joined a National Shutdown to protest ICE’s violent immigration crackdown and honor the lives stolen by this system of terror.
Students walked out of classrooms and marched in freezing temperatures. Thousands gathered outside federal buildings. Families rallied in city centers and churches. Businesses closed their doors or donated profits to immigrant legal defense efforts. And everyday people showed that when we withhold our labor, our dollars, and our compliance, the system feels it.
This blackout proved that resistance doesn’t live in a bubble—it lives in classrooms, workplaces, neighborhoods, and the choices we make together.
When we organize, we disrupt injustice. When we show up, we protect each other. And when we act collectively, we build the power needed to end systems of harm for good.
---
| [TAKE OUR PRIORITIZE HUMANITY PLEDGE](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=c898297c45&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Last week, community pressure worked.
Five-year-old Liam Conejo Ramos and his father, Adrian, are back home in Minneapolis after being torn from their driveway by ICE agents and held more than 1,300 miles away in a Texas detention center. The image of an ICE agent steering Liam into a vehicle with a hand on his Spider-Man backpack while the preschooler stood in the snow wearing a bunny ear heat sparked national outrage.
People of conscience refused to stay silent.
After days of public pressure and legal action, a federal judge ordered their release, sharply condemning the government’s reckless deportation tactics and the trauma inflicted on children in the name of Trump’s anti-immigration political agenda. Texas Rep. Joaquin Castro personally escorted Liam and his father back to Minnesota, declaring, “Liam is now home. With his hat and his backpack. Thank you to everyone who demanded freedom for Liam.”
This victory belongs to every person who spoke up, organized, and demanded humanity over cruelty.
It’s proof that collective action saves families, and it’s why we will keep fighting until every child is safe, every family is free, and the Trump administration’s system of harm is dismantled for good.
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=5a0de2044b&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Change isn’t something we only fight for, it’s something we carry with us.
Our Movement for Freedom merch is more than just apparel. It’s a statement of solidarity, resistance, and community power. Every shirt, hoodie, and accessory helps spread the message that people come before profit—and directly fuels our work organizing on the ground and supporting leaders who prioritize humanity.
When you wear it, you’re not just repping a brand. You’re repping a movement.
[Grab your gear, spark conversations, and help build the future we deserve, one community at a time.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=71665a0e15&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
|
---
|
---
| | This week, we’re proud to spotlight M4F’s endorsed candidate Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib in her re-election campaign. She is a true politivist who governs hand-in-hand with the people, not corporations or special interests. From fighting for Medicare for All and housing as a human right to championing environmental justice, immigrants’ rights, and dignity for working families, Rashida has never backed down from putting community first. Most recently, she introduced House Resolution 876, demanding accountability for the genocide in Gaza and upholding the U.S.’s obligation to protect human rights everywhere. Rashida leads with courage, compassion, and action—exactly the kind of leadership our movement exists to uplift.
[Split a donation now to help re-elect Congresswoman Rashida Talib.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=bc5816c9e3&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| |
_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | [|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=55b7511d83&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | _Copyright (C) 2026 Movement 4 Freedom. All rights reserved._

Our mailing address is:
Movement 4 Freedom PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/profile?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&e=81ab29c4d2&c=e8f5786c10) or [unsubscribe](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&t=b&e=81ab29c4d2&c=e8f5786c10)
---

subject: We couldn’t do this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2602-q1-jg?refcode=260202-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2602-q1-jg?refcode=260202-email]
Peter –
As we head into February, we wanted to take a moment to say thank you.
Because of your support, January was an incredibly strong start to this election year. From day one, you showed up — and that momentum is already making a real difference.
Last month, we officially kicked off our statewide tour , traveling across Colorado to listen, organize, and build the foundation for the work ahead. The response has been energizing, inspiring, and a powerful reminder of what we can accomplish together.
And we’re just getting started. With several more stops coming up soon, we’re excited to keep meeting folks where they are and to continue growing this movement in every corner of the state.
None of this happens without you. Your support in January set the tone for the year ahead, and we’re so grateful to have you on this team.
Onward,
Team Jena

**Last week, we learned that the FBI raided Fulton County’s election operations center.**
Let's call it what it is: **a political stunt, orchestrated to serve Donald Trump's debunked lies about the 2020 election.**
Trump is openly using federal law enforcement to intimidate election officials, undermine our democracy, and lay the groundwork to challenge the next election results he doesn’t like.
And his closest election-denying ally, Burt Jones, is already doing the dirty work for him here in Georgia.
**_Every Georgian — and every American — should be alarmed, Peter._**
Trump and his allies are testing their authoritarian playbook here, hoping their bullying and baseless conspiracies will silence us. They want chaos — they want fear.
We have a different answer: **Unwavering resolve.**
We will not be intimidated by a fragile bully who has been proven wrong time and again. But standing firm isn’t enough. **We must fight back.**
We are mobilizing an unprecedented, comprehensive defense of our democracy. Right now, we are scaling up our operations, building our resources, and preparing to protect the integrity of every vote.
[This critical work is already underway, but the threat is at our doorstep and we must meet this moment. Peter, will you rush a donation of $10, $25, or any amount to protect our democracy today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124592051/599090727/-951696519?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_020226_B1_FBIRAID_D1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTE3YzAwMi04ZDAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnmzAmtZde9uazmKrVrxX88CYjNJOSmW9WdTyA_N9N8=)

We know what’s at stake. We saw it in 2020, and we see it again today. They are not stopping — and neither can we.

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: This tweet says it all: Virginia is fighting back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
People across the country are watching what Virginia does next ahead of midterms.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/131?refcode=em20260202-117&t=1&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH)
A [**recent tweet from More Perfect Union**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/349?t=2&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH) put Virginia in the national spotlight:
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260202_1.yrRKvP&amount=3&refcode=20260202-117&t=3&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH)
Across the country, people are tuning in as Donald Trump tries to rig the upcoming midterm elections by pressuring MAGA Republicans to redraw congressional maps mid-decade, **and they're paying attention to what Virginians are doing to respond.**
We’re fighting for a _temporary emergency amendment_ that protects fair elections by ensuring voters can review redrawn congressional districts before elections take place — not after politicians lock in the outcome.
With less than three months until the amendment is put to a vote, this is a narrow window. And now, with national attention on Virginia, the stakes are even higher.
[**If the YES vote wins we can protect fair elections in the Commonwealth and set an example for the rest of the country. Please donate today to help us level the playing field when it matters most.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260202_1.yrRKvP&amount=3&refcode=20260202-117&t=4&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260202_1.yrRKvP&amount=3&refcode=20260202-117&t=23&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH)**
Voters deserve a voice in their representation — and Virginia is ready to lead the way.
Thank you for standing with us,
Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_footer?refcode=em&t=24&refcode2=117_12592_4qf-GH&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=26&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=117%2E12592%2E4qf-GH)

Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

We’re fighting for a temporary emergency amendment that protects fair elections by ensuring voters can review redrawn congressional districts before elections take place — not after politicians lock in the outcome. With less than three months until the amendment is put to a vote, this is a narrow window. And now, with national attention on Virginia, the stakes are even higher. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Politico: Trump says Republicans should ‘nationalize’ elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

[
---
Peter, Trump lost Georgia in 2020. But his sore loser’s crusade continues. Today, the President called on Republicans to nationalize and “TAKE OVER” elections(!) This immediately after the FBI — alongside Tulsi Gabbard, the nation’s spy chief — RAIDED a Georgia election office and seized truckloads of 2020 ballots. From Minnesota to Georgia, we are watching the President unravel as he abuses federal power to pursue vendettas and consolidate power. My reelection in Georgia is the single most critical U.S. Senate contest in 2026. And with Trump working to “TAKE OVER” elections — including in Georgia — we will win this race ONLY if we defend Georgians’ voting rights from his schemes. Remember: Georgia has always been ground zero for his conspiracy theories. Remember when he demanded our state’s election officials “find” him the votes to win in a state he had lost? **_So: How do we ensure fair midterm elections?_** We have to triple down on voter mobilization and voter protection. We have to win by decisive margins and we have to protect voting rights. That means investing the resources needed to turn out every Democrat in the midterms, and to make sure every vote is properly cast, protected, and counted. Look: Georgia voters don’t take kindly when folks try to intimidate them or prevent them from voting. All of this will only MOTIVATE them to vote in record numbers. **__But we should expect the most vicious attack on voting rights in America’s recent history. And we should expect it to be focused on Georgia.__** [**So if you’re worried — and you’re ready to help us win one of the most important races of 2026 –– rush $5 to my reelection campaign in Georgia right now.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260202-1&t=2&akid=1563%2E5691347%2EJMAFNx) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.dw22dg&amount=5&refcode=em260202-1&t=21&akid=1563%2E5691347%2EJMAFNx)**
