name: Jim Jordan
subject: This changes everything
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| Peter,
---
All year long, Republicans have been haunted by a problem that’s only getting worse...
---
_But the White House Chief of Staff just announced an IRONCLAD solution._
---

clean_body: | Patriot, this is terrible. I have some tough news to share, and I know you won 't be happy. We missed our last fundraising goal ... by a lot! Listen... We are significantly behind where we need to be to CAPITALIZE on our big wins from last year... This is not a good start if we want a clear path for the America First Agenda! This could be the end of the America First Movement... Any advantage the Democrats have pushes them closer to stopping our movement, in other words, total conservative annihilation. I need your urgent help to make up for our missed fundraising goal. We need to amp up our fundraising efforts to Save America! Our future is counting on how well we band together and get the America First Movement back on track! | Thankfully, we have one more chance to get ahead. President Trump still needs our support, and we must replenish our funds to take on the Left. Thank you for your support, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I’m suing Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to silence me because they don’t like what I have to say.
Derek, it's Mark.
I am suing the Secretary of Defense.
After 25 years in uniform and another 5 in the United States Senate, I never imagined I’d have to do something like this. Hegseth has left me no choice.
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to punish me because they don’t like what I have to say. Their attacks are directed at me right now, but they’re trying to send a message to every retired member of the military:
Speak out against us and we will come after you with every tool we have at our disposal. We’ll censure you, we’ll threaten your rank and retirement, and we might even court-martial you.
It’s unconstitutional, so I’m suing them. Beyond this lawsuit, it’s important we send a message to Trump and Hegseth to show them just how many people are on this team to defend constitutional rights. That’s where you come in.
I’ve been truly humbled by the support people have sent my way over the past couple of months. It means the world to me that so many of you care about what Trump and Hegseth are trying to do.
That’s how we’ve made it this far, and it’s how we’ll get to the other side of this chapter in our nation’s history. Together.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a stand and join the fight, this is it.
**[Please, if you can spare a quick donation, can I count on you to chip in a contribution, split between my campaign and Adam Schiff?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12026_abs_em_kelly.peiHpg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TAN_AC90_20260202_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=9472%2E5257348%2EGpSO-Z)**

body:
We need the No Kings Act
| **With momentum like this, we can STOP TRUMP, friend ⬇** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20260202_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=22822%2E878179%2E_yF_DW) As Trump goes full dictator mode, **Americans are waking up** – _even_ in districts he swept by 17 points.

**_But the more Trump’s power is threatened the more AUTHORITARIAN he becomes, so we don’t have much time._**

[Friend, will you be one of the 5,000 Democrats we need to pass the NO KINGS ACT to stop Trump before he takes over? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20260202_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22822%2E878179%2E_yF_DW)

**_5,000 signatures needed by midnight._**
* * *
**We can’t waste a second, friend.** With another No Kings Protest planned for March, it looks like there _might be_ MASSIVE opposition to Trump forming.

**But we don’t know where you stand, friend.**

The NO KINGS ACT will ensure NO ONE, not even Trump, is above the law – it'll bring his assault on democracy to a screeching halt.

[Will you demand it passes, friend? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20260202_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=22822%2E878179%2E_yF_DW)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is a campaign by and for the people.
body:
I’m proud of this...
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
Peter, I want to share something about this campaign that makes me proud. **More than 90% of the donations we receive are $100 or less.** Here’s what that means: Regular folks are choosing to invest what they can, when they can, because they believe in the work we’re doing here. This is a campaign by and for the people. So far this year, the average donation we receive to emails like this one is $27.99. It might not seem like much — it might even sound like a drop in the bucket when you see what GOP PACs and mega donors are ready to spend against us. **It’s not a drop in the bucket to me. It’s a strong showing of support from a friend who knows what’s at stake.** Grassroots investments of $15, $50, or $27.99 are what keep us going in the face of the GOP money machine. _We couldn’t do it without you._ Our race is only going to get more expensive from here on out, so if you could add your support, it would go a long way. **[Click here to donate $27.99, or pick an amount that’s right for you.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5270?t=7&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)** | [DONATE $27.99](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5270?t=8&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5272?t=9&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
---
Thanks so much,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5272?t=10&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=469%2E124072%2EiN35tF)

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Eric will lower costs and expand health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Swalwell for Governor 2026
body:
Join me in supporting Eric’s campaign today. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124592743/599092529/-1558688323?&refcode=E18154-20260202-RaulRuiz-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQ1MDY4YS04ZjAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V2z-FI1a8Y-LzVV0x-Q_Em5w_CCIzPOs_xh-8qRw3xU=) Hi friend, It’s Congressman Dr. Raul Ruiz (CA-25) and today I’m proud to throw my support behind my friend Eric Swalwell for Governor. [_**If you can, please consider making a donation to support his campaign today!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124592745/599092531/-1558688323?&refcode=E18154-20260202-RaulRuiz-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQ1MDY4YS04ZjAwLWYxMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V2z-FI1a8Y-LzVV0x-Q_Em5w_CCIzPOs_xh-8qRw3xU=) Eric is the kind of leader California needs right now — fearless, principled and unafraid to stand up for working people. He understands the real pressures families face every day. Eric has the urgency, vision and commitment to lower the cost of living, expand health care and create job opportunities for every community. **I trust Eric to fight for communities like ours and across California. That’s why I’m proud to stand with Eric and endorse him for Governor.** [_**But he can’t do this alone. name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: LCV Membership Deadline EXTENDED. Peter Willis Status: [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR $5]
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTM0NDg4ODQS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjQwMDAyNTMxOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — Saturday was the deadline for our 2026 Membership Drive, where
every membership contribution got triple matched by a group of donors up to our
campaign goal of $50,000. I'll be quick: we're still $3,425 short of our goal.I’m reaching out because we just got approval to extend our deadline until
tonight at midnight. One last push could put us over the top, and according to our records, we haven't heard from you yet. Please, renew your LCV membership for all of 2026 today and a group of donors will triple match your contribution. All it takes is $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/YYbZBxN~ Thanks so much for supporting this movement, Peter. Keep reading for
more on just how high the stakes are for communities and our planet. The
contributions we receive today make a difference. Sincerely, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters FINAL HOURS:TRIPLE MATCH expires at midnight tonight.Renew your LCV membership now to fund our critical work to defend our communities and our climate, $5 is all it takes >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQyDRL_ Peter, we’re up against our first important fundraising deadline of the year, and the stakes have never been higher. Just weeks into 2026, the Trump administration has already: Prepared to dismantle the legal foundation that requires the EPA to protect people from climate change, making it easier for corporations to dump unlimited greenhouse gases into our air without oversight or accountability.Gutted the Clean Water Act, stripping communities of the right to protect their own rivers, lakes, and water sources from pollution.Tried to ban affordable clean energy and cut thousands of good-paying jobs by halting multiple almost-completed offshore wind projects and continuing to block new wind and solar projects across the country. The environmental movement must respond — but we need YOUR help to make our campaigns work.Please don’t wait: renew your LCV membership now while your impact can go THREE TIMES as far. Right now, $5 is all it takes >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMEgjd7c- 2026 LCV Membership Drive Status

Goal: $50,000
Deadline: MIDNIGHT TONIGHT
Match Status: TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE

FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW
Supporter Record: Peter Willis
DONATED TO JANUARY MEMBERSHIP DRIVE? NOT YET

STATUS: EXPIRED — Renew your LCV membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVHmg_ While families are struggling to pay their power bills, the Trump administration
has been driving prices even higher — all to benefit their Big Oil donors. But the tide is turning — Trump is facing opposition to his dirty agenda across
the country. Even some Republican officials are speaking out against the worst
parts of his agenda. We have to keep up the pressure — that’s why it’s so important that we hear from
you before our deadline tonight, Peter. Please, renew your membership before midnight tonight to help power our critical work in 2026. >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT- To keep our campaigns going strong all year, we need to raise $50,000 before
midnight tonight. If everyone reading this right now pitched in, we’d blow through that goal in minutes. Don’t miss this chance, Peter. Renew your LCV membership for just $5 today and you’ll TRIPLE your impact. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_ Thank you for everything you do for people and our planet. Sincerely, Chris, Alex, Kelly, Shae, Liana, Olivia, Sanam, and Alijah
LCV’s Membership Team This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13448884&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQwMDAyNTMxOQS2&spReportId=MjQwMDAyNTMxOQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13448884&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQwMDAyNTMxOQS2&spReportId=MjQwMDAyNTMxOQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/zUR82w5QdfMGInSUzIQyHe4_I3ZKKNxnp2i5aJisVtEPoHHLJ8wGFnIFVkscCKfe3AP04ovNOHiG3w42gvOrqHmXpxPe3z3ZpVG6qU_3pYamDH6qt8i6ZgiixTGX2HnvoGx-uioUBRF62U_1mbIZozFiGfmacyVQw5mS6GGnaTN5nqyP7BRHi5ZarRc7EEjPXohX_rfZSOMFITN91QrC-CluFP--SmZCf9EmSNaaEJJ-BK7QV297WVfI7nRk0IWSZZJkqvCobY8ToPMiDm4DYEuwy2rzQE7ECfwk38CnyhWO6KX4-FpLG_rszgtXaRc4GWNjTMeJ8ymie7hm-RlBY9359VKZ8uZd-YQOYv5b3Se_Gw2qdFbQihTihNC7lgZyhXORiNuFdYL4y8rgfw2YyE5ZDkQU0UbbdBsStDXJohlxfrVd_7jVDNTlYf5BoFdLBqdaqqGVwNYfJ_vll3bLpa9VTTGTP-reKXYSxbLN44vDr7WcfZt1_6BUy0hVRKliC9Mntzf2YUbe4VZqYNJAFq8MOA3EKPxLQqsr8NmVzAsKwbXLlKu13bhEcPk-RIvug0gXYE32GRfBYJ8lsBLZajqTvlm31kGsowsEkkx_w_jYtc0YJdlWsWj09HqvOLGFZtaiKlY82iZMU5hxVEHaLReFRia-FOk7wlHAGVsOW0WC80IscXw2BtTCkIHUniETctnA4UC-tUIEjzLv5wqcPOf1M48gOq5GtSbyl24K6bXa82-bxtpF_Gf93IHjuHG1pBczvmUovv0cA5k6bpZTcKApDvwtaJR_umgsz9asJMOfKvQgEpPcAIKhbE_k1ycYgY6iklvHzgfWwbx3hJc0gPGOoHo_anVYzs0qEd6XCzVSZpBOKCzbVTEDs-y1ku602RtcK_xnbnKE6gdWdmHe368k4s70u3fjMEwbPYijUowQeFsaZ2ksUJ3AFPm6ZzCx8Kid0wPjp3XiavqFgXWGsU4XnN-a2ZWTXs-gON66LhX2Onr6jLldYZdB8_TXBbYZow/pADP11Ru-xd0eppB54p-DO7s8Wq2tp97/17)

Peter,

President Trump wants to abolish **[Daylight Savings Time (DST).](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/0sigQb5qJ0hXh_CEdP9YGOfqhAtou1kTd8cL9qrfR6FMRVAbxLv7MvSN8W3L_LlNPHMVOMQo-1kD8hr9U3iQ3bdy4bUaKJ6ARQjKoj8zuOphdnwTSwNz8zRjICmGK12Hw8NTmDFJ9SsmDRkQX9-tcnIakrMDEhBsfrbpORyZazTHJiGXkKOmmSb-kYWu8R2rLhJnn_dbzbszNgPkMBekm5pWaGdxFxK7uCbhQtt6psFFi3O6EDykh4bLjAmFmkplVLK-ZpTfbXg6njfYZAWTVAY0wcYu3l437AoCPWujHMqgDakp9HxHzUNq4ProccpJiFI0jG7-iqOjBJxWZInOf6pkvwiUpx8wRgQH0eBYEVCufHnJ7xBSciEGD7lorMg2Wn_yHAAPnjwARk5_9TTTOVPCxNhwSpKi04XEi3_pGb6PLo93vpcZWks3TONf7UncqEw62Gk122jkG3i3FIUgrFx8XwFNheYazXp7IgNT4o_HGRZ9hSVVTuOefM3k1diJ1QLvzA_MbE-TAuLMzACYh3bYyeQ6fAT5VFh3dKM4dKqwq515fBwMZujDh0wY9NKK-eHyiBKmjJ1nbXKxEfAHxTyYd7jKxavaCt1lht9tzqG375DFrFIRqciBOpDbHuIgsK4OqfrT4zFGq15xQzsdL_IVKx71nZBK5mc-TFqKR511Xv22uRIFZX5wCKsNBD6SmVMIU0wfdUN7olE0yTeG4EXdrgzx1Soymo4abjnWZjlJUf9WSMsOR9sSpydxiUIedaJaMqD6ErmPajt15O5ryLXdu790hwwoPlOf5A9Bj9o-y7-QcLhbe3lilimolf-jje-C74uoYBuiXAwpp02L_RS6GMWO6eGLrRt36IdMjlgajhuBshjbeSxY8p6hYyuDLVu8nayxw6iYWOvrJdjF78Xc-Z3YIJ_OsdyCv_hHnXRJjJEEUHMx5dK9wcA424YLWmNQ9prmyrSZgUeTgm-XVprUfwQjA1XDixa0mGTfqT9NPFfdArHsY0E3-M2TgkwfWQ/-4YyG6jyixfpJOhdVtAlA--_ecINf6xk/17)**

President Trump wants to abolish DST and make Standard Time permanent so that there is more daylight in the morning. Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time.

_How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard._

**[Chicago Public Schools Discriminates Against Moody Bible Institute](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/qOObQHYA5h2ynSZ8HCFT8s0kz_eiw_aRCFJCxn1qzlBINVUrmFPOWhItA_O8kZ_oVm58N5V9_hrfiiPFFYyvpBYI7_Ugr2ciFYSyHiRXeDTkSkapcuRufX3U3KGSU-4zfagTHCaa9AhldxnCyDgIXDvI9a5pmSQnk-ZHm79S1OUic171iQCggmNQobhZuu_WrqFzAHre9UfYhAujRtoN9nylMQCjrUbPMiChegXPWr6ARZdIt_Df3M6f4O64QpNb5eTTHBPqq6FMFtV0ebSsIM6IrulHCe5yZWu6oNm2pM6H4guVWYyotfh1bnfjmATSTlUj2h9DiQkybtSJiYoOaN5SiMzHKRHYpct6nNm7eqTH2-B7o4Ha9wDZc3ymacEliEhRrLzcfgnalwTKeaEw5S6Zp1fluK2dQQpZihSMDOM4iuf7V6ASf1EEud7hKtYoU6Mf6T3F4wAnrlrLN1XYTiA1u-EsqbuAdgKUdo5Jh4SY2rD1Ij35dmziNjU_RtnguF6hfLGMMJ_DA019rQg88xK1r5ku1pxHEIpcg6XpZ3O8OQ0brBU1nDcBzIOhQeAhHrxIb-t3YrbkjXJGXMHGrKbO4j5f_tzNBhboyu2flEI1ejHubv2SYlEJgpGnV-_xqw6WC1_e6gDvvrw2OV4F0okgIz7XYu7sLVQnxDz5QUWUbqLdSJZFXOTxQQB9JbYGbsvpvpwAt0zpewnvfZdnFkgQGNWdxWwppeGp/zaSzi_XjHhF59JWIm3lRBKrdtMTkduJY/17)******
Dear Fellow American,

Chicago Public Schools desperately needs qualified teachers. But school officials are choosing to discriminate against Christian student teachers rather than fill those vacancies.

The students at Moody Bible Institute are experiencing this discrimination firsthand.

Moody's students are barred from participating in Chicago Public School's student-teaching program. Not because they lack qualifications. Not because they lack passion for serving students. But because Moody exclusively hires staff who affirm and live out its biblical beliefs.

**In other words, Chicago Public Schools is punishing Moody students for attending a college that practices its faith.**

This is an attack on religious freedom--one of the foundational freedoms that has shaped our nation since its inception. Religious schools like Moody Bible Institute have the constitutional right to exclusively hire employees who share their faith and uphold their religious mission. Without this right, religious institutions would lose their very identity and purpose.

Moody's mission is clear: proclaim the gospel and equip people to be biblically grounded, practically trained, and to engage the world through gospel-centered living. For that mission to be credible, its faculty and staff must be unified in both belief and practice.

But when Moody requested a simple religious exemption acknowledging its constitutionally protected rights, the district refused.

**Instead, officials doubled down --effectively telling Moody students that their faith disqualifies them from serving Chicago's public school children.**

Alliance Defending Freedom is representing Moody Bible Institute in a federal lawsuit to challenge this discriminatory exclusion.

**Will you sign our Statement of Support for Moody Bible Institute and stand with them in this critical moment?
**
This isn't an isolated situation. We are watching this pattern repeat nationwide.

In Washington State, **Yakima Union Gospel Mission** serves thousands of homeless individuals every day--offering food, shelter, and the hope of Christ to locals who desperately need it. Yet the state is threatening the Mission because it only hires those who share its Christian beliefs. Now the Mission is in court seeking to protect its right to hire those who share and live out its faith.

Similarly, in Oregon, Youth 71Five Ministries is asking an appeals court to protect its right to receive public benefits without having to give up its right to employ those who share its faith. Youth 71Five Ministries serves at-risk youth, empowering them with the hope of the Gospel. It depends on a staff that shares its biblical beliefs. But officials stripped the ministry of its public funding for only hiring like-minded individuals who ensure that mission goes forward, violating its constitutional freedoms.

When ministries like Moody, Yakima Union Gospel Mission, and Youth 71Five Ministries stand up in court, they are not only protecting their own freedom. They are defending religious freedom and free expression for every American--Christian or not.

**But these battles come with real emotional and personal costs.** Leaders and staff can face hostility, intense public scrutiny, and even open threats. Stand alongside thousands of believers who are praying for Moody during these stressful times.

That's why your voice matters so deeply right now.

**Please take a moment to sign the Statement of Support today.**
[ SIGN THE STATEMENT OF SUPPORT](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/12B3AtB58VkraGAsdCmC7QihiCIeVvuRqKgoYH2BPu7P2k7G_BVJm3YF9OyXPZO2z4aEG9KSgCiTrwhf-bby91xP3hnDtZ7giIQoemWI9wtcljEcw7bpytQ8eecsKxsiOy9NCX2xkRuDLMc8sx2KzuEuT4gcbMg0usfCNX2KrOQwusuGDnDLC-3B6dP9h0PGsMI_cLz_lkLRQbAju3QtWB6SiGF2dWoxlQ-804luSwwnk1PEWmQHCxxWxAI1LzE5i5BGOYD4OKxdJ7jAI9Uk1wU5g74MS_5NdpUEEqGB3RKiPCKUqEST8VsasQDe0wlDxvFiIye2muPaFySBOV0k1iDJ-pbxCP6uUM8VV4MwY7SmU72GVs1IptCWJqmG7cTKkof3848BSQgcqoRRVM1bnU8-E30O6sJf8f5mtuHOBt8x0O7MRFf32oDd9ZTOki7bdHKed3dQTLjR3FS0nCNBylEdbhK2uc0AJ6ZcgtEJpBsDmp8jSiPIvxrEpVrNh14OwpOC--vUxt_fUAOrtyMEl7sIa5Rt5o4CPu6I4axqAM0bii4me4lUOwITPLwmlD2eHnS-Fgx6RL1N2Z__2Ll6N3jhv9j1g83EJgNSyNXkCpMA7Q_cL8xJtzEIc78hdYSyYiebldWBED-2fiC8MypHjihHsZCexeFn7SQ6zAekQKEwXP-xJDLyotX1J5Ydp4F4SK7z5NTfW6k1BdIs8EghXQGwsGaIDc0WaOHM/eGW1w_jmaRYiJIHnEXvaOUO35wM5FlK8/17)

Thank you for standing with those who are standing for truth.
For freedom,

**Jeremiah Galus**
Senior Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom

You may have already seen them. Negative ads aimed squarely at me, from candidates and outside groups that can’t make a compelling case for themselves, and can only win by tearing others down.

One of these ads is especially cynical. It twists a vote I cast years ago, alongside most Democrats in Congress, to claim I support policies I’ve spent my career opposing. The truth is simple:**_I’ve been a consistent advocate for immigrants’ rights, and I’ve urged Congress to defund abusive enforcement and mass deportation policies. That record hasn’t changed._**

When powerful dark money groups come after me, and all they can muster are obvious lies, I take it as a compliment. Because here is what they really don’t like:

That I’m guided by my principles, not by big donors. That I’ve never taken corporate PAC money, and never will. That as a Congressman I pushed for stronger ethics rules and banning stock trading by members of Congress, and put my own assets in a blind trust so I could focus on the job without conflicts. That’s not popular with everyone in Washington, but it’s the right thing to do.

Over the next few weeks, millions of dollars will be spent trying to define this race for voters. **[That’s why I’m asking again, if you can, to chip in today and help us meet this moment head-on.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquB3dF000pEYQwjdkcVIJ1hLhkyzPV6bU-1d7Jy-GjcWE2ap9Y_EUmA2G1tDMzZMrsRVjyXLs8aZAdtnP46kdd4KWNG6Z-7aEh5oxQlvupg-MmxT3wDvH2ghHdL9Mvut8hsZcFFfjsnsUcxvtl5v7-iDRYh6RIiga2pPQWe6ot5oTPYFPWXi6D72-cVDQz4UuCUQ7IbY_t1D6FyV_7bgBuGSmzsAP4EXWGWxEngiGax1cGvAs3bNgXxUw96CkT6rFIGJX795ZibPb1XPdrhSLj1PJ46NgcOHiAUo1K-knu1-JGD-qi-azkw2amP2FAacE7x9Y4TEFCEhvOy63LpBbCozoxQeJiywzOWcXwRvHxkk3NPBkIdG8lxPawQxD1DzEqKmDczRWYvdUSPU_SB_vdw/4nt/N69DOKOGSo-SjCcUhml9UQ/h7/h001.oXE-QsIkG2raey-t6lKxv2_Ewf5tBRb0-XuMijXZqkI)**

clean_body: | | | | | | Hi, It’s Tom. I wanted to reach out personally because over the past few days, this campaign has hit a real turning point. With your help, we’ve built strong momentum. We’re leading. And that’s exactly why the attacks have started. | | If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately. | | ---|--- | | You may have already seen them. Negative ads aimed squarely at me, from candidates and outside groups that can’t make a compelling case for themselves, and can only win by tearing others down. One of these ads is especially cynical. It twists a vote I cast years ago, alongside most Democrats in Congress, to claim I support policies I’ve spent my career opposing. The truth is simple:I’ve been a consistent advocate for immigrants’ rights, and I’ve urged Congress to defund abusive enforcement and mass deportation policies. That record hasn’t changed. When powerful dark money groups come after me, and all they can muster are obvious lies, I take it as a compliment. Because here is what they really don’t like: That I’m guided by my principles, not by big donors. That I’ve never taken corporate PAC money, and never will. That as a Congressman I pushed for stronger ethics rules and banning stock trading by members of Congress, and put my own assets in a blind trust so I could focus on the job without conflicts. That’s not popular with everyone in Washington, but it’s the right thing to do. Over the next few weeks, millions of dollars will be spent trying to define this race for voters. | If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately. | | ---|--- | | I didn’t expect to ask this now, but I’m asking you to consider making a contribution today. Your support will help us stay on the air, reach voters with the truth, and show that these tactics won’t work here. With gratitude, Tom Email * | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Malinowski for New Jersey Tara Gilligan, Treasurer | PO Box 387 | Millburn, NJ 07041 | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Malinowski for New Jersey, please .

I know we can stop them. I know we can take back control of our country and restore the values that made America great in the first place. That's why I'm counting on you to take action today. This is about sending a powerful message to the Democrats that we won't be intimidated, we won't be silenced, and we won't be defeated. before it closes this evening. Will you do that for me? body:

Hi there,
Our public fundraising deadline is hours away, and we’re just a few contributions short of our $50,000 digital fundraising goal.
If we hit our goal, we show the strength and momentum needed to take on right-wing special interests eyeing this race.

That’s the reality of this moment.

name: Team Katie
subject: We need to consolidate support right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40793%2E3422442%2E3pTPaR)
Peter, yet another candidate is running for Governor of California.
This means one more person competing for the undecided voters Katie needs to win. **[Can you rush a $5 donation to help us reach them first?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260202_2_ak.PADUql&refcode=em20260202-40793&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40793%2E3422442%2E3pTPaR)**
We’re extra worried because the stakes are higher than they’ve been—if we don’t consolidate support behind Katie, a Republican has a serious chance of winning this race.
Right now, two MAGA extremists are leading in the polls. _Katie is the only one who can beat them_ , but new candidates split the vote even more.
Because of California’s top-two primary system, **there’s a very real chance there could be only Republicans on November’s ballot if Katie doesn’t pull ahead in the polls right now.** Our team has a plan to win over voters, but they need the resources to pull it off.
**[Peter, can you donate $5 to Katie’s campaign today to fund our voter outreach that will make sure Katie wins?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260202_2_ak.PADUql&refcode=em20260202-40793&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40793%2E3422442%2E3pTPaR)**

Thank you,
Team Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260202-40793&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40793_3422442_3pTPaR&akid=40793%2E3422442%2E3pTPaR)**

name: Keith Ellison
subject: I’m suing the Department of Homeland Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Ellison for Attorney General
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260202-61140&t=1001&akid=61140%2E1407376%2EQv7Bke ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260202-61140&t=1002&akid=61140%2E1407376%2EQv7Bke ]Demand Justice PAC

I’m suing the Department of Homeland Security to stop their dangerous,
illegal, and unconstitutional operation in Minnesota.

Thousands of armed, masked, and poorly trained federal agents are
terrorizing the Twin Cities. They’ve brazenly and repeatedly used
excessive force against Minnesotans, arrested and threatened innocent
bystanders, and conducted militarized raids in schools, churches,
hospitals, and other sensitive locations.

This violates the law, the First and Tenth Amendments, and the
Constitution’s guarantee of equal sovereignty.

No one should be stopped, questioned, or targeted by ICE solely because of
how they look, how they speak, or where they come from. No parent should
have to wonder if their child will come home safely from school. And no
business should have to shut its doors due to fears of violence.

As Attorney General, I’m doing everything in my power to stop this federal
invasion and protect Minnesotans from harm.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=partner_em260202ke_demandjusticepac.8uLGnj&refcode=em20260202-61140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61140%2E1407376%2EQv7Bke ]Will you split a donation of any amount between our campaign and Demand
Justice PAC to support us as we fight to stop ICE and their unlawful
behavior?
